核心方向 本周总览 交叉研究 磁性/铁电 AI专题 期刊分布
🎯

本周核心方向（ML × ferro / 凝聚态）

3 篇

本周三条主线各有实质推进。新材料线：Fe-VNAND器件层面，PINO替代模型将TCAD天级计算压缩至秒级，加速超10⁴倍，同时保持阈值电压漂移的物理精度，为三维铁电存储器设计提供了可工程化的快速评估工具。新方法线：两篇工作分别从力场构建与交换场学习两个角度突破——Behler-Parrinello架构被推广至金属自旋系统，群论双谱描述符捕捉巡游磁体中电子介导交换场的复杂局域依赖；SOSO框架则将高斯近似势扩展至非共线磁矩自由度，利用旋转对称性实现多体相互作用展开。新现象线：ML力场成功复现三角晶格120°序、四面体非共线磁序及双交换模型热猝混后的复杂自旋纹理；SOSO双体模型对bcc Fe非共线排列的能量与局域场预测误差控制在1 meV/自旋以内，精度匹敌约束非共线DFT。非平衡驱动下的广义势理论（同时含保守/非保守力矩）被提出，为光泵浦或电流驱动磁化动力学开辟路径。

  1. 01
    物理信息AI加速铁电垂直NAND保持特性分析：从天级TCAD到秒级替代模型
    Physics-informed AI Accelerated Retention Analysis of Ferroelectric Vertical NAND: From Day-Scale TCAD to Second-Scale Surrogate Model
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该工作针对铁电场效应晶体管基垂直NAND（Fe-VNAND）的数据保持特性建模难题，提出基于物理信息神经算子（PINO）的AI替代模型。通过将基本物理原理嵌入学习架构，该模型在预测阈值电压漂移及保持行为时，相比传统TCAD工具实现超10000倍加速，同时保持物理精度，为优化三维Fe-VNAND器件设计提供了高效路径。

    📐 方法要点：物理信息神经算子(PINO)嵌入铁电物理约束，构建Fe-VNAND阈值电压漂移的AI替代模型。

    🔗 相关工作关联：区别于纯数据驱动代理模型及传统TCAD数值求解，PINO将器件物理方程融入网络架构。

    💡 对你方向的启示：三维Fe-VNAND保持特性优化可从数天TCAD仿真缩短至秒级，加速超10⁴倍且不失物理精度。

    阅读原文 ↗
  2. 02
    准平衡与驱动金属自旋系统中磁化动力学的机器学习建模
    Machine-learning modeling of magnetization dynamics in quasi-equilibrium and driven metallic spin systems
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该综述回顾了机器学习力场方法在金属自旋系统大规模朗道-利夫希茨-吉尔伯特（LLG）模拟中的最新进展。作者将Behler-Parrinello机器学习架构推广用于构建 itinerant 磁体的可扩展、可迁移模型，基于群论双谱形式的对称性感知磁描述符捕捉电子介导的交换场对局域磁环境的复杂依赖。利用这些机器学习力场，LLG模拟成功复现了三角晶格上的120°和四面体非共线磁序，以及方晶格双交换模型热猝混后混合相中的复杂自旋纹理。此外，作者还讨论了将BP形式推广至同时包含保守和非保守电子力矩的广义势理论，以描述非平衡驱动下的磁化动力学。

    📐 方法要点：群论双谱对称性感知磁描述符扩展BP神经网络，构建巡游磁体ML力场。

    🔗 相关工作关联：延续Behler-Parrinello原子环境描述符思想，突破传统Heisenberg/LLG模型对交换作用形式的预设限制。

    💡 对你方向的启示：实现三角晶格120°序、四面体非共线磁序等复杂自旋纹理的大规模LLG模拟；广义势理论可处理驱动非平衡态。

    阅读原文 ↗
  3. 03
    自旋取向的光滑重叠：从头算自旋动力学的机器学习交换场
    Smooth Overlap of Spin Orientations: Machine Learning Exchange Fields for Ab-initio Spin Dynamics
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该工作将磁自由度引入广泛使用的机器学习高斯近似势，构建了基于原子坐标及其非共线磁矩描述晶体势能面的模型。在自旋方向和大小绝热近似下，模型仅依赖自旋坐标与取向，兼具计算效率与从头算自旋动力学能力。利用磁相互作用旋转对称性，模型可按集团展开精神纳入多体相互作用；以双体形式实现交换相互作用，对bcc Fe非共线自旋排列的总能量和局域场预测与约束非共线密度泛函计算结果高度一致，误差在1 meV/自旋以内。

    📐 方法要点：SOSO框架将磁矩取向引入高斯近似势，旋转协变展开多体磁相互作用。

    🔗 相关工作关联：区别于固定自旋矩或标量自旋密度泛函，直接学习非共线磁构型的能量面与有效场。

    💡 对你方向的启示：bcc Fe非共线排列能量与局域场误差<1 meV/自旋，兼具从头算精度与经典自旋动力学效率。

    阅读原文 ↗
01

本周总览#

先把握一周的主线，再进入交叉重点与专题全文速览。

整体概览

本周327篇文献中，铁电/磁性与AI/ML各占166篇。铁电/磁性领域聚焦交错磁性（altermagnetism）的量子几何效应、自旋电子学新器件及二维磁性的多场调控；AI/ML方面以物理信息神经网络（PINN）、机器学习原子间势（MLIP）和量子-经典混合算法为三大主线，加速材料模拟与科学发现。

趋势观察

交错磁性（altermagnetism）成为本周最活跃方向，涵盖RuO₂、KV₂Se₂O、Cr₂SO等多种材料的量子几何输运、自旋劈裂与器件应用；二维磁性材料（CrSBr、Fe₃GaTe₂、MnSi等）的层数依赖磁性、近邻调控与声子-磁振子耦合受到持续关注；铁电领域聚焦氧化铪基薄膜的相结构澄清与垂直互补架构的高耐久存储。AI/ML方面，物理信息神经网络（PINN/PINO）向多物理场耦合与工业级加速演进，机器学习原子间势（MACE、NEP、Equitrain）的微调策略与主动学习成为提升复杂体系模拟精度的关键，大语言模型驱动的自主科研智能体（MIND、MatBrain）开始从概念走向实验验证。

后续展望

交错磁性的实验确认与量子几何器件化将是近期重点，需解决表面/体相磁性归属争议；AI驱动的材料自主发现闭环（假设-模拟-实验-反馈）有望显著压缩研发周期，但需建立更严格的不确定性量化与实验验证标准。

02

交叉研究#

优先覆盖 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料的直接交叉工作。

01

连续PT对称破缺作为设计巨交替磁性自旋劈裂的变量#

Continuous PT-Symmetry Breaking as a Design Variable for Giant Altermagnetic Spin Splitting
📚 arXiv👤 Kichan Chun, Gunn Kim📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破传统DFT依赖范式，首创"基元对称破缺指数"这一连续标量描述符，实现PT对称破缺程度的晶体坐标直接量化。通过机器学习解码结构-性能关系，结合贝叶斯优化高效筛选，不仅发现α-NiS具有0.82
该研究提出“基元对称破缺指数”作为无需DFT计算的连续标量，直接从晶体坐标量化反平行磁基元间的PT对称破缺程度。基于3851个DFT标记二元结构的XGBoost代理模型与SHAP分析识别出三个主导描述符：MSBI、基元堆积分数和p/d电子比。贝叶斯优化结合独立DFT验证，发现α-NiS具有0.823 eV的自旋劈裂能，并预测了三种此前未被认识的高性能候选材料。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究提出“基元对称破缺指数”作为无需DFT计算的连续标量，直接从晶体坐标量化反平行磁基元间的PT对称破缺程度。基于3851个DFT标记二元结构的XGBoost代理模型与SHAP分析识别出三个主导描述符：MSBI、基元堆积分数和p/d电子比。贝叶斯优化结合独立DFT验证，发现α-NiS具有0.823 eV的自旋劈裂能，并预测了三种此前未被认识的高性能候选材料。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.10173v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic point-group analysis classifies altermagnets but returns only a binary symmetry verdict, leaving spin-splitting energy (SSE) inaccessible without spin-polarized density functional theory (DFT). This binary ceiling is not fundamental. Sublattice symmetry breaking is promoted here to a continuous, DFT-free scalar -- the Motif Symmetry-Breaking Index (MSBI) -- that quantifies PT-symmetry breaking between antiparallel magnetic motifs directly from crystal coordinates. SHAP analysis of an XGBoost surrogate trained on 3,851 DFT-labeled binary structures identifies three dominant descriptors: MSBI (symmetry-breaking axis), motif packing fraction MPF (superexchange axis), and the p/d electron ratio (covalency axis), each mapping onto a directly tunable experimental handle. A controlled VO--CrSb comparison within the same P6₃/mmc host lattice demonstrates that composition alone boosts SSE sevenfold. Bayesian optimization over this three-axis space, followed by independent DFT validation, recovers α-NiS (SSE = 0.823,eV) as cross-validation against an independent symmetry-based prediction and identifies three previously unrecognized high-SSE candidates -- square-planar FeS (1.297,eV), octahedral CoS (1.103,eV), and FeAs (1.089,eV) -- all matching or exceeding CrSb. Square-planar Fe--S is proposed as a transferable coordination motif for giant altermagnetic spin splitting, advancing altermagnet design from symmetry classification to continuous quantitative optimization.

02

准平衡与驱动金属自旋系统中磁化动力学的机器学习建模#

Machine-learning modeling of magnetization dynamics in quasi-equilibrium and driven metallic spin systems
📚 arXiv👤 Gia-Wei Chern, Yunhao Fan, Sheng Zhang, Puhan Zhang📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将Behler-Parrinello机器学习力场拓展至巡游磁体体系，创新性地构建了对称性感知磁描述符，突破了传统LLG模拟难以处理复杂交换相互作用的技术瓶颈，为大规模非平衡磁动力学及拓扑自旋纹理
该综述回顾了机器学习力场方法在金属自旋系统大规模朗道-利夫希茨-吉尔伯特（LLG）模拟中的最新进展。作者将Behler-Parrinello机器学习架构推广用于构建 itinerant 磁体的可扩展、可迁移模型，基于群论双谱形式的对称性感知磁描述符捕捉电子介导的交换场对局域磁环境的复杂依赖。利用这些机器学习力场，LLG模拟成功复现了三角晶格上的120°和四面体非共线磁序，以及方晶格双交换模型热猝混后混合相中的复杂自旋纹理。此外，作者还…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该综述回顾了机器学习力场方法在金属自旋系统大规模朗道-利夫希茨-吉尔伯特（LLG）模拟中的最新进展。作者将Behler-Parrinello机器学习架构推广用于构建 itinerant 磁体的可扩展、可迁移模型，基于群论双谱形式的对称性感知磁描述符捕捉电子介导的交换场对局域磁环境的复杂依赖。利用这些机器学习力场，LLG模拟成功复现了三角晶格上的120°和四面体非共线磁序，以及方晶格双交换模型热猝混后混合相中的复杂自旋纹理。此外，作者还讨论了将BP形式推广至同时包含保守和非保守电子力矩的广义势理论，以描述非平衡驱动下的磁化动力学。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11513v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We review recent advances in machine-learning (ML) force-field methods for large-scale Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert (LLG) simulations of metallic spin systems. We generalize the Behler-Parrinello (BP) ML architecture -- originally developed for quantum molecular dynamics -- to construct scalable and transferable ML models capable of capturing the intricate dependence of electron-mediated exchange fields on the local magnetic environment characteristic of itinerant magnets. A central ingredient of this framework is the implementation of symmetry-aware magnetic descriptors based on group-theoretical bispectrum formalisms. Leveraging these ML force fields, LLG simulations faithfully reproduce hallmark non-collinear magnetic orders -- such as the 120ⁱ̧rc and tetrahedral states -- on the triangular lattice, and successfully capture the complex spin textures emerging in the mixed-phase states of a square-lattice double-exchange model under thermal quench. We further discuss a generalized potential theory that extends the BP formalism to incorporate both conservative and nonconservative electronic torques, thereby enabling ML models to learn nonequilibrium exchange fields from computationally demanding microscopic approaches such as nonequilibrium Green's-function techniques. This extension yields quantitatively accurate predictions of voltage-driven domain-wall motion and establishes a foundation for quantum-accurate, multiscale modeling of nonequilibrium spin dynamics and spintronic functionalities.

03

物理信息AI加速铁电垂直NAND保持特性分析：从天级TCAD到秒级替代模型#

Physics-informed AI Accelerated Retention Analysis of Ferroelectric Vertical NAND: From Day-Scale TCAD to Second-Scale Surrogate Model
📚 arXiv👤 Gyujun Jeong (School of Electrical and Computer Engineering, Georgia Institute of Technology, GA, USA), Sungwon Cho (School of Electrical and Computer Engineering, Georgia Institute of Technology, GA, USA), Minji Shon (School of Electrical and Computer Engineering, Georgia Institute of Technology, GA, USA), Namhoon Kim (School of Electrical and Computer Engineering, Georgia Institute of Technology, GA, USA), Woohyun Hwang (Semiconductor Research and Development, Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd, South Korea), Kwangyou Seo (Semiconductor Research and Development, Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd, South Korea), Suhwan Lim (Semiconductor Research and Development, Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd, South Korea), Wanki Kim (Semiconductor Research and Development, Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd, South Korea), Daewon Ha (Semiconductor Research and Development, Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd, South Korea), Prasanna Venkatesan (NVIDIA, Santa Clara, CA, USA), Kihang Youn (NVIDIA, Santa Clara, CA, USA), Ram Cherukuri (NVIDIA, Santa Clara, CA, USA), Yiyi Wang (NVIDIA, Santa Clara, CA, USA), Suman Datta (School of Electrical and Computer Engineering, Georgia Institute of Technology, GA, USA), Asif Khan (School of Electrical and Computer Engineering, Georgia Institute of Technology, GA, USA), Shimeng Yu (School of Electrical and Computer Engineering, Georgia Institute of Technology, GA, USA)📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：针对Fe-VNAND数据保持特性建模耗时难题，该工作创新性地将物理约束嵌入神经算子架构，突破纯数据驱动AI模型的"黑箱"局限，在确保物理一致性的前提下实现TCAD万倍加速，为三维铁电存储器件的快速设计
该工作针对铁电场效应晶体管基垂直NAND（Fe-VNAND）的数据保持特性建模难题，提出基于物理信息神经算子（PINO）的AI替代模型。通过将基本物理原理嵌入学习架构，该模型在预测阈值电压漂移及保持行为时，相比传统TCAD工具实现超10000倍加速，同时保持物理精度，为优化三维Fe-VNAND器件设计提供了高效路径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对铁电场效应晶体管基垂直NAND（Fe-VNAND）的数据保持特性建模难题，提出基于物理信息神经算子（PINO）的AI替代模型。通过将基本物理原理嵌入学习架构，该模型在预测阈值电压漂移及保持行为时，相比传统TCAD工具实现超10000倍加速，同时保持物理精度，为优化三维Fe-VNAND器件设计提供了高效路径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.06881v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Ferroelectric field-effect transistors (FeFET)-based vertical NAND (Fe-VNAND) has emerged as a promising candidate to overcome z-scaling limitations with lower programming voltages. However, the data retention of 3D Fe-VNAND is hindered by the complex interaction between charge detrapping and ferroelectric depolarization. Developing optimized device designs requires exploring an extensive parameter space, but the high computational cost of conventional Technology Computer-Aided Design (TCAD) tools makes such wide-scale optimization impractical. To overcome these simulation barriers, we present a Physics-Informed Neural Operator (PINO)-based AI surrogate model designed for high-efficiency prediction of threshold voltage (Vth) shifts and retention behavior. By embedding fundamental physical principles into the learning architecture, our PINO framework achieves a speedup exceeding 10000x compared to TCAD while maintaining physical accuracy. This study demonstrates the model's effectiveness on a single FeFET configuration, serving as a pathway toward modeling the retention loss mechanisms.

04

从电荷泵浦模拟提取周期多体波函数的拓扑不变量#

Topological invariant of periodic many body wavefunction from charge pumping simulation
📚 arXiv👤 Haoxiang Chen, Yubing Qian, Weiluo Ren, Xiang Li, Ji Chen📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将电荷泵浦模拟与神经网络波函数相结合，发展了计算关联拓扑态陈数的新途径，突破了神经网络描述拓扑多体系统的核心障碍，为探索分数量子陈绝缘体等强关联拓扑物态提供了高效计算工具。
该工作提出基于电荷泵浦过程模拟的拓扑不变量计算方法，通过监测通量插入下极化响应来提取陈数。该方法成功应用于阿贝尔分数量子陈绝缘体，并首次基于神经网络波函数识别了反常复合费米液体态，解决了神经网络波函数在关联拓扑物态应用中的关键瓶颈。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出基于电荷泵浦过程模拟的拓扑不变量计算方法，通过监测通量插入下极化响应来提取陈数。该方法成功应用于阿贝尔分数量子陈绝缘体，并首次基于神经网络波函数识别了反常复合费米液体态，解决了神经网络波函数在关联拓扑物态应用中的关键瓶颈。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.08702v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Many-body topological quantum states host exotic quantum phenomena and lie at the forefront of developing next-generation quantum technologies. Recently emerged neural network wavefunction methods have established themselves as a powerful computational framework for accessing these states, enabling the variational machine learning calculation of the system's ground state wavefunction. However, reliable computation of topological invariants remains an open challenge when the whole deterministic energy spectrum is not available. In this work, we introduce a robust approach to determining topological invariant based on simulating the charge pumping process, by monitoring the response of polarization upon flux insertion. By applying this method, we accurately extract the Chern numbers for Abelian fractional Chern insulators. Our approach also enables the first neural-network-wavefunction-based identification of anomalous composite Fermi liquid states. Our work resolves a key bottleneck in applying neural network wavefunctions to correlated topological matter, and the method proposed is also generally applicable to other many-body approaches, thereby opening up new avenues for future research in this field.

05

自旋取向的光滑重叠：从头算自旋动力学的机器学习交换场#

Smooth Overlap of Spin Orientations: Machine Learning Exchange Fields for Ab-initio Spin Dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Yuqiang Gao, Menno Bokdam, Paul J. Kelly📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将磁矩自由度嵌入机器学习势函数框架，首次实现兼具第一性原理精度与计算效率的非共线自旋动力学模拟。通过旋转对称性约束构建多体交换作用模型，为大规模磁性材料超快动力学与复杂自旋织构演化研究开
该工作将磁自由度引入广泛使用的机器学习高斯近似势，构建了基于原子坐标及其非共线磁矩描述晶体势能面的模型。在自旋方向和大小绝热近似下，模型仅依赖自旋坐标与取向，兼具计算效率与从头算自旋动力学能力。利用磁相互作用旋转对称性，模型可按集团展开精神纳入多体相互作用；以双体形式实现交换相互作用，对bcc Fe非共线自旋排列的总能量和局域场预测与约束非共线密度泛函计算结果高度一致，误差在1 meV/自旋以内。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作将磁自由度引入广泛使用的机器学习高斯近似势，构建了基于原子坐标及其非共线磁矩描述晶体势能面的模型。在自旋方向和大小绝热近似下，模型仅依赖自旋坐标与取向，兼具计算效率与从头算自旋动力学能力。利用磁相互作用旋转对称性，模型可按集团展开精神纳入多体相互作用；以双体形式实现交换相互作用，对bcc Fe非共线自旋排列的总能量和局域场预测与约束非共线密度泛函计算结果高度一致，误差在1 meV/自旋以内。

English Abstract

arXiv:2403.10769v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We add the magnetic degrees of freedom to the widely used Gaussian Approximation Potential of machine learning (ML) and present a model that describes the potential energy surface of a crystal based on the atomic coordinates as well as their noncollinear magnetic moments. Assuming an adiabatic approximation for the spin directions and magnitudes, the ML model depends solely on spin coordinates and orientation, resulting in computational efffciency and enabling ab initio spin dynamics. Leveraging rotational symmetries of magnetic interactions, the ML model can incorporate various magnetic interactions, expanding into two-body, three-body terms, etc., following the spirit of cluster expansion. For simplicity, we implement the ML model with a two-body form for the exchange interaction. Comparing total energies and local fields predicted by the model for noncollinear spin arrangements with explicit results of constrained noncollinear density functional calculations for bcc Fe yields excellent results, within 1 meV/spin for the total energy. Further optimization, including three-body and other terms, is expected to encompass diverse magnetic interactions and enhance the model's accuracy. This will extend the model's applicability to a wide range of materials and facilitate the machine learning ab initio spin dynamics.

03

磁性 / 铁电专题#

聚焦自旋、铁电、多铁与相关功能材料研究。

01

人工亚铁磁体中磁间泵浦抵消耗散#

Inter-magnet pumping counters dissipation in artificial ferrimagnets
📚 Nature Physics👤 Kai Zhang, Y. X. Niu, Peng-Lu Zhao, Tianxu Zhang 等11位作者📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究颠覆了自旋电流输出必然伴随磁耗散增加的传统认知，在人工亚铁磁体中发现输出与耗散的负相关关系，揭示磁间泵浦抵消机制，为突破自旋电子学效率瓶颈、开发超低功耗器件开辟新路径。
产生自旋电流自然会增大其源的磁耗散，而这种不可避免的耗散增加成为实现高效低损耗自旋电子学应用的一大障碍。尽管已付出大量努力来降低耗散，但耗散与自旋电流输出之间的正相关性始终是一道不可逾越的壁垒。在此，我们展示了一种反直觉的现象：人工亚铁磁体的有效阻尼（用于量化其动力学中的耗散）与自旋电流输出呈负相关。换言之，输出越高，耗散越低。为解释这一意外结果，我们提出了一种复杂机制：在存在自旋电流输出的情况下，磁间泵浦可以抵消耗散，将通常的耗散增…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

产生自旋电流自然会增大其源的磁耗散，而这种不可避免的耗散增加成为实现高效低损耗自旋电子学应用的一大障碍。尽管已付出大量努力来降低耗散，但耗散与自旋电流输出之间的正相关性始终是一道不可逾越的壁垒。在此，我们展示了一种反直觉的现象：人工亚铁磁体的有效阻尼（用于量化其动力学中的耗散）与自旋电流输出呈负相关。换言之，输出越高，耗散越低。为解释这一意外结果，我们提出了一种复杂机制：在存在自旋电流输出的情况下，磁间泵浦可以抵消耗散，将通常的耗散增加转变为耗散降低。与此同时，我们观察到自旋电流输出效率的提升，这通过有效自旋混合电导来量化。这些发现修正了当前对自旋动力学的理解，并可为开发高效低损耗自旋电子器件提供有益见解。

English Abstract

Generating a spin current naturally increases the magnetic dissipation of its source, and this unavoidable rise in dissipation presents a substantial obstacle to achieving high-efficiency and low-loss spintronics applications. Despite substantial efforts to reduce dissipation, its positive correlation with spin current output remains an insurmountable barrier. Here we demonstrate a counterintuitive phenomenon: the effective damping of an artificial ferrimagnet, which quantifies the dissipation in its dynamics, is negatively correlated with the spin current output. In other words, higher output equals lower dissipation. To explain this unexpected result, we propose a complex mechanism in which inter-magnet pumping can counter dissipation in the presence of spin current output, transforming the usual increase in dissipation into a decrease. Along with this, we observe an improvement in spin current output efficiency, quantified through the effective spin-mixing conductance. These findings revise the current understanding of spin dynamics and could provide insights useful for developing high-efficiency, low-loss spintronic devices.

02

铁磁量子临界边缘的发散自旋电导率#

Divergent spin conductivity on the verge of ferromagnetic quantum criticality
📚 arXiv👤 Sondre Duna Lundemo, Asle Sudbø📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作建立铁磁量子临界点的自旋输运理论，将超导AL涨落理论推广至自旋通道，揭示临界自旋涨落导致自旋电导率发散，预言了量子临界区incipient自旋超流性，为理解关联电子体系中非常规自旋输运与量子临界
该研究表明，金属趋近铁磁量子临界点时，自旋电导率呈现临界自旋涨落导致的发散涨落修正，这是超导体准电导Aslamazov-Larkin理论的自旋类比。在线性响应和高斯水平处理下，该自旋输运理论满足Ward恒等式且正常态自旋刚度为零，临界增强被诠释为量子临界区incipient自旋超流性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究表明，金属趋近铁磁量子临界点时，自旋电导率呈现临界自旋涨落导致的发散涨落修正，这是超导体准电导Aslamazov-Larkin理论的自旋类比。在线性响应和高斯水平处理下，该自旋输运理论满足Ward恒等式且正常态自旋刚度为零，临界增强被诠释为量子临界区incipient自旋超流性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14286v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We show that the spin conductivity of a metal approaching a ferromagnetic quantum critical point exhibits divergent fluctuation corrections. This effect arises from critical spin fluctuations and constitutes a spin analog of the Aslamazov-Larkin theory of paraconductivity in superconductors. The spin current is derived in linear response within a Gaussian-level treatment of the effective action for a system with easy-plane magnetic anisotropy. We demonstrate the consistency of our spin transport theory by showing that it (i) fulfills the Ward identity and (ii) yields vanishing spin stiffness in the normal state. The critical enhancement of the spin conductivity is interpreted as incipient spin superfluidity in the quantum critical region. This is further supported by an intuitive picture based on the current-loop representation of the easy-plane ferromagnet.

03

具有进动磁化的弹道S/F/S结中的长程自旋极化约瑟夫森效应#

Long-range spin-polarized Josephson effect in ballistic S/F/S junctions with precessing magnetization
📚 arXiv👤 E. S. Andriyakhina, M. Mansouri, M. Breitkreiz, P. W. Brouwer📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示磁化进动可在弹道铁磁结中诱导长程等自旋超导关联，突破传统铁磁层对超导的抑制效应。核心创新在于发现大进动角下的强非正弦电流-相位关系，以及半金属极限下的电流开关效应，为超导自旋电子学器件提
该研究建立了均匀进动磁化产生长程等自旋超导关联的弹道N/F/S和S/F/S结理论。Andreev束缚态的非平衡分布导致大进动角下强非正弦电流-相位关系，推导了部分及完全极化铁磁体的详细结果。在完全极化半金属极限下，磁化进动可将结从亚能隙电流为零的"关"态切换为具有有限Andreev电导和有限约瑟夫森电流的"开"态。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究建立了均匀进动磁化产生长程等自旋超导关联的弹道N/F/S和S/F/S结理论。Andreev束缚态的非平衡分布导致大进动角下强非正弦电流-相位关系，推导了部分及完全极化铁磁体的详细结果。在完全极化半金属极限下，磁化进动可将结从亚能隙电流为零的"关"态切换为具有有限Andreev电导和有限约瑟夫森电流的"开"态。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14390v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a theory of ballistic N/F/S and S/F/S junctions with a uniformly precessing magnetization, which generates long-range equal-spin superconducting correlations [Takahashi et al., Phys. Rev. Lett. 99, 057003 (2007), Houzet, Phys. Rev. Lett. 101, 057009 (2008)]. The non-equilibrium distribution of Andreev bound states leads to a strongly non-sinusoidal current-phase relationship for large precession angles. We derive detailed results for ballistic junctions involving partially and fully polarized ferromagnets. In the fully polarized half-metal limit, the magnetization precession switches the junction from an "off" state with vanishing subgap current to an "on" state with finite Andreev conductance and finite Josephson current.

04

逆自旋霍尔效应导致的约瑟夫森相移与二极管效应#

Josephson phase shift and diode effect due to the inverse spin Hall effect
📚 arXiv👤 Gen Tatara, Yositake Takane, Aurelien Manchon📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作揭示了空间反演对称体系中逆自旋霍尔效应诱导约瑟夫森二极管效应的新机制，突破了传统Rashba体系需破坏结构反演对称性的限制，为设计对称性兼容的超导量子器件提供了理论途径。
本工作理论研究了空间反演不变自旋-轨道耦合在超导-正常金属-超导结中诱导的直接和逆自旋霍尔效应。证明超电流可诱导自旋霍尔效应，在两侧边缘产生相反极化的静态自旋积累；对于逆效应，空间非均匀静态磁场产生反常相移，在高阶谐波存在时导致二极管效应。与Rashba体系不同，该机制无需破坏结构反演对称性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本工作理论研究了空间反演不变自旋-轨道耦合在超导-正常金属-超导结中诱导的直接和逆自旋霍尔效应。证明超电流可诱导自旋霍尔效应，在两侧边缘产生相反极化的静态自旋积累；对于逆效应，空间非均匀静态磁场产生反常相移，在高阶谐波存在时导致二极管效应。与Rashba体系不同，该机制无需破坏结构反演对称性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14521v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We theoretically study the direct and inverse spin Hall effects in a superconductor-normal metal-superconductor junction induced by a spin-orbit interaction that is invariant under spatial inversion. We show that a supercurrent induces a spin Hall effect, leading to a static spin accumulation with opposite polarizations at the two edges, analogous to that in normal conductors. For the inverse effect, we consider a spatially inhomogeneous static magnetic field and show that it induces an anomalous phase shift, which, in the presence of higher harmonics, results in a diode effect. Unlike Rashba systems, the present mechanism does not require broken structural inversion symmetry.

05

Mg-IV-N₂ (IV = Ge, Si, Sn)的红外、拉曼、压电及弹性性质第一性原理研究#

First-principles study of infrared, Raman, piezoelectric and elastic properties of Mg-IV-Ntextsubscript2 (IV = Ge, Si, Sn)
📚 arXiv👤 Sarker Md. Sadman, Walter R. L. Lambrecht📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：基于DFPT系统计算Mg-IV-N₂(IV=Si,Ge,Sn)的晶格动力学性质，建立振动模式对称性分类与光谱活性的对应关系，首次完整给出声子色散、压电及弹性张量，为超宽禁带半导体在光电器件与压电传感中
Mg-IV-N₂(IV=Si, Ge, Sn)化合物为具有多种电子和光电子应用潜力的超宽禁带半导体，共享Pna2₁空间群晶体结构。本工作采用密度泛函微扰理论(DFPT)计算这些材料的振动模式，重点分析布里渊区中心振动模式及其与点群对称性的对应关系（决定拉曼和红外光谱），同时报告全布里渊区声子色散和态密度；还确定了压电张量和弹性柔顺张量。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

Mg-IV-N₂(IV=Si, Ge, Sn)化合物为具有多种电子和光电子应用潜力的超宽禁带半导体，共享Pna2₁空间群晶体结构。本工作采用密度泛函微扰理论(DFPT)计算这些材料的振动模式，重点分析布里渊区中心振动模式及其与点群对称性的对应关系（决定拉曼和红外光谱），同时报告全布里渊区声子色散和态密度；还确定了压电张量和弹性柔顺张量。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14554v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Mg-IV-Ntextsubscript2 compounds with IV=Si, Ge, Sn are ultra-wide band gap semiconductors with various potential electronic and optoelectronic applications. They share the Pna2textsubscript1 space group crystal structure. Here we present Density Function Perturbation Theory (DFPT) calculations of the vibrational modes of these materials. We focus on the vibrational modes at the zone center to establish the relation between vibrational modes and their corresponding point-group symmetries, which determine the Raman and infrared spectra but also report the full Brillouin zone phonon dispersions and density of states. We also determine the piezoelectric tensor and the elastic compliance tensor.

06

扩展Haldane模型中Rashba自旋-轨道耦合对法拉第旋转的影响#

Effect of Rashba spin-orbit coupling on Faraday rotation in an extended Haldane model
📚 arXiv👤 Yuan Fang, Yixiang Wang, Xiaopu Zhang📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示Rashba自旋-轨道耦合对扩展Haldane模型拓扑相中法拉第旋转的双重调控机制：无交换劈裂时可实现超4°大角度且峰位可调；引入交换劈裂后获得宽频近平坦响应。为拓扑量子材料设计高性能磁
本工作系统研究了Rashba自旋-轨道耦合(SOC)对扩展Haldane模型（在原无自旋Haldane框架中引入Rashba SOC和交换劈裂）法拉第旋转(FR)谱的影响。采用Kubo形式计算模型丰富拓扑相图中的FR谱，发现Chern数C=2区域无交换劈裂时FR角可超过4°且峰位可由Rashba SOC调控；引入交换劈裂后则出现宽频范围近平坦FR轮廓，FR峰值随Rashba SOC强度单调增加。Rashba SOC开启额外跃迁通道，其…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本工作系统研究了Rashba自旋-轨道耦合(SOC)对扩展Haldane模型（在原无自旋Haldane框架中引入Rashba SOC和交换劈裂）法拉第旋转(FR)谱的影响。采用Kubo形式计算模型丰富拓扑相图中的FR谱，发现Chern数C=2区域无交换劈裂时FR角可超过4°且峰位可由Rashba SOC调控；引入交换劈裂后则出现宽频范围近平坦FR轮廓，FR峰值随Rashba SOC强度单调增加。Rashba SOC开启额外跃迁通道，其净贡献相长增强FR峰。推导至二次项的低能有效哈密顿量与紧束缚计算结果高度吻合。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14665v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Utilization of Faraday rotation (FR) properties of topological materials offers a promising route toward novel magneto-optical devices. We systematically investigated the effect of Rashba spin-orbit coupling (SOC) on FR spectra in an extended Haldane model, which incorporates Rashba SOC and exchange splitting into the original spinless Haldane framework. Using the Kubo formalism, we calculated the FR spectra across the model's rich topological phase diagram. We found that in the Chern number C=2 region, in the absence of exchange splitting, the FR angle can exceed 4ⁱ̧rc and its peak position is tunable by the Rashba SOC. In contrast, with the inclusion of exchange splitting, a nearly flat FR profile emerges over a broad frequency range, and the FR peak values increase monotonically with the Rashba SOC strength. The Rashba SOC opens additional transition channels, whose net contribution constructively enhances the FR peak. Furthermore, we derived a low-energy effective Hamiltonian expanded up to quadratic terms, the results of which are in good agreement with tight-binding model calculations, thereby validating our numerical results. Our findings suggest that magneto-optical device characteristics can be designed and optimized through Rashba SOC engineering.

07

声子介导的自旋-自旋相互作用#

Phonon mediated spin-spin interactions
📚 arXiv👤 J. Fransson📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文揭示了声子作为磁有序绝缘体中间接交换作用的新媒介，核心创新在于系统阐明了声子对称性对自旋-自旋作用各向异性类型的选择性规则，并首次将破缺反演对称性下的反对称作用与弱铁磁序关联，为理解手性磁性材料提
本工作考虑声子介导的局域磁矩间相互作用作为磁有序绝缘体中长程间接相互作用的机制，证明对称各向异性相互作用对所有类型声子均存在，而反对称各向异性相互作用需要破缺反演对称性，后者或可解释手性化合物(如CuO、CoO)中观测到的弱铁磁有序。该相互作用低温下近乎与温度无关，高温下趋于线性增长；空间上具有随核间距振荡的幂律衰减特性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本工作考虑声子介导的局域磁矩间相互作用作为磁有序绝缘体中长程间接相互作用的机制，证明对称各向异性相互作用对所有类型声子均存在，而反对称各向异性相互作用需要破缺反演对称性，后者或可解释手性化合物(如CuO、CoO)中观测到的弱铁磁有序。该相互作用低温下近乎与温度无关，高温下趋于线性增长；空间上具有随核间距振荡的幂律衰减特性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14731v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Indirect long range interactions between localized magnetic moments are in metals mediated by itinerant electrons. In insulators and semi-conductor, such interactions need to be small, if not negligible, due to the absence of mediating carriers. The existence of magnetically ordered insulators, for instance, metal-oxides, is therefore an everlasting source for proposals of various mechanisms that may support the order. Here, phonon mediated interactions between localized magnetic moments is considered as a mechanism that can provide quantifiable symmetric and anti-symmetric anisotropic spin-spin interactions. It is demonstrated that while a symmetric anisotropic interaction exists for all types of phonons, the existence of anti-symmetric anisotropic interactions requires broken inversion symmetry. The latter mechanism may explain the weak ferromagnetic order observed in chiral, e.g., CuO and CoO compounds. Furthermore, the interaction is nearly independent of the temperature at low temperature while approaches a linear growth at high. Spatially, the interactions have an oscillatory power law decay with the inter-nuclei distance.

08

金红石型RuO₂的非磁-磁性转变#

Nonmagnetic-magnetic Transitions in Rutile RuO2
📚 arXiv👤 Yue-Fei Hou, Jiajun Lu, Xinfeng Chen, Gui-Bin Liu, Ping Zhang📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统认知，发现4d氧化物RuO₂中电子关联效应可诱导多种交错磁相，并首次揭示应变驱动的非磁-磁性量子相变机制。这为理解轻过渡金属氧化物中关联物理提供了新范式，且其能带自旋劈裂特性无需净磁化即
该研究通过密度泛函理论计算揭示了体相RuO₂中关联电子敏感且应变依赖的磁性。在Hubbard参数空间中存在多种具有不同自旋磁矩大小的交错磁相；施加显著改变晶胞体积的适当应变时，基态可在非磁态与具有能带自旋劈裂的磁态之间转变。这些发现阐明了4d电子关联RuO₂的新奇物理，并保留了其自旋电子学应用潜力。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究通过密度泛函理论计算揭示了体相RuO₂中关联电子敏感且应变依赖的磁性。在Hubbard参数空间中存在多种具有不同自旋磁矩大小的交错磁相；施加显著改变晶胞体积的适当应变时，基态可在非磁态与具有能带自旋劈裂的磁态之间转变。这些发现阐明了4d电子关联RuO₂的新奇物理，并保留了其自旋电子学应用潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14764v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Rutile RuO₂ has attracted great interest recently, as its magnetic ground state remains controversial. Experimental studies have reported either nonmagnetic or altermagnetic (AM) ground states in different crystalline samples of RuO₂, highlighting the need for a reasonable explanation to resolve this contradiction. In this study, density functional theory calculations are performed to reveal the correlation-sensitive and strain-dependent magnetism of bulk RuO₂. On one hand, multiple AM phases with different magnitudes of the spin magnetic moment are identified in the Hubbard parameter space for RuO₂. On the other hand, when appropriate strains which significantly change the crystal cell volume are applied, the ground state of RuO₂ can undergo transitions between the nonmagnetic state with no spin splitting and the magnetic states with spin splitting in the band structure. These findings not only demonstrate intriguing physics in 4d-electron-correlated RuO₂, but also retain its potential for spintronic applications.

09

三角晶格易轴自旋-1/2 XXZ反铁磁体中的非平庸三子晶格磁化#

Nontrivial three-sublattice magnetization in the easy-axis spin-1/2 XXZ antiferromagnet on the triangular lattice
📚 arXiv👤 Masahiro Kadosawa, Masaaki Nakamura, Yukinori Ohta, Satoshi Nishimoto📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将螺旋边界条件与DMRG结合，消除了柱几何的空间各向异性，实现了三角晶格量子磁体的精确数值研究。首次给出三子晶格磁矩随各向异性的完整演化图像，为理解阻挫量子磁体的基态对称性破缺机制提供了
该工作采用密度矩阵重正化群结合螺旋边界条件，研究三角晶格易轴自旋-1/2 XXZ反铁磁体的基态磁结构，将有限L×L团簇精确映射到一维链以避免柱几何固有的空间各向异性。从对称破缺的局域磁化轮廓中提取三子晶格磁矩，追踪其随各向异性参数Δ的演化：各向同性点正子晶格磁矩为0.21671；易轴区域在宽Δ范围内保持近零磁化的(2m,-m,-m)结构；1/Δ外推显示Δ→∞时正子晶格磁矩趋近0.41873，负子晶格磁矩幅度趋近0.20832。零场下Y…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用密度矩阵重正化群结合螺旋边界条件，研究三角晶格易轴自旋-1/2 XXZ反铁磁体的基态磁结构，将有限L×L团簇精确映射到一维链以避免柱几何固有的空间各向异性。从对称破缺的局域磁化轮廓中提取三子晶格磁矩，追踪其随各向异性参数Δ的演化：各向同性点正子晶格磁矩为0.21671；易轴区域在宽Δ范围内保持近零磁化的(2m,-m,-m)结构；1/Δ外推显示Δ→∞时正子晶格磁矩趋近0.41873，负子晶格磁矩幅度趋近0.20832。零场下Y态能量优于上下下态。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14767v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate the ground-state magnetic structure of the spin-1/2 XXZ antiferromagnet on the triangular lattice in the easy-axis regime using the density-matrix renormalization group. By applying spiral boundary conditions, we exactly map finite L× L clusters onto one-dimensional chains while avoiding the spatial anisotropy inherent in cylindrical geometries. From symmetry-broken local magnetization profiles, we extract the three-sublattice moments and track their evolution with anisotropy. At the isotropic point, we obtain a positive sublattice moment of 0.21671, consistent with previous numerical estimates. In the easy-axis regime, the ordered moments remain close to a zero-magnetization three-sublattice structure of the form (2m,-m,-m) over a broad range of Δ. Extrapolation in 1/Δ shows that the positive sublattice moment stays well below the classical saturation value 1/2, approaching 0.41873 as Δ→infty, while the magnitude of the negative sublattice moment approaches 0.20832. We further compare the energies of the Y state and the up-down-down state and find that the Y state is favored at zero field. Independent thermodynamic-limit energy calculations, performed without assuming any particular ordered pattern, yield an energy consistent with the Y-state solution. These results show that the easy-axis ground state does not simply cross over to a trivially saturated collinear Ising state, but instead remains a nontrivial three-sublattice ordered state selected from the macroscopically degenerate Ising manifold by quantum fluctuations.

10

光腔中旋量玻色子的平均场相图#

Mean-field phase diagrams of spinor bosons in an optical cavity
📚 arXiv👤 Maksym Prodius, Mateusz Łkacki, Jakub Zakrzewski📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次系统揭示光腔-晶格耦合旋量玻色子的完整平均场相图，发现反铁磁莫特绝缘体、铁磁密度波及多种自旋-密度不平衡超固体等新量子相，阐明了总磁化约束对相选择的决定性作用，为超固体量子模拟与自旋-光子杂
该工作重新审视置于外晶格与光腔中的旋量玻色子的丰富基态可能性，讨论外晶格节点与腔场波腹重合的最简情形。采用巨正则平均场方法，分别处理均匀系统与含谐振捕获势的非均匀系统。均匀情形下，在总磁化约束及无约束两种框架下分析：无约束问题中系统呈现反铁磁莫特绝缘体与铁磁密度波两种磁相，以及三种具有不同自旋-密度不平衡模式的超固体相；零总磁化时仅保留两种超固体相，铁磁密度波相被其他相替代。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作重新审视置于外晶格与光腔中的旋量玻色子的丰富基态可能性，讨论外晶格节点与腔场波腹重合的最简情形。采用巨正则平均场方法，分别处理均匀系统与含谐振捕获势的非均匀系统。均匀情形下，在总磁化约束及无约束两种框架下分析：无约束问题中系统呈现反铁磁莫特绝缘体与铁磁密度波两种磁相，以及三种具有不同自旋-密度不平衡模式的超固体相；零总磁化时仅保留两种超固体相，铁磁密度波相被其他相替代。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14771v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The plethora of possible ground states of spinor bosons placed in an external lattice and a cavity is revisited. We discuss the simplest case when the external lattice nodes coincide with the antinodes of the cavity field. We analyze the problem within the grand-canonical mean-field approach, considering both the homogeneous system and the nonhomogeneous case with a harmonic trapping potential. Due to the spin degree of freedom, in the homogeneous case we treat the system in a twofold manner: we impose the physically relevant total-magnetization constraint, while also discussing the minimization landscape for the full unconstrained problem. In the latter, by combining analytical arguments with numerical calculations based on the Gutzwiller ansatz, we show that the system exhibits two types of magnetic phases: an antiferromagnetic Mott insulator (AFM) and a ferromagnetic density wave (FDW). In addition, three distinct supersolid phases emerge, characterized by different patterns of spin and density imbalances. In case of the zero total magnetization, only two of the three supersolid regimes survive, and the FDW phases are replaced by entangled density waves (EDW). These new ground states present density-modulated superpositions of the underlying spin components of the bosons. Finally, we present the phase diagram of the trapped system, which is directly relevant for future experiments.

11

自旋-谷失配交错磁体实现巨隧穿磁电阻#

Spin-Valley-Mismatched Altermagnet for Giant Tunneling Magnetoresistance
📚 arXiv👤 Kun Yan, Yizhi Hu, Wei-Hua Xiao, Xiaolong Zou, Xiaobin Chen, Wenhui Duan📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统铁磁隧穿结框架，首次将交错磁体的动量依赖自旋极化纳入输运理论，揭示非铁磁材料可实现极端磁电阻效应。理论结合计算证实KV₂Se₂O/MgO结磁电阻逾10⁷%，为无杂散场、高鲁棒性自旋电子器
该研究发展了基于隧穿的自旋输运理论，显式纳入交错磁体输运通道的横向波矢依赖自旋极化，实现非铁磁结构磁电阻效应的定量预测。理论预测交错磁体KV₂Se₂O可达磁电阻极端极限；第一性原理输运计算证实，以金属KV₂Se₂O为电极、少层MgO为势垒层的磁隧穿结在零偏压下磁电阻超过7.57×10⁷%，且对偏压和势垒层厚度具有鲁棒性。该研究为下一代自旋电子器件提供了定量设计原理。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究发展了基于隧穿的自旋输运理论，显式纳入交错磁体输运通道的横向波矢依赖自旋极化，实现非铁磁结构磁电阻效应的定量预测。理论预测交错磁体KV₂Se₂O可达磁电阻极端极限；第一性原理输运计算证实，以金属KV₂Se₂O为电极、少层MgO为势垒层的磁隧穿结在零偏压下磁电阻超过7.57×10⁷%，且对偏压和势垒层厚度具有鲁棒性。该研究为下一代自旋电子器件提供了定量设计原理。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14776v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnet-based heterojunctions have demonstrated magnetoresistive effects in experiments, however, a predictive theoretical model for non-ferromagnetic structures has remained elusive. In this work, we develop a tunneling-based spin-transport theory that explicitly incorporates the transverse-wavevector (bfk_|)-dependent spin polarization of an altermagnet's transport channels, enabling the prediction of giant tunneling magnetoresistance (TMR). Based on the theory, we predict that the altermagnet KV₂Se₂O can reach the extreme limit of magnetoresistance. By performing first-principles transport calculations, we verify that magnetic tunnel junctions using the metallic KV₂Se₂O as the electrodes and few-layer MgO as the spacer exhibit zero-bias magnetoresistance larger than 7.57×10⁷%, which is robust against the bias and thickness of the spacer. Our research provides a quantitative design principle for next-generation spin-electronic devices and establishes KV₂Se₂O/MgO/KV₂Se₂O as a leading candidate material system for room-temperature ultra-high-density non-volatile memory.

12

有源腔-磁子耦合系统中Floquet驱动的弱磁传感#

Weak Magnetic Sensing via Floquet Driving in an Active Cavity Magnon Coupled System
📚 arXiv👤 Fan Yang, Xudong Wang, Lijun Yan, Yue Zhao, Jinwei Rao, Lihui Bai, Shishen Yan📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将有源微波腔与磁子耦合，利用电学可调增益补偿损耗以提升品质因数，并通过Floquet边带探测实现弱磁传感。其意义在于以微型化PCB器件在室温下达到121 pT/√Hz的灵敏度，突破了传统
该工作开发了一种基于有源微波腔与钇铁石榴石(YIG)耦合系统的灵敏交变磁场传感器，采用印刷电路板(PCB)实现。通过引入电学可调增益补偿腔损耗，显著提升了品质因数和信号强度。在耦合系统中，交变磁场诱导Floquet调制，通过驱动特定杂化模式并测量产生的Floquet边带实现弱场探测。该微型化器件室温工作，探测极限达121 pT/√Hz，突破了传统高灵敏度技术对低温运行或庞大装置的需求限制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作开发了一种基于有源微波腔与钇铁石榴石(YIG)耦合系统的灵敏交变磁场传感器，采用印刷电路板(PCB)实现。通过引入电学可调增益补偿腔损耗，显著提升了品质因数和信号强度。在耦合系统中，交变磁场诱导Floquet调制，通过驱动特定杂化模式并测量产生的Floquet边带实现弱场探测。该微型化器件室温工作，探测极限达121 pT/√Hz，突破了传统高灵敏度技术对低温运行或庞大装置的需求限制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14780v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: While significant advancements have been made in weak magnetic field detection, conventional high-sensitivity techniques are often limited by requirements for cryogenic operation or bulky setups. In this work, we develop a sensitive alternating magnetic field sensor based on a coupled system of an active microwave cavity and yttrium iron garnet (YIG), with the components implemented on printed circuit boards (PCBs). By introducing electrically tunable gain to compensate for cavity losses, we substantially improve both the quality factor and the signal intensity. Under the coupled system, Floquet modulation is induced by the alternating magnetic field, allowing for weak field detection by driving a specific hybrid mode and measuring the resulting Floquet sidebands. This miniaturized device operates at room temperature, achieving a detection limit of 121 pT/sqrtHz.

13

基于KV₂Se₂O的交错磁隧穿结中层依赖的量子输运#

Layer-dependent quantum transport in KV2Se2O-based altermagnetic tunnel junctions
📚 arXiv👤 Yue Zhao, Bin Xiao, Jiawei Liu, Hui Zeng, Jun Zhao📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次将交错磁体KV₂Se₂O引入隧穿结体系，揭示SrTiO₃势垒层数奇偶性对量子透射的调控机制，突破了传统铁磁隧穿结受杂散场限制的瓶颈，为高频、高集成度自旋电子器件的物理设计提供了新范式。
该工作设计了KV₂Se₂O/SrTiO₃/KV₂Se₂O交错磁隧穿结(AMTJ)，采用密度泛函理论结合非平衡格林函数方法研究其层依赖量子输运性质与隧穿磁电阻(TMR)。计算结果显示，AMTJ器件的透射率随SrTiO₃半导体层数呈现显著振荡行为，这归因于层数奇偶性决定的界面构型。该研究为利用交错磁体无杂散场、高本征频率等优势开发高密度自旋电子器件提供了新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作设计了KV₂Se₂O/SrTiO₃/KV₂Se₂O交错磁隧穿结(AMTJ)，采用密度泛函理论结合非平衡格林函数方法研究其层依赖量子输运性质与隧穿磁电阻(TMR)。计算结果显示，AMTJ器件的透射率随SrTiO₃半导体层数呈现显著振荡行为，这归因于层数奇偶性决定的界面构型。该研究为利用交错磁体无杂散场、高本征频率等优势开发高密度自旋电子器件提供了新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14817v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic tunnel junction (MTJ) is the key component to enable information access and increasing number of MTJs is integrated to develop high-density spintronic devices. However, continuous miniaturization of the conventional MTJs is hindered by stray magnetic fields. Altermagnets, combining the advantages of both ferromagnets and antiferromagnets, provide a promising alternative to fabricate versatile MTJs with exotic properties, such as giant spin splitting, high intrinsic frequency, and absence of stray fields. Inspired by the altermagnetic metal candidate KV2Se2O reported recently, we design an altermagnetic tunnel junction (AMTJ) based on KV2Se2O/SrTiO3/KV2Se2O. Using density functional theory combined with non-equilibrium Green's function, we investigate the layer-dependent quantum transport properties and the tunneling magnetoresistance (TMR) of such AMTJ device. Our calculated results reveal that the transmission of the AMTJ device exhibits a pronounced oscillation behavior dependent on the number of layers of the SrTiO3 semiconductor, which is attributed to the interface configuration determined by parity of the layer number. In odd-layer devices, the electron-rich O-Se interface exhibits a smooth effective potential and enables transverse momentum (k||) transport channels, leading to enhanced transmission. In contrast, in even-layer devices, the Ti-Se interface presents a steeper effective potential, impeding quantum transport through transverse momentum (k||) channels. A giant TMR of 4.6*10⁷% is predicted to be realized by using a 4-layer SrTiO3. Our findings not only provide physical understanding relevant to the quantum transport in AMTJs, but also unveil that the barrier interface engineering is a strategy to tune the magnetoelectric performance.

14

理解无序系统中的跳跃不连续性#

Understanding jump discontinuity in disordered system
📚 arXiv👤 Anjan Daimari, Diana Thongjaomayum📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在稀释Bethe晶格上获得随机场Ising模型滞后响应的精确解，揭示总磁化跳跃不连续性源于不同配位环境子晶格磁化行为的叠加，为无序系统中临界跳跃结构的微观机制识别提供了严格的理论框架。
该工作研究非平衡零温随机场Ising模型在稀释系统中外场h的滞后响应，以理解序参量在临界点附近跳跃不连续性分裂为多个小跳跃的现象。考虑配位数z=4的Bethe晶格，稀释分数(1-c)的格点，形成z=4,3,2,1,0的多种配位环境。获得了总晶格及各子晶格磁化曲线m(h)的精确解，表明总磁化不连续性源于不同配位位点磁化行为的叠加效应，为临界点附近跳跃结构的识别提供了理论基础。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究非平衡零温随机场Ising模型在稀释系统中外场h的滞后响应，以理解序参量在临界点附近跳跃不连续性分裂为多个小跳跃的现象。考虑配位数z=4的Bethe晶格，稀释分数(1-c)的格点，形成z=4,3,2,1,0的多种配位环境。获得了总晶格及各子晶格磁化曲线m(h)的精确解，表明总磁化不连续性源于不同配位位点磁化行为的叠加效应，为临界点附近跳跃结构的识别提供了理论基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14830v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The response of a complex system to a slow varying external force often displays a jump discontinuity in the order parameter near the critical point. However, this discontinuity is not usually a single jump but rather breaks into smaller jumps which makes it difficult to locate the critical point on approaching its vicinity based only on simulations, in the absence of exact results. Our work is a small effort in understanding these breaks in jump through the hysteretic response of a classical Ising spin system to an external field, h, in the context of a nonequilibrium zero-temperature random field Ising model on dilute systems. We consider a Bethe lattice with coordination number, z = 4, and dilute a fraction (1-c) of the sites. Therefore the lattice now consists of sites with varying z = 4, 3, 2, 1 and possibly few isolated sites (z=0), depending on the concentration c. We obtain the exact solution of the magnetization curve, m(h) vs h, for the entire lattice as well as for each sublattice of different z coordinated sites, m₄₍ₕ₎, m₃₍ₕ₎, m₂₍ₕ₎, m₁₍ₕ₎, m₀₍ₕ₎. The discontinuity in total magnetization is the result of the superposition of the jumps of different z coordinated sites and observed at the same value of external field, hcᵣᵢₜ. The dominant contribution to the jump comes from those sites with higher concentration and larger z. However, the triggering sites responsible for large jumps are mostly zge3. We test this on cubic lattices as well, where exact results are not available. We hope our analysis will help in understanding fluctuations around a jump in numerical simulations as well as experiments.

15

FeRh/MgO(001)中激光产生GHz表面声波波包在反铁磁-铁磁相变上下的传播#

Propagation of laser-generated GHz surface acoustic wavepackets in FeRh/MgO(001) below and above the antiferromagnetic-ferromagnetic phase transition
📚 arXiv👤 Ia. A. Mogunov (Ioffe Institute, St. Petersburg, Russia), A. Yu. Klokov (P.N. Lebedev Physical Institute of the RAS, Moscow, Russia), N. Yu. Frolov (P.N. Lebedev Physical Institute of the RAS, Moscow, Russia), A. I. Sharkov (P.N. Lebedev Physical Institute of the RAS, Moscow, Russia), A. V. Protasov (Institute of Metal Physics of the Ural Branch of the RAS, Ekaterinburg, Russia), G. E. Zhezlyaev (Institute of Metal Physics of the Ural Branch of the RAS, Ekaterinburg, Russia), D. I. Devyaterikov (Institute of Metal Physics of the Ural Branch of the RAS, Ekaterinburg, Russia), V. I. Zverev (Lomonosov Moscow State University, Moscow, Russia), A. M. Kalashnikova (Ioffe Institute, St. Petersburg, Russia)📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地利用FeRh薄膜兼具光声换能与机械负载的双重功能，通过温度与激光通量调控其反铁磁-铁磁相变，实现对GHz表面声波波包激发效率及色散特性的主动控制，为磁声耦合型低能耗自旋电子器件奠定了实验
该工作对Fe₄₉Rh₅₁/MgO(001)系统中激光产生的脉冲表面声波(SAW)进行了全面实验研究。近等原子比FeRh薄膜兼具光声换能器与机械负载功能，其略高于室温的反铁磁-铁磁相变伴随弹性性质的突变，可通过调节样品温度和激光通量控制SAW激发效率和色散特性。采用160 fs激光脉冲激发与时间分辨Sagnac干涉仪探测，评估了关键SAW参数，为磁声耦合的能量高效自旋电子学应用提供了实验基础。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作对Fe₄₉Rh₅₁/MgO(001)系统中激光产生的脉冲表面声波(SAW)进行了全面实验研究。近等原子比FeRh薄膜兼具光声换能器与机械负载功能，其略高于室温的反铁磁-铁磁相变伴随弹性性质的突变，可通过调节样品温度和激光通量控制SAW激发效率和色散特性。采用160 fs激光脉冲激发与时间分辨Sagnac干涉仪探测，评估了关键SAW参数，为磁声耦合的能量高效自旋电子学应用提供了实验基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14845v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetoacoustic devices that harness the strong coupling between acoustic waves and magnons have emerged as a promising platform for energy-efficient spintronics. Laser-generated pulsed surface acoustic waves (SAWs) are particularly attractive for such applications, offering broadband frequency content up to the gigahertz (GHz) range, remote excitation without lithographic patterning, and surface localization for efficient on-chip integration. In this work, we present a comprehensive experimental study of laser-generated SAW pulses in the Fe49Rh51/MgO(001) system. A thin film of the near-equiatomic FeRh alloy serves both as an opto-acoustic transducer and as a mechanical load that modulates SAW propagation. The antiferromagnetic to ferromagnetic phase transition in FeRh, occurring slightly above room temperature, is accompanied by abrupt changes in its elastic properties, enabling controlled modification of the SAW excitation efficiency and dispersion characteristics by tuning the sample temperature and laser fluence. Using 160 fs laser pulses for excitation and time-resolved Sagnac interferometry for detection, we evaluated key SAW parameters, including amplitude, spectral content, phase and group velocities, and their in-plane anisotropy. Particular emphasis is placed on the dispersion relation and its anisotropy, which govern the coherent interaction between phonons and magnons and are determined primarily by the FeRh film.

16

二维Nb₂O₂I₄铁电体中光激发相干声子驱动的可逆相变#

Reversable phase transitions in ferroic two-dimensional Nb2O2I4 through optically excited coherent phonons
📚 arXiv👤 Chuanlin Liu, Dan Liu, Jie Guan, Chao Lian📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：基于rt-TDDFT揭示二维Nb₂O₂I₄中激光脉冲选择性激发相干声子可诱导可逆铁电相变，首次发现三种反铁电相与一种亚铁电相，为超快非易失性光存储器件开辟新路径。
该工作采用实时含时密度泛函理论(rt-TDDFT)研究二维铁电材料Nb₂O₂I₄的光诱导相变。定制激光脉冲可激活特定相干声子模式：Γ点A₁-1和A₁-2模式的非谐原子畸变促进面内极化翻转；精细调控激光参数可激发Y点和Γ点的额外声子模式。由此产生的非平衡原子动力学形成此前未报道的铁电相，包括三个反铁电相和一个亚铁电相。这些光诱导相可通过适当技术恢复至初始铁电态，可控可逆性使其成为下一代电子存储的有力候选材料。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用实时含时密度泛函理论(rt-TDDFT)研究二维铁电材料Nb₂O₂I₄的光诱导相变。定制激光脉冲可激活特定相干声子模式：Γ点A₁-1和A₁-2模式的非谐原子畸变促进面内极化翻转；精细调控激光参数可激发Y点和Γ点的额外声子模式。由此产生的非平衡原子动力学形成此前未报道的铁电相，包括三个反铁电相和一个亚铁电相。这些光诱导相可通过适当技术恢复至初始铁电态，可控可逆性使其成为下一代电子存储的有力候选材料。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14894v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate optically induced phase transitions in the two-dimensional (2D) ferroelectric (FE) material Nb2O2I4 using real-time time-dependent density functional theory (rt-TDDFT). Our results demonstrate that tailored laser pulses can activate specific coherent phonon modes. Specifically, the anharmonic atomic distortions of the A1-1 and A1-2 modes at the Γ-point facilitate the reversal of in-plane polarization. By fine-tuning laser parameters, additional phonon modes at both the Y and Γ points are excited. The resulting nonequilibrium atomic dynamics enable the formation of previously unreported ferroic phases, including three antiferroelectric (AFE) phases and one ferrielectric (FiE) phase. Notably, these optically induced phases can be reverted to the initial FE state using appropriate techniques. This controllable reversibility among multiple ferroic phases positions 2D Nb2O2I4 as a highly promising candidate for next-generation electronic storage applications.

17

MnTe宏观交错磁畴的磁光成像#

Magneto-optical imaging of macroscopic altermagnetic domains in MnTe
📚 arXiv👤 Gakuto Watanabe, Soichiro Yamane, Ryotaro Maki, Atsutoshi Ikeda, Akimitsu Kirikoshi, Junya Otsuki, Takuya Aoyama, Kenya Ohgushi, Shingo Yonezawa📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次利用红外磁光Kerr显微镜实现MnTe体相交错磁畴的直接成像，突破了交错磁体因净磁化消失而难以观测的技术瓶颈。核心创新在于发现两种TRSB畴具有与体磁化无关的大Kerr旋转，揭示了交错磁体独
该工作利用电信红外波长的扫描磁光Kerr效应显微镜，首次实现MnTe体相交错磁畴的可视化。发现两种具有大Kerr旋转的明显时间反演对称破缺(TRSB)畴，其Kerr旋转不随微小体磁化强度标度变化。同时揭示了磁畴对磁或热扰动的可控性与稳定性。该实验室尺度简单光学技术对可移动交错磁畴的首次观测，为交错磁体的未来基础与应用研究奠定了坚实基础。

中文摘要

该工作利用电信红外波长的扫描磁光Kerr效应显微镜，首次实现MnTe体相交错磁畴的可视化。发现两种具有大Kerr旋转的明显时间反演对称破缺(TRSB)畴，其Kerr旋转不随微小体磁化强度标度变化。同时揭示了磁畴对磁或热扰动的可控性与稳定性。该实验室尺度简单光学技术对可移动交错磁畴的首次观测，为交错磁体的未来基础与应用研究奠定了坚实基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14947v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets are a new class of magnets accompanying global time-reversal symmetry breaking (TRSB) without net magnetization. The TRSB results in formation of novel altermagnetic domains. Features of altermagnetic domains, in particular their responses to external stimuli, are essentially important but yet unexplored. Here, we report visualization of bulk altermagnetic domains in MnTe based on scanning magneto-optical Kerr-effect microscopy using telecom infrared wavelength. We found two distinct TRSB domains with large Kerr rotations that do not scale with its tiny bulk magnetization. We also revealed controllability and stability of domains against magnetic or thermal perturbations. Our first observation of altermagnetic domains using a laboratory-scale simple optical technique showing their movable nature provide firm bases for future fundamental and application studies of altermagnets.

18

Fe₃GaTe₂中可控高度取向斯格明子轨道阵列#

Controllable highly oriented skyrmion track array in Fe3GaTe2
📚 arXiv👤 Yunhao Wang, Shiyu Zhu, Chensong Hua, Guojing Hu, Linxuan Li, Senhao Lv, Jianfeng Guo, Jiawei Hu, Runnong Zhou, Zizhao Gong, Chengmin Shen, Zhihai Cheng, Jinan Shi, Wu Zhou, Haitao Yang, Weichao Yu, Jiang Xiao, Hong-Jun Gao📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破了斯格明子随机成核的瓶颈，首创矢量磁场操控技术实现大面积有序STA的精准构筑，为高密度、可寻址的斯格明子赛道存储器件提供了关键材料平台与调控方案，兼具基础物理价值与自旋电子学应用前景。
该工作利用矢量磁场操控技术在铁磁材料Fe₃GaTe₂中实现了大面积、高度取向的斯格明子轨道阵列（STA）的可控生成与调控。通过调节操控参数可精确控制STA的取向、有序度以及斯格明子的类型和密度；微磁学模拟证实了面内磁场和Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用在STA形成中的关键作用。

中文摘要

该工作利用矢量磁场操控技术在铁磁材料Fe₃GaTe₂中实现了大面积、高度取向的斯格明子轨道阵列（STA）的可控生成与调控。通过调节操控参数可精确控制STA的取向、有序度以及斯格明子的类型和密度；微磁学模拟证实了面内磁场和Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用在STA形成中的关键作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15019v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic skyrmions are emerging as promising candidates for next-generation information technologies, while the realization of scalable skyrmion lattices with tailored configurations is essential for advancing fundamental skyrmion physics and developing future applications. Here we achieved the controllable generation and regulation of a large-area, highly oriented skyrmion track array (STA) in ferromagnetic Fe3GaTe2 using a vector magnetic field manipulation technique. The orientation and ordering of STA, along with the types and density of skyrmions, are precisely controlled by modulating parameters during the manipulation. The critical roles of in-plane magnetic fields and Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction in STA generation is further confirmed by micromagnetic simulation. Our findings develop a strategy for engineering large-area and highly-oriented skyrmion configurations, offering a new pathway for the future application of next-generation spintronic and information technologies.

19

外延氧化铪铁电相的甄别#

Disentangling the ferroelectric phases of epitaxial hafnia
📚 arXiv👤 Johanna van Gent Gonzalez, Ewout van der Veer, Yulei Li, Daniel A. Chaney, Beatriz Noheda📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次通过三维倒空间测绘与温度/电学响应的关联分析，实验确证外延氧化铪中存在两种独立铁电相（OIII与R相），并厘清其结构-性能本征特征，为亚10纳米铁电薄膜的相工程与器件设计奠定晶体学基础。
该工作通过同步辐射掠入射衍射对外延氧化铪薄膜进行三维倒空间测绘，结合温度依赖性和电学响应的直接对比，澄清了极性正交OIII相与极性三方R相的争议。实验确凿证实两者为不同相，并揭示了各自的关键特征，为理解亚10纳米厚度下铁电性的晶体对称性依赖功能特性提供了基础。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作通过同步辐射掠入射衍射对外延氧化铪薄膜进行三维倒空间测绘，结合温度依赖性和电学响应的直接对比，澄清了极性正交OIII相与极性三方R相的争议。实验确凿证实两者为不同相，并揭示了各自的关键特征，为理解亚10纳米厚度下铁电性的晶体对称性依赖功能特性提供了基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15081v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Since its discovery, ferroelectric hafnia has been extensively studied due to its CMOS-compatibility and ability to remain polarized at sub-10 nm thicknesses. The ferroelectric behaviour is generally attributed to a polar orthorhombic (OIII) phase. However, a second polar phase with rhombohedral symmetry (R-phase) has also been reported in epitaxial films. The nature of the R-phase remains disputed due to the subtle differences with the OIII-phase when probed by standard thin film characterisation techniques. Given the functional properties of ferroelectrics are crucially determined by the crystal symmetry, resolving this matter is imperative. In this work, we settle the controversy through extensive 3D reciprocal space surveys made possible via synchrotron-based grazing incidence diffraction from epitaxial films of both phases. These experiments, together with direct comparison of their temperature dependence and electrical responses, conclusively establish them as two distinct phases and provide insight into their key characteristics.

20

全原子层沉积垂直互补铁电存储器：超高2Pr>100 μC/cm²与>10¹⁰次高耐久性#

Fully Atomic-Layer-Deposited Vertical Complementary FeRAM with Ultra-High 2Pr > 100 uC/cm2 and High Endurance > 1E10 cycles
📚 arXiv👤 Renhao Xue, Ruizhan Yan, Mansun Chan, Xiwen Liu📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地采用全原子层沉积工艺构建垂直互补铁电存储架构，通过差分极化求和机制突破传统FeRAM的电荷窗口瓶颈，在零额外电场/面积代价下实现超高极化强度与十亿级耐久性的协同提升，为高密度非易失性存储
该工作提出全ALD生长的垂直互补FeRAM（VCF）架构，通过上下堆叠FeRAM单元的互补极化构型，将读出从单层极化响应转换为差分极化求和。该设计在不增加各层开关电场或面积开销的情况下放大有效电荷窗口，实现有效差分极化超过100 μC/cm²，并在10¹⁰次开关循环后保持90 μC/cm²以上而无电击穿。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出全ALD生长的垂直互补FeRAM（VCF）架构，通过上下堆叠FeRAM单元的互补极化构型，将读出从单层极化响应转换为差分极化求和。该设计在不增加各层开关电场或面积开销的情况下放大有效电荷窗口，实现有效差分极化超过100 μC/cm²，并在10¹⁰次开关循环后保持90 μC/cm²以上而无电击穿。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15131v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A limited remanent polarization (Pr) in HfO2-based FeRAM remains a key obstacle to density scaling and reliability, while material and process optimizations offer only incremental improvements. This limitation fundamentally originates from the thickness-constrained switchable polarization and the intrinsic polarization ceiling of HfO2-based ferroelectrics. Here, we propose an all-ALD-grown vertical complementary FeRAM (VCF) architecture, in which the top and bottom stacked FeRAM cells maintain complementary polarization. This complementary dipole configuration converts the readout from a single-layer polarization response into a differential polarization summation, thereby amplifying the effective charge window without increasing the switching field of each individual layer or incurring area overhead. Viewed from top to bottom, an "up-down" polarization pair stores logic '1', whereas a "down-up" pair stores logic '0'. Using a complementary polarization write-read scheme, the VCF achieves an effective differential polarization above 100 uC/cm² and retains above 90 uC/cm² after 1e10 switching cycles without electrical breakdown. Robust retention (longer than 1e4 s at 85 degC) and strong disturb immunity are demonstrated, with an effective differential polarization above 80 uC/cm² under a V/3 scheme after 1e6 disturb pulses. Array-level operation is validated in a 5 x 5 selector-free crosspoint array. The performance enhancement of the VCF arises from the co-optimization of the all-ALD-grown process, device architecture, and operation scheme, enabling high density, a wide memory window, and strong reliability for scalable FeRAM integration.

21

交错磁性超导体中的阿布里科索夫涡旋#

Abrikosov vortices in altermagnetic superconductors
📚 arXiv👤 A. A. Mazanik, F. S. Bergeret📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示交错磁性可诱导超导体中阿布里科索夫涡旋的各向异性形变与电场式矢量响应，为利用奈尔矢量取向调控涡旋动力学、设计非互易超导量子器件提供了新原理。
该研究探讨了具有共线d波交错磁序的超导体在外磁场下的响应，发现磁场穿透产生椭圆形而非圆形阿布里科索夫涡旋，其长轴沿交错磁自旋劈裂最大的晶轴方向。当平行于奈尔矢量的磁场分量反向时，涡旋重新取向至另一晶轴；该效应源于交错磁性诱导的有效质量各向异性，导致含钉扎缺陷的超导薄膜呈现非互易磁化曲线。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究探讨了具有共线d波交错磁序的超导体在外磁场下的响应，发现磁场穿透产生椭圆形而非圆形阿布里科索夫涡旋，其长轴沿交错磁自旋劈裂最大的晶轴方向。当平行于奈尔矢量的磁场分量反向时，涡旋重新取向至另一晶轴；该效应源于交错磁性诱导的有效质量各向异性，导致含钉扎缺陷的超导薄膜呈现非互易磁化曲线。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15204v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study the penetration of an external magnetic field into a superconductor with collinear d-wave altermagnetic order. We demonstrate that instead of circular Abrikosov vortices, the magnetic field generates elliptical vortices with their major axis oriented along one of the crystallographic axis, along which the altermagnetic spin splitting is maximal. Upon reversing the component of the magnetic field parallel to the altermagnetic Néel vector, the vortices reorient towards the other crystallographic axis with maximal spin splitting. We demonstrate that this effect originates from an altermagnetism-induced anisotropy of the effective mass, which is controlled by the coupling between the external magnetic field and the Néel vector. As a consequence, a superconducting film hosting such altermagnetic order and containing pinning defects exhibits nonreciprocal magnetization curves under reversal of the magnetic field parallel to its Néel vector, due to the different vortex--vortex interaction energies for the two field orientations. Our results broaden the understanding of the coexistence of altermagnetism and superconductivity, both in materials hosting these orders intrinsically or in superconductor/altermagnet hybrid structures, and open new experimental avenues for exploring supercurrent vortices in these systems.

22

超顺磁二聚体的取向双稳性与场控开关#

Orientational bistability and field-controlled switching of a superparamagnetic dimer
📚 arXiv👤 James R. N. Tett, Finlay Johnston, Brennan Sprinkle, Alice L. Thorneywork📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示超顺磁二聚体因感生磁矩与永磁矩竞争产生的取向双稳态及场控开关效应，提出通过失配角、分岔场强和取向方差联合标定弱永磁矩的方法，为复杂磁响应胶体体系的设计与表征提供了新范式。
该研究考察了同时具有感生磁矩和有效永磁矩的超顺磁胶体二聚体的取向动力学。在静态均匀磁场中，二聚体在两个优先面内角之间跃迁，形成双峰稳态取向分布；周期反向磁场下观察到从小幅跃迁（Δθ≪π）到每次翻转近π旋转的尖锐场控转变。通过结合失配角、分岔场强和短时取向方差可确定净永磁偶极矩的大小和取向。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究考察了同时具有感生磁矩和有效永磁矩的超顺磁胶体二聚体的取向动力学。在静态均匀磁场中，二聚体在两个优先面内角之间跃迁，形成双峰稳态取向分布；周期反向磁场下观察到从小幅跃迁（Δθ≪π）到每次翻转近π旋转的尖锐场控转变。通过结合失配角、分岔场强和短时取向方差可确定净永磁偶极矩的大小和取向。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15212v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study the orientational dynamics of superparamagnetic colloidal dimers that carry both an induced magnetic moment, proportional to the applied field, and an effective permanent moment. In a static, uniform magnetic field, dimers that are permanently fixed together hop between two preferred in-plane angles, developing a bimodal steady-state orientation distribution. When the same field is periodically reversed, we observe a sharp, field-controlled change in the dynamical response from small hopping events with Δ θłl π to full Δθ approx π rotations on each field flip. We show that both the static bistability and the switching bifurcation can be rationalised by a magnetic response in the dimer that consists of both a strong induced and weak body-fixed component. This leads to a complex orientational energy/potential landscape, with coupled roll-yaw rotations of the dimer responsible for the bistable dynamics. By combining the misorientation between dimer axis and field, bifurcation field strength and short-time orientational variance, we determine the magnitude and orientation of the net permanent dipole, thereby characterising details of the internal magnetic structure of the particles via microscopy.

23

掺杂费米-Hubbard模型中的普适磁性能量标度#

Universal magnetic energy scale in the doped Fermi-Hubbard model
📚 arXiv👤 Radu Andrei, Ivan Morera, Jonathan B. Curtis, Immanuel Bloch, Eugene Demler📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究建立自洽理论框架，首次揭示掺杂莫特绝缘体中反铁磁磁振子-空穴耦合诱导的普适能量标度J*，统一描述静态关联与动力学响应；为理解高温超导赝能隙起源及光晶格量子模拟提供新范式。
该工作基于光晶格中超冷原子实验，证明掺杂莫特绝缘体的静态关联和动力学响应由单一掺杂依赖能量标度J*决定。采用自洽形式理论描述反铁磁磁振子与掺杂空穴的耦合，揭示了有限掺杂下普适磁性能量标度的涌现；该标度设定双磁振子峰在晶格调制谱中的频率位置，并可能与赝能隙现象的起始温度相关（k_BT*=cJ*）。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作基于光晶格中超冷原子实验，证明掺杂莫特绝缘体的静态关联和动力学响应由单一掺杂依赖能量标度J*决定。采用自洽形式理论描述反铁磁磁振子与掺杂空穴的耦合，揭示了有限掺杂下普适磁性能量标度的涌现；该标度设定双磁振子峰在晶格调制谱中的频率位置，并可能与赝能隙现象的起始温度相关（k_BT*=cJ*）。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15234v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic correlations of doped Mott insulators hold the key to the unusual characteristics of many quantum materials. Recent experiments with ultracold atoms in optical lattices have provided new information about the magnetic properties of the Fermi-Hubbard model on a square lattice. We demonstrate that recent measurements indicate that a single doping-dependent energy scale determines both static correlations and dynamical response of these systems. To understand these experimental findings, we employ a self-consistent formalism to describe the coupling between antiferromagnetic magnons and doped holes, and we uncover the emergence of a universal magnetic energy scale at finite doping, which we denote by J^*. We present the single- and two-magnon spectral properties at finite doping and discuss the appearance of a bimagnon peak in lattice-modulation spectroscopy, at frequencies set by J^*. Furthermore, we argue that this same energy scale sets the onset of pseudogap phenomena, leading to the hypothesis k_BT^* = c J^*, with c an order one number. We identify another low-energy scale emerging from our analysis of magnetic excitations, and argue that it controls the stability of Néel order at the lowest temperatures, ultimately driving a transition to an incommensurate spin-density-wave at finite doping. We discuss the relation between this low-energy scale and the nature of fermionic quasiparticles. Our analysis suggests that stability of the commensurate antiferromagentic phase at finite doping can be controlled experimentally by introducing additional quasiparticle broadening via disorder or low-frequency noise.

24

kagome结构RbV₃Sb₅中的赝自旋极化拓扑超导#

Pseudo-spin-polarized topological superconductivity in kagome RbV₃Sb₅
📚 arXiv👤 Xilin Feng, Zi-Ting Sun, Ben-Chuan Lin, K. T. Law📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将赝自旋极化机制引入kagome拓扑超导研究，以畴壁磁滞动力学统一解释AV₃Sb₅家族中反常磁响应与拓扑保护的内在关联，并预言边界马约拉纳平带的可探测性，为拓扑量子计算材料平台的设计提供
该工作提出RbV₃Sb₅是一种具有赝自旋极化库珀对的节点拓扑超导体，以解释近期实验中观测到的超导态磁滞现象。赝自旋极化超导畴类似铁磁畴并诱导磁滞；该节点拓扑超导态在样品边界存在马约拉纳平带模式，可通过隧穿实验探测，为理解kagome超导体AV₃Sb₅家族中交织的对称性破缺相提供了新视角。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出RbV₃Sb₅是一种具有赝自旋极化库珀对的节点拓扑超导体，以解释近期实验中观测到的超导态磁滞现象。赝自旋极化超导畴类似铁磁畴并诱导磁滞；该节点拓扑超导态在样品边界存在马约拉纳平带模式，可通过隧穿实验探测，为理解kagome超导体AV₃Sb₅家族中交织的对称性破缺相提供了新视角。

English Abstract

arXiv:2501.10998v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Kagome superconductors AV₃Sb₅ (A=K, Rb, Cs) have sparked considerable interest due to the presence of several intertwined symmetry-breaking phases within a single material. Interestingly, in a recent experiment, magnetic hysteresis was observed in the superconducting state through magnetoresistance measurements in RbV₃Sb₅ [Nature Comm 17, 1310 (2026)], providing strong evidence of a spontaneous time-reversal symmetry breaking superconducting state. The magnetic hysteresis, combined with crystalline symmetry, imposes strong constraints on the possible pairing symmetries of the superconducting state. In this work, we propose that RbV₃Sb₅ is a nodal topological superconductor with pseudo-spin-polarized Cooper pairs. The pseudo-spin-polarized superconducting domains resemble the properties of ferromagnetic domains and induce hysteresis. Moreover, the nodal topological superconducting state possesses Majorana flat band modes at the sample boundary, which can be detected by tunneling experiments.

25

通过接触工程分离Co₃Sn₂S₂中的本征与畴介导反常霍尔电导#

Separating Intrinsic and Domain-Mediated Anomalous Hall Conductivity in Co₃Sn₂S₂ via Contact Engineering
📚 arXiv👤 Eddy Divin Kenvo Songwa, Shaday Jesus Nobosse Nguemeta, Hodaya Gabber, Renana Aharonof, Dima Cheskis📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地设计深度电流分布接触构型，首次在厚单晶中解耦反常霍尔电导的本征贝里曲率与畴介导贡献，揭示了场致畴态演化对拓扑输运的调控机制，为磁性外尔半金属的量子物态操控与低功耗自旋电子器件设计提供了新
该研究采用促进深度分布电流的接触构型，在约670 μm厚的Co₃Sn₂S₂单晶中区分反常霍尔电导（AHC）的全局贝里曲率贡献与局域畴/纹理相关贡献。发现AHC依赖于场致畴态：高于约0.3 T时单畴或少畴构型呈现动量空间本征贝里曲率响应，约125 K附近因磁化快速下降和磁各向异性减弱发生转变；低场零场冷却多畴态中霍尔响应受畴物理调制，可能存在实空间贝里曲率和中等外禀贡献。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究采用促进深度分布电流的接触构型，在约670 μm厚的Co₃Sn₂S₂单晶中区分反常霍尔电导（AHC）的全局贝里曲率贡献与局域畴/纹理相关贡献。发现AHC依赖于场致畴态：高于约0.3 T时单畴或少畴构型呈现动量空间本征贝里曲率响应，约125 K附近因磁化快速下降和磁各向异性减弱发生转变；低场零场冷却多畴态中霍尔响应受畴物理调制，可能存在实空间贝里曲率和中等外禀贡献。

English Abstract

arXiv:2505.22183v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Decoupling the global Berry-curvature contribution to the anomalous Hall conductivity (AHC) from local domain- and texture-related contributions in bulk ferromagnetic Weyl semimetals is difficult in standard measurements. We address this in a sim670μm-thick Co₃Sn₂S₂ single crystal using a contact architecture that promotes depth-distributed current flow. We find that the AHC depends on the field-enforced domain state: above sim0.3,T, a single- or few-domain configuration reveals a momentum-space intrinsic Berry-curvature response, with a crossover near sim125,K driven by rapid magnetization decrease and reduced magnetic anisotropy. In low-field zero-field-cooled (ZFC) multidomain states, the Hall response is modified by domain physics, with possible real-space Berry curvature and moderate extrinsic contributions. These results demonstrate contact engineering as a practical, non-invasive strategy for separating the momentum-space intrinsic AHC from domain-mediated and extrinsic contributions in thick Weyl semimetal crystals.

26

磁输运的量子几何图景#

Quantum geometric map of magnetotransport
📚 arXiv👤 Longjun Xiang, Jinxiong Jia, Fuming Xu, Jian Wang📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地建立量子几何统一框架，将三种磁输运效应归因于布洛赫电子的双线性响应，首次揭示塞曼量子度规/贝里曲率的多极矩角色，预言了拓扑绝缘体中可观测的自旋诱导平面霍尔效应新现象。
该工作提出统一描述磁非线性霍尔效应（MNHE）、平面霍尔效应（PHE）和普通霍尔效应（OHE）的量子几何图景，揭示这些现象源于布洛赫电子在电磁场中的双线性电荷电流，同时包含自旋塞曼耦合和轨道最小耦合。基于昂萨格倒易关系，证明自旋/轨道诱导的MNHE分别由时间反演偶的塞曼量子度规偶极子和常规量子度规四极子支配，自旋/轨道诱导的PHE分别由时间反演奇的塞曼贝里曲率偶极子和常规贝里曲率四极子主导；并发现OHE包含与量子度规四极子相关的带间贡…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出统一描述磁非线性霍尔效应（MNHE）、平面霍尔效应（PHE）和普通霍尔效应（OHE）的量子几何图景，揭示这些现象源于布洛赫电子在电磁场中的双线性电荷电流，同时包含自旋塞曼耦合和轨道最小耦合。基于昂萨格倒易关系，证明自旋/轨道诱导的MNHE分别由时间反演偶的塞曼量子度规偶极子和常规量子度规四极子支配，自旋/轨道诱导的PHE分别由时间反演奇的塞曼贝里曲率偶极子和常规贝里曲率四极子主导；并发现OHE包含与量子度规四极子相关的带间贡献。据此预言了拓扑绝缘体表面狄拉克锥中未探索的自旋诱导PHE及其台阶状特征。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.02661v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We propose a quantum geometric map for the magnetononlinear Hall effect (MNHE), the planar Hall effect (PHE), and the ordinary Hall effect (OHE). These magnetotransport phenomena originate from the bilinear charge current of Bloch electrons in electromagnetic fields, incorporating both spin Zeeman coupling and orbital minimal coupling to the applied magnetic field. Benchmarked against Onsager reciprocity, we demonstrate that the spin- and orbital-induced MNHEs are governed by the time-reversal-even Zeeman quantum metric dipole and conventional quantum metric quadrupole, respectively; the spin- and orbital-induced PHEs are dominated by the time-reversal-odd Zeeman Berry curvature dipole and conventional Berry curvature quadrupole, respectively. We further show that the OHE contains an interband contribution that is related to the quantum metric quadrupole, contrary to conventional wisdom. Navigated by this map, we study the previously unexplored spin-induced PHE in the surface Dirac cone of topological insulators, where we uncover a step-like PHE. Our work offers a unified quantum geometric framework for understanding magnetotransport experiments.

27

二十面体上经典反铁磁XX模型在磁场诱导下的简并基态#

Magnetic field-induced degenerate ground state in the classical antiferromagnetic XX model on the icosahedron
📚 arXiv👤 N. P. Konstantinidis📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作揭示二十面体经典XX反铁磁体在磁场中呈现两级磁化跳变，首次发现五边形耦合单元可诱导大范围基态简并，为利用几何阻挫设计可控简并态及量子信息载体提供了新范式。
该工作计算了磁场中二十面体顶点自旋的经典反铁磁XX模型基态。磁化曲线在外场作用下出现两个不连续跳变，在第一跳变后的大范围场区基态简并：两个空间反演相关的自旋沿磁场方向排列，其余自旋形成两个五边形磁化单元。简并源于两个五边形的耦合，将三角形作为引入基态简并的相互作用单元。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作计算了磁场中二十面体顶点自旋的经典反铁磁XX模型基态。磁化曲线在外场作用下出现两个不连续跳变，在第一跳变后的大范围场区基态简并：两个空间反演相关的自旋沿磁场方向排列，其余自旋形成两个五边形磁化单元。简并源于两个五边形的耦合，将三角形作为引入基态简并的相互作用单元。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.06004v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The ground state of the classical antiferromagnetic XX model in a magnetic field is calculated for spins mounted on the vertices of the icosahedron. The magnetization is characterized by two discontinuities as a function of the external field. For a wide field range above the first discontinuity the ground state is degenerate, with two spins related by spatial inversion aligned with the field and the rest forming two magnetization units in the form of pentagons. It is shown that the degeneracy originates from the coupling of the two pentagons, which introduces the triangle, associated with ground-state degeneracy, as an interaction unit in the icosahedron. The magnetization discontinuities are shown to evolve first from the coupling of isolated triangles and then from the coupling of the two spins related by spatial inversion.

28

可控无序对钬基烧绿石偶极自旋冰态的影响#

Influence of controlled disorder on the dipolar spin ice state of Ho-based pyrochlores
📚 arXiv👤 A. A. Aczel, B. R. Ortiz, Y. Luo, G. Pokharel, P. M. Sarte, C. dela Cruz, J. Liu, G. Sala, S. D. Wilson, B. A. Frandsen, J. A. M. Paddison📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地通过B位非磁性离子混合实现可控化学无序，系统对比了电荷无序与尺寸无序对烧绿石自旋冰基态的不同影响。发现显著尺寸无序虽削弱阳离子有序并增强局域畸变，却未破坏偶极自旋冰本质，揭示了该量子态对
该工作通过在非磁性B位引入位点混合来研究可控化学无序如何影响钬基烧绿石的偶极自旋冰基态。Ho₂GaSbO₇仅存在电荷无序，而Ho₂ScSbO₇同时存在电荷和显著尺寸无序。中子散射显示后者阳离子有序关联长度降低且局域结构畸变增强，但体热力学测量与磁漫散射表明两种材料均保持偶极自旋冰的特征 signatures。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作通过在非磁性B位引入位点混合来研究可控化学无序如何影响钬基烧绿石的偶极自旋冰基态。Ho₂GaSbO₇仅存在电荷无序，而Ho₂ScSbO₇同时存在电荷和显著尺寸无序。中子散射显示后者阳离子有序关联长度降低且局域结构畸变增强，但体热力学测量与磁漫散射表明两种材料均保持偶极自旋冰的特征 signatures。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.02555v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Pyrochlore magnets of the form R₂B₂O₇, in which rare-earth ions on the R-site form a three-dimensional network of corner-sharing tetrahedra, provide a canonical setting for geometrical frustration. Ho-based pyrochlores host a dipolar spin-ice ground state, characterized by Ising moments constrained by the ice rules and elementary excitations analogous to magnetic monopoles. Here we examine how controlled chemical disorder influences this state by introducing site mixing on the non-magnetic B-site in two compounds. Ho₂GaSbO₇ contains only Ga³⁺/Sb⁵⁺ charge disorder, whereas Ho₂ScSbO₇ exhibits both charge and substantial size disorder arising from the large ionic-radius mismatch between Sc³⁺ and Sb⁵⁺. Although both materials retain the pyrochlore structure, neutron scattering measurements reveal a reduced correlation length for the R/B-site cation ordering and enhanced local structural distortions in Ho₂ScSbO₇. Despite these structural differences, bulk thermodynamic measurements and magnetic diffuse scattering demonstrate that both systems exhibit the defining signatures of a dipolar spin-ice state. Low-energy inelastic neutron spectroscopy further uncovers broad magnetic excitations that develop within the dipolar spin-ice regime, a feature absent in pristine Ho pyrochlores and indicative of disorder-induced splitting of the non-Kramers ground-state doublet. Together, these results show that controlled disorder generates tunable transverse-field-driven quantum fluctuations in Ho-based pyrochlores, although the dipolar spin-ice state is remarkably robust to this disorder.

29

室温二维π电子亚铁磁半金属的预测#

Prediction of room-temperature two-dimensional π-electron half-metallic ferrimagnets
📚 arXiv👤 J. Phillips, J. C. G. Henriques, J. Fernández-Rossier, A. T. Costa📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：提出基于有机自由基分子蜂窝晶格设计室温二维亚铁磁半金属的新策略，突破传统无机磁性材料局限；零净磁矩与完全自旋极化共存，兼具室温磁序稳定性与拓扑量子态可调控性，为有机自旋电子器件及低能耗量子计算提供全新
该工作提出一种获得具有完全自旋极化费米面的导电有机材料的策略：由具有S=1/2的Aza-3-Triangulene和2-Triangulene分子组成蜂窝晶格。密度泛函理论结合Hubbard模型计算表明，该体系为亚铁磁序半金属，单位胞净磁矩为零，分子间交换耦合高达约50 meV，确保室温稳定性。面外磁化时，内禀自旋-轨道耦合打开拓扑能隙，导致低温下量子化反常霍尔电导。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出一种获得具有完全自旋极化费米面的导电有机材料的策略：由具有S=1/2的Aza-3-Triangulene和2-Triangulene分子组成蜂窝晶格。密度泛函理论结合Hubbard模型计算表明，该体系为亚铁磁序半金属，单位胞净磁矩为零，分子间交换耦合高达约50 meV，确保室温稳定性。面外磁化时，内禀自旋-轨道耦合打开拓扑能隙，导致低温下量子化反常霍尔电导。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.17489v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We propose a strategy to obtain conducting organic materials with fully spin-polarized Fermi surface, lying at a singular flat band, with antiferromagnetically coupled magnetic moments that reside in pi-orbitals of nanographenes. We consider a honeycomb crystal whose unit cell combines two different molecules with S=1/2: an Aza-3-Triangulene, a molecule with orbital degeneracy, and a 2-Triangulene. The analyzed system is half-metallic with a ferrimagnetic order, presenting a zero net total magnetic moment per unit cell. We combine density functional theory calculations with a Hubbard model Hamiltonian to compute the magnetic interactions, the bands, the intrinsic Anomalous Hall effect, and the collective spin excitations. We obtain very large intermolecular exchange couplings, in the range of 50 meV, which ensures room temperature stability. When the magnetization is off-plane, intrinsic spin orbit coupling in graphene opens up a topological gap that, despite being very small, leads to a quantized Hall conductance in the tens of mK range. Above 1 Kelvin, the system will behave like a half-metal with fully compensated magnetic moments, thereby combining two characteristics that make it ideal for spintronics applications.

30

魔角转角双层石墨烯中远带对轨道磁化的贡献#

Contribution of remote bands to orbital magnetization in twisted bilayer graphene
📚 arXiv👤 Pinzhuo Li, Kun Jiang, Ziqiang Wang, Jian Kang, Yi Zhang📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作建立规范不变的轨道磁化计算框架，核心创新在于揭示远带对魔角石墨烯轨道磁化的显著贡献，突破传统近带近似；为准确预言陈绝缘态等拓扑关联相提供关键收敛判据，对转角电子学中拓扑量子物态的理论设计具有重要
该工作发展了一个规范不变的框架，在自洽Hartree-Fock近似下计算魔角转角双层石墨烯关联相的轨道磁化Mₒᵣᵦ。基于轨道磁化理论的投影算符形式，直接计算Mₒᵦ和自旋旋转贡献mSR，并证明两者均受到远带的显著贡献，需要仔细收敛。将该方法应用于整数填充关联相，获得了ν=±3处时间反演对称性破缺的陈绝缘态以及其他整数填充竞争相的收敛结果。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作发展了一个规范不变的框架，在自洽Hartree-Fock近似下计算魔角转角双层石墨烯关联相的轨道磁化Mₒᵣᵦ。基于轨道磁化理论的投影算符形式，直接计算Mₒᵦ和自旋旋转贡献mSR，并证明两者均受到远带的显著贡献，需要仔细收敛。将该方法应用于整数填充关联相，获得了ν=±3处时间反演对称性破缺的陈绝缘态以及其他整数填充竞争相的收敛结果。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.03702v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Motivated by recent theoretical and experimental works on orbital magnetization Mₒᵣb for the interacting system, we develop a gauge-invariant framework to compute Mₒᵣb for correlated phases of magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene within self-consistent Hartree-Fock approximation. Based on the projector formulation of the theory of orbital magnetization, we evaluate both Mₒᵣb and the self-rotation contribution mSR directly from the Hartree-Fock Hamiltonian. We demonstrate that, in contrast to topological invariants such as the Chern number, both Mₒᵣb and mSR obtain substantial contributions from remote bands and thus require careful convergence with respect to the number of included remote bands. Applying this approach to correlated phases at integer fillings, we obtain converged Mₒᵣb and mSR for time reversal symmetry broken Chern insulating states at ν=±3 and for competing correlated phases at other integer fillings. Our results establish a systematic and controlled approach for evaluating orbital magnetization in correlated moiré systems and clarify the crucial role of remote bands in determining their magnetic response.

31

LaAlO₃孪晶界处的超高THz场局域#

Ultra-high THz-field-confinement at LaAlO3 twin walls
📚 arXiv👤 Jakob Wetzel, Javier Taboada-Gutiérrez, Matthias Roeper, Felix G. Kaps, Giuliano Esposito, Drini Marchese, Robin Buschbeck, Pauline Lenz, J. Michael Klopf, Hans A. Bechtel, Stephanie N. Gilbert Corder, Jeremie Teyssier, Susanne C. Kehr, Lukas M. Eng, Alexey B. Kuzmenko, Samuel D. Seddon📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究利用LaAlO₃铁弹性孪晶界作为天然纳米光子学平台，突破了传统微纳加工限制，实现亚波长尺度（λ/260）的THz场极端局域与选择性导波，为片上太赫兹器件和超紧凑光谱系统提供了全新材料基础。
该研究表明，畸变钙钛矿LaAlO₃中的铁弹性孪晶界可作为纳米尺度光宽带横向约束与定向传输的天然平台。无需微纳加工，局域于孪晶界的电磁场横向光学尺寸可达自由空间波长的1/260。根据相邻畴取向和频率，孪晶界图案可选择性地集中或排斥电磁能量。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究表明，畸变钙钛矿LaAlO₃中的铁弹性孪晶界可作为纳米尺度光宽带横向约束与定向传输的天然平台。无需微纳加工，局域于孪晶界的电磁场横向光学尺寸可达自由空间波长的1/260。根据相邻畴取向和频率，孪晶界图案可选择性地集中或排斥电磁能量。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.22013v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The control and steering of light at nanometre length scales is crucial for the development of both fundamental science and nanophotonic technologies. Recent advancements have been achieved by exploiting various crystalline anisotropies, allowing for subdiffractional and diffraction-less canalisation of energy. These studies in particular benefit from stacking and twisting of 2D materials, whereas corresponding capabilities of anisotropic bulk crystals are rather unexplored. In this work, we show that ferroelastic twin walls - crystallographically perfect 2D-sheets that separate regions of differently oriented domains - in the distorted perovskite LaAlO3 provide a natural platform for broadband lateral confinement and superb canalisation of light at the nanoscale. Without fabrication processes, the electromagnetic fields localised at such walls exhibit lateral optical sizes up to 260 times smaller than the free-space wavelength. Depending on the adjacent domain orientation and frequency, the twin wall pattern preferentially concentrates or repels the electromagnetic energy, constituting a natural building block towards broadband MIR and THz nanophotonics for polaritonic circuitry.

磁光子纳米结构高波数动力学的选择性超快光激发#

Selective Ultrafast Optical Excitation of High-Wave-Number Dynamics in a Magnetophotonic Nanostructure
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.👤 Daniil V. Konkov, Daria O. Ignatyeva, Anastasia E. Bezmenova, Savelii V. Lutsenko, Natalia S. Kaurova, Petr M. Vetoshko, Alexander L. Kudryashov, Grigory N. Goltsman, and Vladimir I. Belotelov📅 2026-04-17⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究通过设计磁光子纳米结构，利用近场耦合机制将光波转化为局域化的高波数自旋波，从根本上规避了远场光学衍射极限对光磁器件小型化的制约。实验验证了这一选择性激发策略，为超高密度磁存储和超快全光磁开关提供
针对光磁器件中光学开关磁比特最小尺寸和光激发自旋波波长受衍射极限根本限制的问题，提出并实验验证一种专门设计的磁光子纳米结构方法，实现高波数动力学的选择性超快光学激发，突破衍射极限约束。

针对光磁器件中光学开关磁比特最小尺寸和光激发自旋波波长受衍射极限根本限制的问题，提出并实验验证一种专门设计的磁光子纳米结构方法，实现高波数动力学的选择性超快光学激发，突破衍射极限约束。
