笼目金属中的环流序#

Loop-current order in kagome metals
📚 Nature Physics👤 Rafael M. Fernandes, Turan Birol, Mengxing Ye, David Vanderbilt📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该文系统构建了笼目金属中环流序的理论框架，创新性地揭示自旋-轨道耦合诱导自旋密度波、非谐耦合产生电荷密度波的微观机制，为理解非常规磁性及其与超导的交织竞争提供了全新范式，对量子材料设计具有重要指导意义
当相互作用的电子自由度集体产生原子间电流时，会出现环流态，这是一种罕见的磁有序形式，其中自旋不起主要作用。最近在笼目超导体中提出的环流态激发了人们对这种奇异磁性类型的重新关注。我们概述了环流的现象学和对称性，以及笼目材料中相关的微观模型和从头计算方法。随后我们讨论环流有序如何通过自旋-轨道耦合产生自旋密度波，以及在三重旋转对称性系统中如何通过非谐耦合产生电荷密度波。我们简要讨论笼目金属中环流有序的当前研究现状和待解决的挑战，包括其实验…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

当相互作用的电子自由度集体产生原子间电流时，会出现环流态，这是一种罕见的磁有序形式，其中自旋不起主要作用。最近在笼目超导体中提出的环流态激发了人们对这种奇异磁性类型的重新关注。我们概述了环流的现象学和对称性，以及笼目材料中相关的微观模型和从头计算方法。随后我们讨论环流有序如何通过自旋-轨道耦合产生自旋密度波，以及在三重旋转对称性系统中如何通过非谐耦合产生电荷密度波。我们简要讨论笼目金属中环流有序的当前研究现状和待解决的挑战，包括其实验探测以及与超导等其他有序态的相互作用。

English Abstract

Loop-current states arise when interacting electronic degrees of freedom collectively generate interatomic currents, producing a rare form of magnetic order in which spin does not play the primary role. The recent proposal of loop-current states in kagome superconductors has stimulated renewed interest in this exotic type of magnetism. We provide an overview of the phenomenological and symmetry properties of loop currents, as well as relevant microscopic models and ab initio methods in kagome materials. We then discuss how loop-current order generates a spin density wave through spin–orbit coupling and a charge density wave through anharmonic couplings present in systems with three-fold rotational symmetry. We briefly discuss the current status of loop-current order in kagome metals and open challenges, including their experimental detection and interplay with other orders such as superconductivity.

34

量子自旋液体YbZn₂GaO₅中自旋子-规范相互作用导致的标度失效#

Scaling Breakdown as a Signature of Spinon-Gauge Interaction in the Quantum Spin Liquid YbZn₂GaO₅
📚 arXiv👤 Shannon Gould, John Singleton, Rabindranath Bag, Sara Haravifard, Sheng Ran📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在YbZn₂GaO₅中揭示磁化标度失效与自旋子-规范场耦合的深层关联，突破传统量子临界点框架；证明磁化测量可作为探测量子自旋液体低能涌现激发的热力学探针，为识别拓扑量子物态提供新范式。
该研究对量子自旋液体候选材料YbZn₂GaO₅的高场磁化强度进行了系统标度分析。5–70 K范围内磁化曲线呈现类量子临界点的标度不变性，而3 K以下标度破缺且无法通过简单调整临界指数恢复，此温度与μSR观测到的增强自旋关联一致。破缺形式与集体自旋子通过涌现规范场耦合的理论预期相符，表明磁化标度可作为探测低能涌现激发的敏感热力学手段。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究对量子自旋液体候选材料YbZn₂GaO₅的高场磁化强度进行了系统标度分析。5–70 K范围内磁化曲线呈现类量子临界点的标度不变性，而3 K以下标度破缺且无法通过简单调整临界指数恢复，此温度与μSR观测到的增强自旋关联一致。破缺形式与集体自旋子通过涌现规范场耦合的理论预期相符，表明磁化标度可作为探测低能涌现激发的敏感热力学手段。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13087v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Scaling behavior in magnetization has been reported in a wide range of quantum spin liquid (QSL) candidates and is often interpreted as evidence for scale-free spin liquid physics. Here we present a comprehensive scaling analysis of high-field magnetization measurements on the QSL material YbZn₂GaO₅. Between 5 K and 70 K, M(H) displays scale invariance resembling that of a zero-field quantum critical point. Below 3 K, we observe a breakdown of this scale invariance that cannot be recovered by simply changing the critical exponents. This temperature coincides with the onset of enhanced spin correlations observed in μSR measurements. Moreover, the form of the deviation from scaling is consistent with collective spinon excitations coupled via emergent gauge interactions. These results indicate that the breakdown of scaling reflects the emergence of intrinsic low-energy excitations upon entering the QSL regime. Our work clarifies that magnetic scaling is associated with quantum critical fluctuations rather than with the spin liquid phase itself, and establishes magnetization scaling as a sensitive thermodynamic probe of emergent energy scales in QSL systems.

35

无自旋-轨道耦合补偿磁体中的几何自旋简并#

Geometric Spin Degeneracy in Spin-Orbit-Free Compensated Magnets
📚 arXiv👤 Seung Hun Lee, Yuting Qian, Xi Dai, Bohm-Jung Yang📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地提出"几何自旋简并"概念，将无自旋-轨道耦合补偿磁体中的能带简并归因于几何约束而非传统自旋对称性，以零净磁化为核心条件建立统一理论框架，为理解亚铁磁等非常规磁性材料中的能带拓扑提供了新范
该工作为无自旋-轨道耦合的补偿磁体建立了理论框架，指出自旋简并可由几何约束而非自旋对称性保护。零净磁化强度为形式自旋简并能带节点的出现提供了强约束条件，即使不存在常规自旋对称性亦然。该框架适用于弱相互作用区域，为补偿亚铁磁中观测到的非传统自旋简并提供了统一描述，并拓展了对磁性相中能带简并的理解。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作为无自旋-轨道耦合的补偿磁体建立了理论框架，指出自旋简并可由几何约束而非自旋对称性保护。零净磁化强度为形式自旋简并能带节点的出现提供了强约束条件，即使不存在常规自旋对称性亦然。该框架适用于弱相互作用区域，为补偿亚铁磁中观测到的非传统自旋简并提供了统一描述，并拓展了对磁性相中能带简并的理解。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13266v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Compensated magnets with vanishing net magnetization can exhibit both pronounced spin splitting and unconventional band degeneracies. In altermagnets, such degeneracies are enforced by crystal and magnetic symmetries. In compensated ferrimagnets, however, they may arise even in the absence of the corresponding symmetry protection, raising a fundamental question about the origin of spin degeneracy in spin-orbit-free magnetic systems. Here, we develop a theoretical framework for spin-orbit-free compensated magnets in which spin degeneracies are protected by geometric constraints rather than by spin symmetry. We show that zero net magnetization imposes a strong condition for the emergence of nodes formed by formally spin-degenerate bands, even when no conventional spin symmetry is present. Our analysis, applicable in the weak-interaction regime, identifies a general mechanism for spin degeneracy beyond group-theoretical protection. The framework accounts for the unconventional spin degeneracies recently reported in compensated ferrimagnets and provides a unified description of band degeneracies across a broad class of magnetic phases with negligible spin-orbit coupling.

36

零拓扑电荷斯格明子ium晶格中非平凡拓扑磁子态的涌现#

Emergence of Nontrivial Topological Magnon States in Skyrmionium Lattices with Zero Topological Charge
📚 arXiv👤 Xingen Zheng, Ping Tang, Xuejuan Liu, Zhixiong Li, Peng Yan, Hao Wu📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究颠覆性地证明零拓扑电荷斯格明子ium晶格亦可承载非平凡拓扑磁子态，通过"加权磁通"概念建立与Haldane模型的映射，打破拓扑-电荷绑定的传统范式；所提实验方案与热霍尔电导计算为拓扑磁子学器件设
该研究预言了零拓扑电荷斯格明子ium晶格中可出现非平凡拓扑磁子态，并提出了“加权磁通”概念以提供直观物理解释。通过将斯格明子ium晶格映射到Haldane模型，挑战了拓扑磁子态必须依赖非零拓扑电荷的传统认知。研究还提出了两种实验制备方案并计算了诱导的磁子热霍尔电导，为实验验证提供了可观测信号。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究预言了零拓扑电荷斯格明子ium晶格中可出现非平凡拓扑磁子态，并提出了“加权磁通”概念以提供直观物理解释。通过将斯格明子ium晶格映射到Haldane模型，挑战了拓扑磁子态必须依赖非零拓扑电荷的传统认知。研究还提出了两种实验制备方案并计算了诱导的磁子热霍尔电导，为实验验证提供了可观测信号。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13451v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We predict the emergence of nontrivial topological magnon states in the skyrmionium lattice with zero topological charge. We propose the concept of weighted magnetic flux, which provides a clear physical picture for this anomalous phenomenon. We also map the skyrmionium lattice onto the Haldane model, offering an alternative framework for interpreting this. Our findings challenge the conventional wisdom that such states are linked to nonzero topological charge in skyrmion lattices, offering a new perspective in topological magnonics. To facilitate experimental validation, we propose two methods for preparing the skyrmionium lattice and calculate the induced magnon thermal Hall conductivity, which is a key indicator in transport measurements.

37

加压下笼目金属CsCr₃Sb₅的异常低温磁输运#

Anomalous Low-temperature Magnetotransport in Kagome Metal CsCr₃Sb₅ under Pressure
📚 arXiv👤 Zikai Zhou, Wenyan Wang, Deng Hu, Zheyu Wang, Ying Kit Tsui, Tsz Fung Poon, Zhiwei Wang, Swee K. Goh📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在加压条件下系统揭示了CsCr₃Sb₅中T₃电阻率异常以下丰富的磁输运行为，包括非平庸霍尔系数、多带特征及压力增强的类反常霍尔效应。这些发现暗示该体系存在未被认知的额外有序态，为理解笼目金属
该工作对笼目超导体CsCr₃Sb₅进行了系统的加压磁输运实验，以探究约30 K处电阻率鼓包异常（记为T₃）的本质。结果发现T₃以下存在丰富的磁输运特征，包括霍尔系数的非平庸温度依赖、多带特征及压力增强的类反常霍尔效应，这些特征与姐妹化合物CsV₃Sb₅中电荷密度波态的观测相似，暗示CsCr₃Sb₅中可能存在尚未被充分认识的额外有序态。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作对笼目超导体CsCr₃Sb₅进行了系统的加压磁输运实验，以探究约30 K处电阻率鼓包异常（记为T₃）的本质。结果发现T₃以下存在丰富的磁输运特征，包括霍尔系数的非平庸温度依赖、多带特征及压力增强的类反常霍尔效应，这些特征与姐妹化合物CsV₃Sb₅中电荷密度波态的观测相似，暗示CsCr₃Sb₅中可能存在尚未被充分认识的额外有序态。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13553v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: As a unique kagome superconductor displaying clear signatures of strong electronic correlations, CsCr₃Sb₅ has drawn much attention. Its rich temperature-pressure phase diagram features intertwined orders including pressure-induced superconductivity and two density-wave-like phases, making it an outstanding platform to explore the complex coexistence and competition of multiple quantum orders. At around 30 K, which we designate as T₃, a possible anomaly manifesting as a hump in the resistivity has been observed, yet its nature remains largely unexplored due to limited supporting evidence from other probes. Here, we conducted systematic magnetotransport experiments under hydrostatic pressure to investigate the nature of this anomaly. Our results reveal an abundance of intriguing magnetotransport signatures below T₃, including a non-trivial temperature dependence of the Hall coefficient, multi-band characteristics, and pressure-enhanced anomalous-Hall-like effect. These signatures bear resemblance to those observed in the charge-density-wave state in the sister compound CsV₃Sb₅. These findings suggest the possibility of an additional, exotic electronic order in CsCr₃Sb₅, calling for further detailed investigations.

38

应变介导的晶格重构增强Cr2Ge2Te6/WTe2范德华异质双层中的铁磁性#

Strain-Mediated Lattice Reconstruction Enhances Ferromagnetism in Cr2Ge2Te6/WTe2 van der Waals Heterobilayers
📚 arXiv👤 Franz Herling, Mireia Torres-Sala, Dorye L. Esteras, Charlotte Evason, Motomi Aoki, Marcos Rosado, Kapil Gupta, Bernat Mundet, Kai Xu, J. Sebastián Reparaz, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, Dimitre Dimitrov, Vera Marinova, Ivan A. Verzhbitskiy, Goki Eda, José H. Garcia, Stephan Roche, Juan. F. Sierra, Sergio O. Valenzuela📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示了范德华异质界面中应变-电荷协同调控磁性新机制：WTe₂通过近邻效应诱导CGT晶格重构而非化学掺杂，实现居里温度翻倍与矫顽场增强，为无掺杂、全二维自旋电子器件设计提供了界面工程新范式。
该工作研究了全二维Cr2Ge2Te6/WTe2（CGT/WTe2）异质结构，发现WTe2的引入显著增强了CGT的铁磁性。磁输运测量显示，反常霍尔效应稳健，居里温度提高逾两倍，矫顽场大幅增强。界面显微表征证实为化学突变的范德华界面，无显著互扩散。理论计算表明，界面电荷转移使CGT导电，而近邻诱导的晶格畸变增强了交换作用和磁晶各向异性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究了全二维Cr2Ge2Te6/WTe2（CGT/WTe2）异质结构，发现WTe2的引入显著增强了CGT的铁磁性。磁输运测量显示，反常霍尔效应稳健，居里温度提高逾两倍，矫顽场大幅增强。界面显微表征证实为化学突变的范德华界面，无显著互扩散。理论计算表明，界面电荷转移使CGT导电，而近邻诱导的晶格畸变增强了交换作用和磁晶各向异性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13640v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Van der Waals (vdW) heterostructures enable tailored electronic and magnetic phases by stacking atomically thin layers with pristine interfaces. Here, we investigate fully 2D Cr2Ge2Te6/WTe2 heterostructures and identify a strong enhancement of ferromagnetism in Cr2Ge2Te6 (CGT). Magnetotransport measurements across multiple devices with WTe2 thicknesses ranging from monolayer to bulk reveal a robust anomalous Hall effect together with a more than twofold increase of the Curie temperature and substantially enhanced coercive fields. Interface microscopy confirms chemically abrupt vdW interfaces with no detectable interdiffusion, while control experiments rule out processing- or stray-field-induced artifacts. Our experiments and theoretical calculations demonstrate that interfacial charge transfer renders CGT conductive and that proximity-induced lattice distortions in CGT enhance exchange and magnetocrystalline anisotropy. These results establish strain-mediated lattice reconstruction as a strategy for engineering high-temperature magnetic order in 2D heterostructures and clarify that modifications within the magnetic layer itself can govern proximity effects in vdW stacks.

39

h-YbMnO3中Yb基态双重态及其相关的低温奇异行为#

The ground ytterbium doublet in h-YbMnO3 and the related low-temperature peculiarities of the compound
📚 arXiv👤 S. A. Klimin, N. D. Molchanova, N. N. Kuzmin, E. S. Sektarov, Lihua Yin, M. N. Popova📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文核心创新在于建立光学劈裂D0(T)与Mn磁矩动力学的直接关联，提出Yb子系统能量增益驱动相变的新机制，为理解稀土-过渡金属耦合体系中量子相变的微观起源提供了关键实验证据。
作者通过傅里叶变换光谱学详细研究了h-YbMnO3中Yb3+离子的光学f-f跃迁随温度的变化。确定了4b位Yb3+离子基态Kramers双重态的劈裂D0(T)，其在反铁磁转变温度TN = 87 K以下遵循Mn磁矩的动力学行为。利用D0(T)计算了Yb(4b)磁矩的温度行为，与先前中子数据一致，并解释了比热中Schottky反常的起源，提出了一种Yb子系统能量增益起关键作用的相变机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

作者通过傅里叶变换光谱学详细研究了h-YbMnO3中Yb3+离子的光学f-f跃迁随温度的变化。确定了4b位Yb3+离子基态Kramers双重态的劈裂D0(T)，其在反铁磁转变温度TN = 87 K以下遵循Mn磁矩的动力学行为。利用D0(T)计算了Yb(4b)磁矩的温度行为，与先前中子数据一致，并解释了比热中Schottky反常的起源，提出了一种Yb子系统能量增益起关键作用的相变机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13651v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We have performed detailed temperature-dependent study of optical f-f transitions of the Yb3+ ions in h-YbMnO3 by means of Fourier-transform spectroscopy. The splitting of the ground Kramers doublet as a function of temperature, D0(T), for the Yb3+ ion at 4b site was determined. The D0(T) function follows the dynamics of the manganese magnetic moment below TN = 87 K, indicating, that the ytterbium subsystem is magnetized by the magnetic field generated by an ordered manganese subsystem, which is consistent with the results of previous studies. Excitation of the upper component of the split ground doublet plays a significant role in low-temperature dynamics of the h-YbMnO3 crystal. Using the D0(T) function we calculated the temperature behavior of the of the Yb(4b) magnetic moment: it is in clear agreement with the neutron data [Phys. Rev. B 98, 134413, 2018]. The calculated contribution of Yb(4b) to heat capacity definitely explains the origin of the Schottky anomaly in the CP(T) dependence. A scenario for phase transitions in h-YbMnO3 is proposed in which the energy gain in the ytterbium system plays a key role.

40

呈现宽反铁电SmC_A*相与玻璃化六角SmX_A*相的三元液晶混合物#

Ternary liquid crystalline mixture showing broad antiferroelectric smectic C_A* and glassy hexatic smectic X_A* phases
📚 arXiv👤 Aleksandra Deptuch, Anna Drzewicz, Marcin Piwowarczyk, Michał Czerwiński, Mateusz Filipow, Mateusz Pkaczek, Ewa Juszyńska-Gałkazka📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究通过三元组分协同设计策略，突破单一液晶分子难以同时稳定反铁电相与玻璃化六角相的局限，为开发兼具电光双稳态与结构冻结特性的新型光电功能材料提供了实验范式，在显示存储器件与固态光学元件领域具有应用潜
该研究设计了一种三元液晶混合物，旨在获得玻璃态倾斜六角相。通过X射线衍射、电光、介电等多种手段研究了混合物及其纯组分的结构性质。确定了电子密度分布、螺距、选择性光反射等特征，并在SmX_A*相中观察到玻璃化转变。介电谱中未直接观察到主α弛豫，但检测到次级β和γ弛豫过程。结果表明该三元混合物能够稳定宽温区的反铁电SmC_A*相和玻璃化六角SmX_A*相。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究设计了一种三元液晶混合物，旨在获得玻璃态倾斜六角相。通过X射线衍射、电光、介电等多种手段研究了混合物及其纯组分的结构性质。确定了电子密度分布、螺距、选择性光反射等特征，并在SmX_A*相中观察到玻璃化转变。介电谱中未直接观察到主α弛豫，但检测到次级β和γ弛豫过程。结果表明该三元混合物能够稳定宽温区的反铁电SmC_A*相和玻璃化六角SmX_A*相。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13653v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A ternary liquid crystalline mixture was designed to obtain a tilted hexatic smectic phase in the glassy state. Structural, electro-optic, and dielectric properties of the mixture are investigated, and selected measurements are also performed for its pure components. In particular, the electron density profile perpendicular to smectic layers is determined from the X-ray diffraction data and compared to the results of density functional theory calculations both for the mixture and pure components. Comparison of the experimental smectic layer spacing and tilt angle in the mixture allows us to assess whether molecular dimerization is likely to occur. On the mesoscopic scale, the helical pitch is determined in the SmC_A* phase of the mixture, and selective reflection of light is observed under a polarizing microscope in the SmC*, SmC_A*, and SmX_A* phases. The glass transition in the smectic X_A* phase is observed in calorimetric results. At the same time, the dielectric spectra do not directly reveal the primary α-process, although the secondary β- and γ-processes are detected. Overall, the results show that the ternary mixture stabilizes a broad SmC_A* phase and enables vitrification of the hexatic SmX_A* phase, while the structural data suggest a change in the molecular organization between the SmC* and SmC_A* phases.

41

探测自旋纠缠电子的实空间密度#

Probing the real-space density of spin-entangled electrons
📚 arXiv👤 Federico Pisani, Leonie Spitz, Libor Vojáček, Flaviano José dos Santos, Alberto Carta, Bastien Dalla Piazza, Stanislav E. Nikitin, Karl W. Krämer, Björn Fåk, Taro Nakajima, Daichi Ueta, Hiraku Saito, Jian-Rui Soh, Nicola Marzari, Henrik M. Rønnow📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次从INS实验直接重构自旋纠缠电子的实空间密度，突破传统仅获取磁形状因子的局限；通过最小参数化方法揭示金属-配体间磁电子密度转移，并以DFT定量验证，为量子材料中关联电子的空间分布表征开辟新途
该研究以孤立反铁磁海森堡二聚体为范例，展示了如何从非弹性中子散射（INS）强度的动量依赖中提取磁形状因子和磁电子密度分布。作者测量了醋酸铜单水合物中单重态-三重态激发的三维磁结构因子，用最小参数化方法从实验数据推导出自旋纠缠电子的实空间密度以及金属-配体间的磁电子密度转移。密度泛函理论计算定量复现了实验结构因子，为DFT破缺对称自旋密度提供了直接验证。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究以孤立反铁磁海森堡二聚体为范例，展示了如何从非弹性中子散射（INS）强度的动量依赖中提取磁形状因子和磁电子密度分布。作者测量了醋酸铜单水合物中单重态-三重态激发的三维磁结构因子，用最小参数化方法从实验数据推导出自旋纠缠电子的实空间密度以及金属-配体间的磁电子密度转移。密度泛函理论计算定量复现了实验结构因子，为DFT破缺对称自旋密度提供了直接验证。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13751v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: On the textbook example of an isolated antiferromagnetic Heisenberg dimer, we demonstrate that the magnetic form factor and the magnetic electron density distribution can be extracted from the momentum-dependence of the inelastic neutron scattering (INS) intensity of a magnetic excitation. We measure the three-dimensional (3D) magnetic structure factor of the singlet-to-triplet excitation in Cu(II) acetate monohydrate with INS. Using a minimal parametrization of the magnetic electron density, we deduce the real-space density of the spin-entangled electrons and the transfer of magnetic electron density between metal and ligand atoms from the experimental data. Density functional theory (DFT) calculations reproduce the measured structure factor quantitatively, providing a direct validation of DFT broken-symmetry spin densities against full 3D INS data. The quantitative agreement between experiment, parametrization, and theory establishes a robust framework for determining magnetic form factors and the magnetic electron density in a broad range of magnetic materials and demonstrates INS as a probe of the envelope of spatial electronic wavefunctions.

42

Tb₂Zr₂₋ₓTiₓO₇（x = 0, 0.5）中的低温自旋冻结与漫散射磁关联#

Low temperature Spin freezing and Diffuse Magnetic Correlations in Tb₂Zr₂₋ₓTiₓO₇ (x = 0, 0.5)
📚 arXiv👤 Sujata Singh, Leon Carstens, M. Duc Le, R. Klingeler, C. S. Yadav📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究通过Ti掺杂调控Tb₂Zr₂O₇的结构有序度，首次揭示缺陷萤石至烧绿石相变对磁受挫行为的调制作用。发现两种结构均呈现自旋玻璃态而非量子自旋液体，为理解烧绿石体系中结构无序与磁关联的竞争机制提供关
该工作研究了磁受挫烧绿石体系Tb₂Zr₂O₇和Tb₂Zr₁.₅Ti₀.₅O₇的热力学行为与短程磁关联。母体Tb₂Zr₂O₇为缺陷萤石结构，Ti掺杂Zr位后向烧绿石相演化。两种化合物在0.4 K以下均无长程磁序，分别在1.25 K和1.05 K以下出现磁场依赖的自旋冻结。交流磁化率显示20 K以下存在慢自旋弛豫过程。非弹性中子散射观察到低温下的宽漫散射，表明存在短程磁关联，归因于局域结构畸变和持续的自旋涨落。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究了磁受挫烧绿石体系Tb₂Zr₂O₇和Tb₂Zr₁.₅Ti₀.₅O₇的热力学行为与短程磁关联。母体Tb₂Zr₂O₇为缺陷萤石结构，Ti掺杂Zr位后向烧绿石相演化。两种化合物在0.4 K以下均无长程磁序，分别在1.25 K和1.05 K以下出现磁场依赖的自旋冻结。交流磁化率显示20 K以下存在慢自旋弛豫过程。非弹性中子散射观察到低温下的宽漫散射，表明存在短程磁关联，归因于局域结构畸变和持续的自旋涨落。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13864v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Structural disorder in the magnetically frustrated pyrochlore system leads to intriguing magnetic states. We present the thermodynamic behavior and short range magnetic correlations in Tb₂Zr₂O₇ and Tb₂Zr₁.₅Ti₀.₅O₇ compounds. The parent compound Tb₂Zr₂O₇ has defect fluorite structure, which evolves toward the pyrochlore phase on Ti doping at Zr site. There is no long range magnetic order down to 0.4 K, and a magnetic field dependent spin freezing evolves below 1.25 K and 1.05 K for the parent and doped compounds, respectively. The ac susceptibility measurements indicate slow spin relaxation process below 20 K in these compounds. Inelastic neutron scattering reveals broad diffuse scattering, indicative of short range correlations at low temperature, owing to local structural distortions and persistent spin fluctuations. These results suggest a correlated, disorder influenced magnetic state in Tb₂Zr₂O₇, Tb₂Zr₁.₅Ti₀.₅O₇ compounds.

43

镍酸盐超导体中带宽与能带填充的调控#

Controlling the Band Filling and the Band Width in Nickelate Superconductors
📚 arXiv👤 M. Kriener, C. Terakura, A. Kikkawa, Z. Liu, H. Murayama, M. Nakajima, Y. Fujishiro, S. Sasano, R. Ishikawa, N. Shibata, Y. Tokura, Y. Taguchi📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在双层镍酸盐中实现带宽与能带填充的独立调控，揭示八面体倾斜与空穴掺杂对超导相的竞争性调控机制，并发现多种密度波型反常态。该工作为理解镍酸盐超导机理及探索新型高温超导材料提供了关键实验基础，同
该研究利用高压合成和静水压输运技术，系统研究了双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇体系中带宽与能带填充对超导性和其他特征性质的影响。增大NiO₆八面体倾斜度会将超导相推向更高压力，而同时引入空穴掺杂则逆转这一趋势。在非超导态中观察到最多三种不同的反常，可能与密度波形成有关。该工作强调了控制样品质量（如杂相和氧空位）对推进该领域的重要性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用高压合成和静水压输运技术，系统研究了双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇体系中带宽与能带填充对超导性和其他特征性质的影响。增大NiO₆八面体倾斜度会将超导相推向更高压力，而同时引入空穴掺杂则逆转这一趋势。在非超导态中观察到最多三种不同的反常，可能与密度波形成有关。该工作强调了控制样品质量（如杂相和氧空位）对推进该领域的重要性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13875v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The new family of superconducting nickelates centered around La₃Ni₂O₇ possesses attractive features, such as the high transition temperature and the presence of an antiferromagnetic ground state at ambient pressure, suggesting an unconventional pairing mechanism. In the nonsuperconducting state, the possibility of different density-wave orders with opposite pressure dependencies is discussed, whose relationships and microscopic origins are largely unknown. However, sample-quality issues, such as impurity-phase formation or oxygen vacancies, impede the progress in the field. Here, we employ high-pressure synthesis and hydrostatic high-pressure transport techniques to investigate bilayer nickelates with controlled band width and filling, and perform a systematic study on their impact on the superconductivity and other characteristic properties. While increasing the tilting of the NiO₆ octahedra shifts the superconducting phase to higher pressure, simultaneous hole doping reverts this trend. We also observe up to three distinct anomalies in the nonsuperconducting state which are possibly related to density-wave formation.

44

薄膜交替磁性候选材料中的巨室温三阶电输运#

Giant Room-Temperature Third-Order Electrical Transport in a Thin-Film Altermagnet Candidate
📚 arXiv👤 Hongyu Chen, Peixin Qin, Ziang Meng, Guojian Zhao, Kai Chen, Chuanying Xi, Xiaoning Wang, Li Liu, Zhiyuan Duan, Sixu Jiang, Jingyu Li, Xiaoyang Tan, Jinghua Liu, Jianfeng Wang, Huiying Liu, Chengbao Jiang, Zhiqi Liu📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在RuO₂薄膜中实现室温下巨三阶非线性电输运，揭示交替磁序与量子几何量的内在关联。创新在于将交替磁性作为同时调控时间反演奇偶量子几何量的独特平台，为室温量子电子器件及奈尔矢量电学探测开辟新途
该研究在(101)取向的RuO₂薄膜（一种交替磁性候选材料）中观察到巨室温三阶电输运响应，且具有显著的量子几何贡献。交替磁性因自发破缺时间反演-半晶格平移和宇称-时间对称性，同时承载时间反演奇和偶的量子几何量。研究发现三阶霍尔效应与交替磁序密切相关，可作为探测奈尔矢量的有效手段。该工作不仅支持8 nm厚RuO₂薄膜中存在交替磁性，还表明交替磁体是探索量子几何和构建量子电子/自旋器件的多功能平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在(101)取向的RuO₂薄膜（一种交替磁性候选材料）中观察到巨室温三阶电输运响应，且具有显著的量子几何贡献。交替磁性因自发破缺时间反演-半晶格平移和宇称-时间对称性，同时承载时间反演奇和偶的量子几何量。研究发现三阶霍尔效应与交替磁序密切相关，可作为探测奈尔矢量的有效手段。该工作不仅支持8 nm厚RuO₂薄膜中存在交替磁性，还表明交替磁体是探索量子几何和构建量子电子/自旋器件的多功能平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13893v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Quantum geometry, a quantum mechanical quantity comprised of Berry curvature and quantum metric, describes the geometric structure of the electronic bands in solids. The correlation between nontrivial quantum geometry and quantum materials leads to new findings in condensed matter systems. Here we demonstrate that altermagnets, with spontaneously broken time-reversal (T)- half-lattice-translation and parity-time symmetry, host both T-odd and T-even quantum geometric quantities that simultaneously manifest themselves despite the vanishing net magnetization. Consequently, giant room-temperature third-order electrical transport responses with sizable quantum geometric contributions are observed in (101)-oriented RuO2 thin films, an altermagnetic candidate; in particular, the third-order Hall effect is intimately correlated with altermagnetic order and can serve as a promising tool for detecting the Neel vector. Our work not only supports the existence of altermagnetism in 8-nm-thick RuO2 thin films, but also shows altermagnets as a versatile platform for exploring quantum geometry and constructing quantum electronic and spintronic devices.

45

手性覆盖层磁性薄膜中斯格明子的磁显微学#

Magnetic Microscopy of Skyrmions in Magnetic Thin Films with Chiral Overlayers
📚 arXiv👤 Buddhika Hondamuni, Théo Balland, Fabian Kammerbauer, Ashish Moharana, Bindu, Amandeep Singh, Meital Ozeri, Shira Yochelis, Yossi Paltiel, Omkar Dhungel, Zeeshawn Kazi, Kai-Mei C. Fu, Hideyuki Watanabe, Mathias Kläui, Arne Wickenbrock, Nir Bar-Gill, Angela Wittmann, Dmitry Budker📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次将宽场NV磁显微术应用于手性分子/磁性薄膜界面体系，核心创新在于实现了室温下斯格明子磁杂散场的定量、大范围成像，并揭示磁-手性耦合对拓扑自旋纹理的分子级调控规律。研究意义在于为低能耗、分子可
该工作利用宽场氮空位中心磁测量技术，在室温下直接成像了手性分子功能化磁性薄膜中的斯格明子，实现了大范围磁杂散场的定量 mapping。通过像素分辨的光学探测磁共振结合可控磁场，研究者在CoFeB铁磁样品中可重复地成核和探测斯格明子态。实验发现斯格明子的直径、间距和形状存在对映选择性和磁场极性依赖的调制，表明可通过磁-手性耦合实现拓扑自旋纹理的分子级调控。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用宽场氮空位中心磁测量技术，在室温下直接成像了手性分子功能化磁性薄膜中的斯格明子，实现了大范围磁杂散场的定量 mapping。通过像素分辨的光学探测磁共振结合可控磁场，研究者在CoFeB铁磁样品中可重复地成核和探测斯格明子态。实验发现斯格明子的直径、间距和形状存在对映选择性和磁场极性依赖的调制，表明可通过磁-手性耦合实现拓扑自旋纹理的分子级调控。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13931v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Topologically nontrivial magnetic textures such as skyrmions offer promising opportunities for spintronic applications. In recent years, it has been shown that the magnetic properties of layered materials can be affected by depositing chiral molecules on the surface, while the influence of chiral overlayers on skyrmion properties such as their stability and interactions remains largely unexplored. To address this challenge, we employ wide-field nitrogen-vacancy (NV) magnetometry to directly image skyrmions in chiral-molecule-functionalized magnetic thin films, enabling quantitative mapping of magnetic stray fields over extended areas under ambient conditions. Using pixel-resolved optically detected magnetic resonance (ODMR) combined with controlled magnetic fields, we reproducibly nucleate and probe skyrmion states in CoFeB ferromagnetic samples, enabling quantitative investigation of their properties. We find evidence for enantioselective and magnetic-field-polarity-dependent modifications of skyrmion diameter, spacing, and shape, pointing to a possibility of molecular control of topological spin textures via magneto-chiral coupling.

46

耦合单模腔的一维费米子链的拓扑标志量#

Topological markers for a one-dimensional fermionic chain coupled to a single-mode cavity
📚 arXiv👤 Anna Ritz-Zwilling, Olesia Dmytruk📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将高频展开方法应用于腔-SSH链体系，推导出有效相互作用费米子哈密顿量，并系统比较了三种相互作用拓扑标志量的一致性，为腔量子电动力学中拓扑相的表征建立了可靠的理论框架，对光控拓扑量子态的
该研究探讨了Su-Schrieffer-Heeger链与单模光子腔在非共振 regime 下的有效相互作用费米子哈密顿量，利用高频展开方法处理光-物质耦合。针对有限尺寸系统，作者采用三种适用于相互作用系统的拓扑标志量：开边界条件下的边界关联函数、基于单粒子格林函数的缠绕数，以及Resta多体公式定义的体电极化。计算表明缠绕数与电极化方法在相图计算上高度一致，而边界态的存在通过两点关联函数得到验证。该研究为腔修饰拓扑相提供了从有效相互作…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究探讨了Su-Schrieffer-Heeger链与单模光子腔在非共振 regime 下的有效相互作用费米子哈密顿量，利用高频展开方法处理光-物质耦合。针对有限尺寸系统，作者采用三种适用于相互作用系统的拓扑标志量：开边界条件下的边界关联函数、基于单粒子格林函数的缠绕数，以及Resta多体公式定义的体电极化。计算表明缠绕数与电极化方法在相图计算上高度一致，而边界态的存在通过两点关联函数得到验证。该研究为腔修饰拓扑相提供了从有效相互作用电子哈密顿量出发的新视角。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13936v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study a Su-Schrieffer-Heeger chain coupled to a single mode photonic cavity. Considering an off-resonant regime we use the high-frequency expansion in order to obtain an effective fermionic Hamiltonian with cavity-mediated interactions. We characterize the effects of the cavity on topology in a finite size chain by studying three different markers adapted for interacting systems: correlation functions between edges in a chain with open boundary conditions, and a winding number based on the single-particle Green's function and bulk electric polarization via the many-body formula by Resta for a chain with periodic boundary conditions. There is excellent agreement between the winding number and polarization approaches to compute the phase diagram, with the presence of the edge states being confirmed through the calculations of the two-point correlation function. Our approach provides an alternative perspective on cavity-modified topological phases through a study of an effective interacting electronic Hamiltonian and complements methods that treat the full light-matter Hamiltonian directly.

47

旋转磁场通过自旋介导实现单向电荷密度波的滞后开关#

Spin-mediated hysteretic switching of unidirectional charge density waves by rotating magnetic fields
📚 arXiv👤 Zichao Chen, Shiyu Zhu, Kailin Xu, Ruwen Wang, Ningning Wang, Jianfeng Guo, Yunhao Wang, Xianghe Han, Zhongyi Cao, Jianping Sun, Hui Chen, Haitao Yang, Jinguang Cheng, Ziqiang Wang, Hong-Jun Gao📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次实现磁场旋转对单向电荷密度波取向的滞后式可逆调控，突破传统热力学切换局限。通过自旋-晶格耦合建立自旋序-电荷序关联，为拓扑量子材料中电子态的多场调控及非易失存储器件设计提供新范式。
该工作在磁性kagome金属GdTi₃Bi₄中报道了通过面内磁场旋转对单向电荷密度波（CDW）取向进行确定性、滞后性切换的现象。原子分辨谱学揭示了两种3a₀×1a₀的CDW畴Q1和Q2，它们沿两个不同晶向呈60°夹角，并被原子级锐利的畴壁分隔。旋转磁场可驱动这两种CDW构型之间的可逆转变，呈现出具有显著滞后的稳健C₂对称相图。该滞后切换由外场诱导的反铁磁自旋重取向介导，揭示了可通过自旋-晶格耦合调控电荷序的可调能量景观。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在磁性kagome金属GdTi₃Bi₄中报道了通过面内磁场旋转对单向电荷密度波（CDW）取向进行确定性、滞后性切换的现象。原子分辨谱学揭示了两种3a₀×1a₀的CDW畴Q1和Q2，它们沿两个不同晶向呈60°夹角，并被原子级锐利的畴壁分隔。旋转磁场可驱动这两种CDW构型之间的可逆转变，呈现出具有显著滞后的稳健C₂对称相图。该滞后切换由外场诱导的反铁磁自旋重取向介导，揭示了可通过自旋-晶格耦合调控电荷序的可调能量景观。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14002v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Charge density waves (CDWs) are a widespread collective electronic order in quantum materials, furnishing key insights into symmetry breaking and competing phases. However, their dynamic control with external fields remains a pivotal challenge. Here, we report deterministic and hysteretic switching of unidirectional CDW orientation via in-plane magnetic field rotation in magnetic kagome metal GdTi3Bi4. Atomically resolved spectroscopy shows two types of 3a0*1a0 CDW domains, Q1 and Q2 oriented 60 degree apart along two distinct crystallographic directions and separated by atomically sharp domain walls. Rotating the magnetic field drives reversible transitions between these CDW configurations, exhibiting a robust C2-symmetric phase diagram with pronounced hysteresis. This hysteretic switching is mediated by a field-dependent reorientation of underlying antiferromagnetic spins, revealing a tunable energy landscape with stable and metastable states and modulates the electronic charge order via spin-lattice coupling. Our findings not only demonstrate the switching of CDW configurations by in-plane magnetic field but also reveal the mechanism of coupling between CDW and magnetic fields, offering new insights into CDW manipulation and versatile platform for developing a spin-mediated multistate spin-charge coupling memory and programmable quantum devices.

48

kagome金属GdTi₃Bi₄中磁各向异性的可调分岔与双取向反铁磁序#

Tunable bifurcation of magnetic anisotropy and bi-oriented antiferromagnetic order in kagome metal GdTi3Bi4
📚 arXiv👤 Jianfeng Guo, Shiyu Zhu, Runnong Zhou, Ruwen Wang, Yunhao Wang, Jianping Sun, Zhen Zhao, Xiaoli Dong, Jinguang Cheng, Haitao Yang, Jiang Xiao, Hong-Jun Gao📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究在准一维kagome反铁磁体GdTi₃Bi₄中首次发现磁各向异性可调分岔现象，通过实空间磁畴成像揭示隐藏的双取向反铁磁序。矢量磁场调控实现三类磁响应行为的切换，为低维量子磁体中新奇拓扑物态的探测
该工作在准一维kagome反铁磁体GdTi₃Bi₄中观察到磁各向异性的可调分岔和双取向反铁磁序。通过直接可视化两个平台转变过程中的磁畴演化，揭示了沿a轴的显著面内各向异性。温度依赖表征显示在约2 K处发生各向异性分岔转变，a轴各向异性分裂为两个偏离高对称方向7°的特殊取向，暴露出隐藏的双取向面内反铁磁序。矢量磁场调制进一步清晰展示了分岔各向异性的特征，揭示了三类不同的磁响应行为。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在准一维kagome反铁磁体GdTi₃Bi₄中观察到磁各向异性的可调分岔和双取向反铁磁序。通过直接可视化两个平台转变过程中的磁畴演化，揭示了沿a轴的显著面内各向异性。温度依赖表征显示在约2 K处发生各向异性分岔转变，a轴各向异性分裂为两个偏离高对称方向7°的特殊取向，暴露出隐藏的双取向面内反铁磁序。矢量磁场调制进一步清晰展示了分岔各向异性的特征，揭示了三类不同的磁响应行为。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14012v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The novel kagome family RTi3Bi4 (R: rare-earth) offers a unique platform for exploring distinctive physical phenomena such as anisotropy, spin density wave, and anomalous Hall effect. In particular, the magnetic frustration and behavior of magnetic anisotropy in antiferromagnetic (AFM) kagome materials are of great interest for the fundamental studies and hold promise for next-generation device applications. Here, we report a tunable bifurcation of magnetic anisotropic and bi-oriented AFM order observed in the quasi-1D kagome antiferromagnet GdTi3Bi4. The magnetic domain evolutions during two plateau transition processes are directly visualized, unveiling a pronounced in-plane anisotropy along the a-axis. Temperature-dependent characterization reveals a bifurcation transition of anisotropy at approximately 2 K, where the a-axis anisotropy splits into two special orientations, revealing a hidden bi-oriented in-plane AFM order deviating from the high-symmetry direction by 7 degree. More intriguingly, the characteristics of the bifurcated anisotropy are clearly illustrated through vector magnetic field modulation, revealing three distinct in-plane domain phases in the transverse magnetic field phase diagram. Our results not only provide valuable insights into the tunable bifurcation of magnetic anisotropic in GdTi3Bi4, but also pave a novel pathway for AFM spintronics development.

49

强关联驱动零场约瑟夫森二极管效应#

Strong Correlation Drives Zero-Field Josephson Diode Effect
📚 arXiv👤 Yiheng Sun, Zhenyu Zhang, James Jun He📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示强关联效应可在无磁序、零磁场条件下自发产生约瑟夫森二极管效应，突破了传统磁-手性机制对自旋-轨道耦合的依赖；通过微小塞曼场即可实现高效调控，为低能耗、易集成的超导量子器件设计提供了全新物理机
该研究在具有强电子-电子相互作用（Hubbard U项）和奇数电子的约瑟夫森结中发现，强关联可自发破缺时间反演和镜面对称性，形成能量在±φ处具有简并极小值的φ结，从而在无磁序、零磁场下产生约瑟夫森二极管效应。自旋-轨道耦合虽破缺SU(2)对称性，但并不决定二极管极性，这与磁-手性机制形成对比。研究进一步表明，施加微小塞曼场即可实现可控的约瑟夫森二极管效应，且强磁关联显著增强了二极管效率；当磁场诱导能级交叉跃迁时，效应强度达到峰值。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在具有强电子-电子相互作用（Hubbard U项）和奇数电子的约瑟夫森结中发现，强关联可自发破缺时间反演和镜面对称性，形成能量在±φ处具有简并极小值的φ结，从而在无磁序、零磁场下产生约瑟夫森二极管效应。自旋-轨道耦合虽破缺SU(2)对称性，但并不决定二极管极性，这与磁-手性机制形成对比。研究进一步表明，施加微小塞曼场即可实现可控的约瑟夫森二极管效应，且强磁关联显著增强了二极管效率；当磁场诱导能级交叉跃迁时，效应强度达到峰值。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14045v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The supercurrent diode effect (SDE), characterized by unequal critical currents in opposite directions, has been observed with or without magnetic fields, yet mechanisms enabling zero-field SDE without explicit symmetry breaking remain underexplored. Here we investigate a Josephson junction with strong electron-electron interaction modeled by a Hubbard U term and an odd number of electrons. We find that strong correlations induce spontaneous breaking of time-reversal and mirror symmetries, forming a ǎrphi-junction with degenerate energy minima at ±ǎrphi, resulting in zero-field Josephson diode effect (JDE) without magnetic order. Spin-orbit coupling breaks SU(2) symmetry but does not determine diode polarity, contrasting with magneto-chiral mechanisms. We further show that applying a tiny Zeeman field enables controllable JDE with sizable efficiency due to the enhancement by the strong magnetic correlation, and the JDE strength peaks when the field induces a level-crossing transition. These findings establish strong electron correlation as a distinct mechanism for nonreciprocal superconducting transport, broadening the understanding of SDE origins.

50

陈绝缘体中的拓扑路由#

Topological routing in Chern insulators
📚 arXiv👤 Mark J. Ablowitz, Justin T. Cole, Sean D. Nixon📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将两个反向陈数的Haldane模型对接，利用陈绝缘体单向边缘态的手性特征，通过外磁场与频率调控实现能量传输方向的可重构路由。该方案无需精细结构设计，兼具拓扑鲁棒性与动态可调性，为集成光路
该工作提出利用两个反向取向的耦合Haldane型陈绝缘体区域构建能量路由功能。通过调节磁场强度和天线源频率，可实现能量完全向左、完全向右或分流传输；亦可使用双源进行能量导向。该方案有望成为光传输中鲁棒且可重构的组件。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出利用两个反向取向的耦合Haldane型陈绝缘体区域构建能量路由功能。通过调节磁场强度和天线源频率，可实现能量完全向左、完全向右或分流传输；亦可使用双源进行能量导向。该方案有望成为光传输中鲁棒且可重构的组件。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13379v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Chern insulator systems are realizable in numerous physical systems and can support robust nonreciprocal transmission of energy. A routing functionality constructed from two counter-oriented Chern insulator regions, using coupled Haldane type systems is proposed. By adjusting the strength of a magnetic field and the frequency of an antenna source, it possible to steer the flow of energy: completely to the left, completely to the right, or split. Alternatively, two sources can be used to direct the flow of energy. This formulation has the potential to serve as a robust and reconfigurable component in optical transmission.

51

Co/W/Pt多层膜中受限调控的复杂斯格明子织构路径#

Confinement-controlled pathways to complex skyrmionic textures in Co/W/Pt multilayers
📚 arXiv👤 Y. Al Sadi, R. Sbiaa, W. Al Saidi, M. Souier, G. Lezier, O. Marbouh, M. T. Z. Myint, Y. Dusch, S. Al Harthi, A. Talbi, N. Tiercelin, S. N. Piramanayagam📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统磁场/电流调控范式，首次将几何受限确立为手性自旋织构层级演化的普适控制参数，在Pt/Co/W微轨道中实现从迷宫畴到斯格明子袋的连续拓扑态调控，为高密度拓扑磁存储器件的轨道尺寸优化与多态编
该工作以Pt/Co/W多层膜微轨道为体系，揭示了几何受限作为手性自旋织构层级转变路径的鲁棒普适控制参数。随受限增强，延展迷宫畴碎化为孤立斯格明子，继而系统抑制斯格明子对并优先稳定紧致高阶拓扑织构。统计分析与微磁模拟表明，在最窄轨道中斯格明子袋成为主导态。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作以Pt/Co/W多层膜微轨道为体系，揭示了几何受限作为手性自旋织构层级转变路径的鲁棒普适控制参数。随受限增强，延展迷宫畴碎化为孤立斯格明子，继而系统抑制斯格明子对并优先稳定紧致高阶拓扑织构。统计分析与微磁模拟表明，在最窄轨道中斯格明子袋成为主导态。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13497v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Magnetic skyrmions and higher-order topological spin textures offer rich opportunities for multi-level information encoding, yet their deterministic stabilization and transformation under geometric confinement at room temperature remain poorly understood. Here, we demonstrate that geometric confinement acts as a robust and universal control parameter that governs a hierarchical transformation pathway of chiral spin textures in Pt/Co/W multilayer micro-tracks. As the confinement increases, extended labyrinth domains fragment into isolated skyrmions, followed by the systematic suppression of skyrmion pairs and the preferential stabilization of compact higher-order textures. We find that confinement strongly enhances the formation of skyrmioniums via recombination and promotes their subsequent evolution into uniform skyrmion bags by capturing additional skyrmions. Statistical analysis reveals a confinement-driven redistribution of topological populations, with skyrmion bags emerging as the dominant state in the narrowest tracks. Supported by micromagnetic simulations, our results establish geometric confinement as a deterministic selector of complex topological textures and reveal a previously unexplored route for engineering higher-order skyrmionic states at room temperature. These findings provide a scalable materials strategy for multistate skyrmion-based spintronic and memory architectures.

52

超越偶极近似：描述可磁化多体系统的紧致算符形式#

Beyond the dipole approximation: A compact operator form to describe magnetizable many-body systems
📚 arXiv👤 Dirk Romeis📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破经典偶极近似局限，基于完整两体解构建多体全场相互作用解析近似，创新性地将其凝练为类偶极紧致算符，在保持形式简洁的同时精确描述可磁化颗粒的团簇动力学，为软磁材料自组装模拟提供高效可推广的理论工
针对软磁颗粒体系，该研究基于完整两体解发展了一种多体全场相互作用的解析近似方案，并将其表述为一个等价于经典偶极形式的改进算符。该算符以类偶极的简洁形式紧凑高效地描述外磁场中颗粒的团簇形成与分散，实现直接且易于推广。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

针对软磁颗粒体系，该研究基于完整两体解发展了一种多体全场相互作用的解析近似方案，并将其表述为一个等价于经典偶极形式的改进算符。该算符以类偶极的简洁形式紧凑高效地描述外磁场中颗粒的团簇形成与分散，实现直接且易于推广。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13647v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: To describe the interactions in magnetically soft particle systems either numerical full-field methods or dipole models are used. Whereas the former are computationally challenging, simple dipole interactions are largely underestimating the actual forces when particles get closer. Based on the full 2-body solution, an analytic approximation scheme for many-body full-field interactions is developed. The concept is formulated in terms of an improved operator that is equivalent to the classical dipole form. The full interaction operator allows to describe cluster formation and dispersion among particles in applied magnetic fields very compactly and highly efficient. In view of its simple 'dipole-like' form, the implementation is straightforward in many areas where magnetically soft objects are used.

53

工程缺陷诱导磁化动力学中的混合微磁-原子模拟#

Hybrid micromagnetic and atomistic modeling of magnetization dynamics induced by engineered defects
📚 arXiv👤 Nastaran Salehi, Olle Eriksson, Johan Hellsvik, Manuel Pereiro📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首创三维多尺度混合微磁-原子模拟框架，突破传统单尺度模拟局限；通过人工缺陷设计实现磁子干涉、斯格明子拓扑态调控等新奇动力学，为低功耗磁存储与自旋电子器件的缺陷工程优化提供理论工具。
该研究提出了一种三维多尺度混合微磁-原子模拟方法，通过引入两类人工设计的缺陷结构——双缝结构及各向异性可调的原子四面体团簇——来研究自旋波、畴壁和三维斯格明子的动力学行为。双缝结构产生了类似电子波的磁子干涉图样，而局域各向异性扰动则导致畴壁形变、管状/球状结构形成、斯格明子湮灭及呼吸模式等丰富现象，揭示了缺陷诱导各向异性相互作用在磁化动力学中的关键作用。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究提出了一种三维多尺度混合微磁-原子模拟方法，通过引入两类人工设计的缺陷结构——双缝结构及各向异性可调的原子四面体团簇——来研究自旋波、畴壁和三维斯格明子的动力学行为。双缝结构产生了类似电子波的磁子干涉图样，而局域各向异性扰动则导致畴壁形变、管状/球状结构形成、斯格明子湮灭及呼吸模式等丰富现象，揭示了缺陷诱导各向异性相互作用在磁化动力学中的关键作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2504.14019v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: This study presents a 3D version of multiscale approach for investigating magnetization dynamics in multiscale, hybrid micromagnetic-atomistic simulations. The present work introduces engineered discontinuities (i) a double-slit structure, which enables the study of domain wall and spin wave interference, and (ii) a tetrahedron shaped cluster of atoms with tunable anisotropy, which provides insights into how localized anisotropic perturbations influence domain wall pinning and skyrmion stability in fully three-dimensional (3D) hybrid simulations. We considered the dynamics of spin waves, domain walls, as well as 3D skyrmions, in the presence of these defects. The magnonic double-slit experiment demonstrates interference patterns analogous to electronic wave phenomena, offering potential applications in wave-based computing. Additionally, the results reveal the impact of the local anisotropy that leads to distinct transformations, including domain wall deformations, tubular and spherical structures, skyrmion annihilation, and breathing mode. The findings underscore the critical role of defect-induced anisotropic interactions in controlling domain wall motion, skyrmion topology, and spin wave propagation.

54

铱酸盐光学电导率中的自旋极化子特征#

Spin-polaron fingerprints in the optical conductivity of iridates
📚 arXiv👤 Francesco Cassol, Léo Gaspard, Cyril Martins, Michele Casula, Benjamin Lenz📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究颠覆性地以自旋极化子准粒子图像取代Hubbard子带传统解释，揭示5d⁵铱酸盐光学双峰本质；通过动力学平均场理论定量复现实验特征，为理解自旋-轨道耦合莫特绝缘体的光电子谱与输运性质建立统一微观框
该研究挑战了5d⁵铱酸盐材料光学输运中双峰结构源于Hubbard子带的传统解释，提出基于自旋极化子（SP）准粒子的新图像，并将第一峰的主导特征归因于SP。以Ba₂IrO₄和Sr₂IrO₄为范例，结合动力学平均场理论和自洽Born近似，成功复现了角分辨光电子能谱和光学输运测量的非平庸特征；对于Sr₂IrO₄，该SP图像在轻掺杂区依然成立。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究挑战了5d⁵铱酸盐材料光学输运中双峰结构源于Hubbard子带的传统解释，提出基于自旋极化子（SP）准粒子的新图像，并将第一峰的主导特征归因于SP。以Ba₂IrO₄和Sr₂IrO₄为范例，结合动力学平均场理论和自洽Born近似，成功复现了角分辨光电子能谱和光学输运测量的非平庸特征；对于Sr₂IrO₄，该SP图像在轻掺杂区依然成立。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.20337v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: As a consequence of their spin-orbit entangled ground state, many 5d⁵ iridate materials display a peculiar double peak structure in optical transport quantities, such as absorption and conductivity. Their common interpretation is based on the presence of Hubbard subbands in the half-filled jₑff=1/2 manifold. Herein, we challenge this picture, proposing a scenario based on the presence of spin-polaron (SP) quasiparticles, and assigning a dominant SP character to the first peak. We illustrate it by taking the materials Ba₂IrO₄ and Sr₂IrO₄ as paradigmatic examples, which we investigate within the dynamical mean-field theory and the self-consistent Born approximation. Both theories reproduce nontrivial features revealed by angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy and optical transport measurements, supporting our interpretation. In the case of Sr₂IrO₄, we show how the SP scenario survives in the low-doped regime. Similar optical transport fingerprints are expected to be found in the wider class of 5d⁵ iridates and more generally in strongly correlated antiferromagnetic regimes, such as those found in cuprates.

55

平带铁磁体中的假真空衰变：量子几何与手性边缘态的作用#

False Vacuum Decay in Flat-Band Ferromagnets: Role of Quantum Geometry and Chiral Edge States
📚 arXiv👤 Fabian Pichler, Clemens Kuhlenkamp, Michael Knap📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将高能物理中的假真空衰变概念引入平带铁磁体研究，提出非平衡探测方案：利用磁泡成核动力学提取量子几何信息，并通过畴壁演化实时表征手性边缘态，为拓扑量子物态的实验探测开辟新途径。
该工作提出了一种探测平带铁磁体中磁化动力学的非平衡方案，研究了巡游铁磁体和自旋极化陈绝缘体中假真空上磁泡的成核与动态生长。对于铁磁金属，强调非平庸量子几何在磁化动力学中的关键作用，并提供了探测量子度量的途径；对于量子霍尔铁磁体，展示了如何动态获取畴壁边界处手性边缘模式的性质。
阅读原文 ↗

中文摘要

该工作提出了一种探测平带铁磁体中磁化动力学的非平衡方案，研究了巡游铁磁体和自旋极化陈绝缘体中假真空上磁泡的成核与动态生长。对于铁磁金属，强调非平庸量子几何在磁化动力学中的关键作用，并提供了探测量子度量的途径；对于量子霍尔铁磁体，展示了如何动态获取畴壁边界处手性边缘模式的性质。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.13786v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Dynamical control of quantum matter is a challenging, yet promising direction for probing strongly correlated states. Motivated by recent experiments in twisted MoTe₂ that demonstrated optical control of magnetization, we propose a protocol for probing magnetization dynamics in flat-band ferromagnets. We investigate the nucleation and dynamical growth of magnetic bubbles prepared on top of a false vaccum in both itinerant ferromagnets and spin-polarized Chern insulators. For ferromagnetic metals, we emphasize the crucial role of a non-trivial quantum geometry in the magnetization dynamics, which in turn also provides a probe for the quantum metric. Furthermore, for quantum Hall ferromagnets, we show how properties of chiral edge modes localized at domain-wall boundaries can be dynamically accessed. Our work demonstrates the potential for nonequilibrium protocols to control and probe strongly correlated phases, with particular relevance for twisted MoTe₂ and graphene-based flat-band ferromagnets.

56

呼吸Kagome晶格上的偶极手性自旋液体#

A Dipolar Chiral Spin Liquid on the Breathed Kagome Lattice
📚 arXiv👤 Francisco Machado, Sabrina Chern, Michael P. Zaletel, Norman Y. Yao📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示长程偶极相互作用可在呼吸Kagome晶格中稳定手性自旋液体这一新奇量子物态，突破了几何阻挫体系的短程作用范式。结合DMRG计算与绝热制备方案，为里德伯原子及极性分子平台实现拓扑量子模拟与
该研究探讨了在呼吸Kagome晶格上长程偶极反铁磁相互作用如何稳定手性自旋液体。通过大规模密度矩阵重正化群计算支持了这一预言，并绘制了 surrounding 相图，提出了通过局域变化磁场进行绝热制备的路径。研究还识别了每个单胞中的低能自由度，并分析了有限尺寸团簇中的稳定性和特征，为在里德伯原子阵列和超冷极性分子阵列中直接测量手性边缘模式提出了实验可行的方案。

中文摘要

该研究探讨了在呼吸Kagome晶格上长程偶极反铁磁相互作用如何稳定手性自旋液体。通过大规模密度矩阵重正化群计算支持了这一预言，并绘制了 surrounding 相图，提出了通过局域变化磁场进行绝热制备的路径。研究还识别了每个单胞中的低能自由度，并分析了有限尺寸团簇中的稳定性和特征，为在里德伯原子阵列和超冷极性分子阵列中直接测量手性边缘模式提出了实验可行的方案。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.25784v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Continuous control over lattice geometry, when combined with long-range interactions, offers a powerful yet underexplored tool to generate highly frustrated quantum spin systems. By considering long-range dipolar antiferromagnetic interactions on a breathed Kagome lattice, we demonstrate how these tools can be leveraged to stabilize a chiral spin liquid. We support this prediction with large-scale density-matrix renormalization group calculations and explore the surrounding phase diagram, identifying a route to adiabatic preparation via a locally varying magnetic field. At the same time, we identify the relevant low-energy degrees of freedom in each unit cell, providing a complementary language to study the chiral spin liquid. Finally, we carefully analyze its stability and signatures in finite-sized clusters, proposing direct, experimentally viable measurements of the chiral edge mode in both Rydberg atom and ultracold polar molecule arrays.

57

Experimental realisation of topological spin textures in a Penning trap
📚 arXiv👤 Julian Y. Z. Jee, Nihar Makadia, Joseph H. Pham, Gustavo Café de Miranda, Michael J. Biercuk, Athreya Shankar, Robert N. Wolf📅 2026-04-16⚡ 磁性/铁电

研究团队在包含150个以上离子的二维晶体中，确定性制备并实现了单离子分辨的拓扑自旋纹理（如斯格明子）重构。测得斯格明子的绕数为0.99±0.02，平均局域保真度为0.87±0.04。此外，该工作还实现了畴壁态的单离子分辨控制。

页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

研究团队在包含150个以上离子的二维晶体中，确定性制备并实现了单离子分辨的拓扑自旋纹理（如斯格明子）重构。测得斯格明子的绕数为0.99±0.02，平均局域保真度为0.87±0.04。此外，该工作还实现了畴壁态的单离子分辨控制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.13872v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Quantum simulation with controllable many-body platforms offers a powerful route to exploring complex phases and dynamics that are difficult to access in natural materials. Among these, topological spin textures such as skyrmions are central to modern condensed-matter physics and play a key role in chiral quantum many-body systems. Their controlled realisation in large, programmable quantum platforms, however, remains an outstanding challenge. Here, we report deterministic generation and site-resolved reconstruction of topological spin textures in a two-dimensional crystal of more than 150 trapped ions. Using globally applied spin-dependent forces, we generate skyrmion configurations and reconstruct the full vector spin field with single-ion resolution, obtaining a winding number of 0.99±0.02 and a mean local fidelity of 0.87±0.04. In addition, we implement single-ion-resolved control to deterministically prepare domain-wall states, extending our approach to a broader class of non-uniform spin textures. These results establish trapped-ion crystals as a platform for engineering complex spin textures and open the door to exploring topology-dependent nonequilibrium dynamics in long-range interacting quantum systems.

58

Hybrid antiferroelectric–ferroelectric domain walls in noncollinear antipolar oxides

```json { "translation": "反铁电体作为先进功能材料正崭露头角，其独特的电学性质源于电偶极子的反极性排列。在非共线反极性偶极结构的体系中，有望出现额外的功能性和新颖的物理纳米尺度现象。本文展示了K3[Nb3O6∣(BO3)2]中反铁电性的出现如何驱动电偶极矩的非共线有序化，从而导致反铁电与铁电响应的异常杂化。除反铁电体常见的双电滞回线外，利用扫描探针显微镜还观察到显著的压电响应和电学可切换的杂化畴。扫描透射电子…

中文摘要

```json
{
"translation": "反铁电体作为先进功能材料正崭露头角，其独特的电学性质源于电偶极子的反极性排列。在非共线反极性偶极结构的体系中，有望出现额外的功能性和新颖的物理纳米尺度现象。本文展示了K3[Nb3O6∣(BO3)2]中反铁电性的出现如何驱动电偶极矩的非共线有序化，从而导致反铁电与铁电响应的异常杂化。除反铁电体常见的双电滞回线外，利用扫描探针显微镜还观察到显著的压电响应和电学可切换的杂化畴。扫描透射电子显微镜显示，这些畴由原子级锐利、微米尺度的带电畴壁分隔，畴壁处反铁电序与铁电序的不连续性不可分割地纠缠在一起。杂化反铁电-铁电响应预计将在广泛的非共线体系中出现。"
}
```

English Abstract

Antiferroelectrics are emerging as advanced functional materials with unique electric properties enabled by the antipolar arrangement of their electric dipoles. Additional functionalities and novel physical nanoscale phenomena are expected in systems with noncollinear antipolar dipole structures. Here we demonstrate how the onset of antiferroelectricity in K3[Nb3O6∣(BO3)2] drives noncollinear ordering of electric dipole moments, which leads to unusual hybridization of antiferroelectric and ferroelectric responses. Besides the double-hysteresis loop common to antiferroelectrics, a pronounced piezoresponse and electrically switchable hybrid domains are observed using scanning probe microscopy. Scanning transmission electron microscopy shows that the domains are separated by atomically sharp and micrometre-long charged domain walls with inseparably entangled discontinuities in the antiferroelectric and ferroelectric orders. Hybrid antiferroelectric–ferroelectric responses are expected in a wide range of noncollinear systems.

59

薄膜交错磁候选材料中的巨室温三阶电输运#

Giant room-temperature third-order electrical transport in a thin-film altermagnet candidate
📚 Nature Nanotechnology👤 Hongyu Chen, Peixin Qin, Ziang Meng, Guojian Zhao 等17位作者📅 2026-04-15⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：交错磁体RuO₂薄膜中同时存在时间反演奇偶量子几何量，首次观测到巨室温三阶电输运响应，其中三阶霍尔效应与奈尔矢量直接关联，为交错磁性探测及量子几何电子器件开辟新途径。
量子几何是由贝里曲率和量子度规构成的量子力学量，描述固体中电子能带的几何结构。非平庸量子几何与量子材料之间的关联催生了凝聚态系统中的新发现。本文证明，具有自发破缺时间反演（(T)）-半晶格平移对称性和宇称-时间对称性的交错磁体，尽管净磁化强度为零，却同时存在(T)奇和(T)偶的量子几何量。因此，我们在交错磁性候选材料(101)取向的RuO₂薄膜中观测到…
