Microscopic model for the ground state, 1/3 plateau and excitations of γ-Mn₃₍PO₄₎₂
📚 arXiv👤 P. A. Maksimov, L. V. Shvanskaya, O. S. Volkova, A. N. Vasiliev📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次为γ-Mn₃(PO₄)₂建立包含双二次耦合与单离子各向异性的微观自旋模型，突破了传统海森堡模型对高自旋三聚体晶格的描述局限。其意义在于揭示了1/3磁化平台的多重相变机制，为探索强关联量子磁性
该工作为反铁磁化合物γ-Mn₃(PO₄)₂提出了磁性模型，该化合物因Mn²⁺离子(S=5/2)的三聚体晶格结构而呈现1/3磁化平台。通过拟合磁化数据得到交换哈密顿量，并证明磁模型中必须同时包含双二次耦合与单离子各向异性才能解释磁化率数据中的多重相变。计算的磁激发谱与低温比热实验数据一致。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作为反铁磁化合物γ-Mn₃(PO₄)₂提出了磁性模型，该化合物因Mn²⁺离子(S=5/2)的三聚体晶格结构而呈现1/3磁化平台。通过拟合磁化数据得到交换哈密顿量，并证明磁模型中必须同时包含双二次耦合与单离子各向异性才能解释磁化率数据中的多重相变。计算的磁激发谱与低温比热实验数据一致。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.10576v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a magnetic model for an antiferromagnetic compound γ-Mn₃₍PO₄₎₂, which was previously shown to exhibit a 1/3 magnetization plateau due to the trimer-based structure of the lattice of magnetic Mn²⁺ ions with S=5/2. An exchange Hamiltonian that yields observed field transitions is obtained from fitting magnetization data. It is shown that both biquadratic coupling and single-ion anisotropy are necessary to be present in the magnetic model to explain multiple phase transitions in the magnetic susceptibility data. The calculated magnetic spectrum is in agreement with the low-temperature specific heat data.

101

具有巨大自旋劈裂的二维自旋反铁电交错磁体：从模型到材料实现#

Two-Dimensional Spin-Antiferroelectric Altermagnets with Giant Spin Splitting: From Model to Material Realization
📚 arXiv👤 Zesen Fu, Aolin Li, Wenzhe Zhou, Fangping Ouyang, Fawei Zheng, Yugui Yao📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将自旋反铁电概念拓展至二维交错磁体体系，建立了栅压调控自旋极化的通用设计原则。预言的(CoCl)₂Te家族材料实现了电场角度/极性双重调控的自旋流切换机制，为低功耗、非易失性自旋电子器件
该工作基于新近提出的自旋反铁电(spin-AFE)概念，构建了一类二维多铁交错磁体(2D spin-AFEAMs)，可通过栅压电场调控自旋极化。作者提出了构建具有大本征自旋劈裂的2D spin-AFEAMs的通用设计策略，并预言单层(CoCl)₂Te及其家族材料为潜在候选。研究发现单层(CoCl)₂Te中存在高度可调的输运机制：空穴掺杂时自旋流可通过面内电场角度切换，电子掺杂时则可通过栅压极性切换。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作基于新近提出的自旋反铁电(spin-AFE)概念，构建了一类二维多铁交错磁体(2D spin-AFEAMs)，可通过栅压电场调控自旋极化。作者提出了构建具有大本征自旋劈裂的2D spin-AFEAMs的通用设计策略，并预言单层(CoCl)₂Te及其家族材料为潜在候选。研究发现单层(CoCl)₂Te中存在高度可调的输运机制：空穴掺杂时自旋流可通过面内电场角度切换，电子掺杂时则可通过栅压极性切换。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.10612v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The realization of multiferroic altermagnets featuring giant intrinsic spin splitting, hold great promise for next-generation spintronics. In this work, based on the recently proposed concept of spin-antiferroelectric (spin-AFE), we construct a class of two-dimensional (2D) multiferroic altermagnets, termed 2D spin-antiferroelectric altermagnets (2D spin-AFEAMs), enabling electrical control of spin polarization via a gate field. Furthermore, we propose a general design strategy for constructing 2D spin-AFEAMs with large intrinsic spin splitting. Guided by this strategy, we predict monolayer (CoCl)₂Te and its family materials as potential candidates of 2D spin-AFEAM. We uncover a highly tunable transport regime in monolayer (CoCl)₂Te, where the spin current can be switched via the in-plane electric field angle when hole-doped, and via the gate field polarity when electron-doped. Our work enriches the family of 2D multiferroics and provides a blueprint for realizing high-performance, electrically switchable altermagnetic spintronic devices.

102

RuO₂薄膜表面的亚铁磁有序#

Surface ferrimagnetic order in RuO2 film
📚 arXiv👤 Jiahua Lu, Huangzhaoxiang Chen, Zhe Zhang, Xinyue Wang, Donghang Xie, Bo Liu, Liang He, Yao Li, Jun Du, Zhi Wang, Junwei Luo, Rong Zhang, Yongbing Xu, Xuezhong Ruan📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在RuO₂薄膜表面直接观测到亚铁磁有序，揭示了表面Ru-O电荷转移驱动的独特磁性机制，澄清了长期存在的磁性争议，为设计新型表面自旋电子学器件提供了全新材料平台。
该工作利用自旋-角分辨光电子能谱直接探测到RuO₂表面存在窄表面态，其在相反动量与布里渊区中心处具有相同自旋极化，与任何交错磁有序的自旋纹理均不兼容。第一性原理计算表明RuO₂体相为非磁性，而探测到的磁性局限于全氧终端表面：表面Ru向O的电荷转移触发了相邻Ru子晶格间的亚铁磁排列，磁矩分别为+0.48 μB与−0.04 μB。该发现为RuO₂磁性争议提供了统一解释，明确将观测到的磁信号归因于表面亚铁磁性而非交错磁性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用自旋-角分辨光电子能谱直接探测到RuO₂表面存在窄表面态，其在相反动量与布里渊区中心处具有相同自旋极化，与任何交错磁有序的自旋纹理均不兼容。第一性原理计算表明RuO₂体相为非磁性，而探测到的磁性局限于全氧终端表面：表面Ru向O的电荷转移触发了相邻Ru子晶格间的亚铁磁排列，磁矩分别为+0.48 μB与−0.04 μB。该发现为RuO₂磁性争议提供了统一解释，明确将观测到的磁信号归因于表面亚铁磁性而非交错磁性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.10659v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: RuO2, widely proposed as a prototypical altermagnet, remains intensely debated with regard to its magnetic nature. Here, we demonstrate that RuO2 is non-magnetic in the bulk, but possesses a spontaneous surface ferrimagnetic order. Using spin- and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy, we directly detect a narrow surface state with identical spin polarizations at opposite momenta and at the Brillouin-zone center, incompatible with the spin texture of any altermagnetic order. First-principles calculations identify the non-magnetic bulk state and reveal that the detected magnetism is confined to the fully oxygen-terminated surface, where the charge transfer from Ru to O at surface triggers a ferrimagnetic alignment between adjacent Ru sublattices with antiparallel moments of +0.48 uB and -0.04 uB. Our findings provide a unified explanation reconciling debating reports on the magnetism of RuO2, establishing surface ferrimagnetism as the origin of the observed magnetic signals, and distinguishing it unambiguously from altermagnetism.

103

拓扑绝缘体/铁磁体范德华异质结中的半量子化反常霍尔电导#

Half-quantized anomalous Hall conductance in topological insulator/ferromagnet van der Waals heterostructures
📚 arXiv👤 Shahid Sattar, Roman Stepanov, Alexander Tyner, M. F. Islam, A. H. MacDonald, C. M. Canali📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次系统揭示了真实铁磁/拓扑绝缘体范德华异质结中偏离理想半量子化电导的微观机制，包括磁化方向、层间耦合及侧壁态杂化等关键因素，为实验精准调控量子反常霍尔态提供了可操作的优化路径。
该工作采用第一性原理方法结合紧束缚模型，研究了三种与当前实验相关的铁磁/拓扑绝缘体范德华异质结中的磁化诱导能隙、侧壁态性质及霍尔电导。作者探讨了在真实体系中阻碍精确半量子化(e²/2h)实现的因素及其影响，为实验上实现半量子化反常霍尔电导提供了理论参考。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用第一性原理方法结合紧束缚模型，研究了三种与当前实验相关的铁磁/拓扑绝缘体范德华异质结中的磁化诱导能隙、侧壁态性质及霍尔电导。作者探讨了在真实体系中阻碍精确半量子化(e²/2h)实现的因素及其影响，为实验上实现半量子化反常霍尔电导提供了理论参考。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.10746v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The half-quantized anomalous Hall conductance (AHC) in topological materials is a condensed matter physics realization of the parity anomaly of (2+1) quantum field theory and an important challenge for both theoretical and experimental research. A possible realization of this phenomenon may be achieved by interfacing a two-dimensional (2D) ferromagnetic (FM) layer with one surface of a thin slab of a topological insulator (TI), which breaks the otherwise conserved time-reversal symmetry, leading to a gap opening in the Dirac-like energy spectrum of the TI surface states. The resulting heterostructure can support chiral currents where only one spin channel contributes to transport, producing a half-quantized Hall conductance (e²/2h). In this work, using first-principles methods together with tight-binding models, we investigate the magnetization-induced gap, the properties of the sidewalls states, and Hall conductance in three different FI/TI van der Waals heterostructures that are relevant for ongoing experiments. We also discuss the factors that can hinder the realization of exact half-quantization in a realistic system and their implication for the quantum anomalous Hall effect and the topological magnetoelectric effect.

104

结构重构诱导的V₂X₂(X=S,Se)单层d波交错磁性#

Structural Reconstruction Induced d-wave Altermagnetism in mathrmV₂X₂ (X = S, Se) monolayer
📚 arXiv👤 Geethanjali S, Sasmita Mohakud📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作提出硫族元素团簇空位重构策略，在V₂X₂单层中实现新型d波交错磁性，其动量依赖的自旋劈裂呈四重角调制且净磁化为零，为无杂散场、高自旋极化的二维自旋电子器件提供了全新材料平台与对称性设计范式。
该工作通过在三角VX₂(X=S,Se)单层中引入硫族元素团簇空位，获得重构的V₂X₂晶格，并研究其电子能带中的动量依赖自旋劈裂。重构结构形成钒原子的反Lieb晶格，包含由C₄ lattice旋转对称和C₂磁对称关联的两个磁子晶格，净磁化强度为零但破缺了时间反演和PT联合对称性。电子结构在费米面上呈现强各向异性自旋劈裂：沿Γ-X和Γ-Y显著，在M点附近消失，自旋劈裂呈四重角调制，符合dₓ²₋y²型交错磁性；实空间自旋密度在钒位点呈现相应…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作通过在三角VX₂(X=S,Se)单层中引入硫族元素团簇空位，获得重构的V₂X₂晶格，并研究其电子能带中的动量依赖自旋劈裂。重构结构形成钒原子的反Lieb晶格，包含由C₄ lattice旋转对称和C₂磁对称关联的两个磁子晶格，净磁化强度为零但破缺了时间反演和PT联合对称性。电子结构在费米面上呈现强各向异性自旋劈裂：沿Γ-X和Γ-Y显著，在M点附近消失，自旋劈裂呈四重角调制，符合dₓ²₋y²型交错磁性；实空间自旋密度在钒位点呈现相应的d波分布图案。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.10768v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnetism, featuring momentum-dependent spin splitting without relativistic effects, holds promise for next generation spintronic applications. In this study, we investigate the momentum-dependent spin splitting in the electronic band structure of a reconstructed V₂X₂ (X=S, Se) lattice, achieved by introducing chalcogen cluster vacancies in trigonal VX₂ (X=S, Se) monolayer. The reconstructed structure forms an inverse Lieb lattice of vanadium atoms, comprising two magnetic sublattices related by C₄ lattice rotational symmetry and C₂ magnetic symmetry, resulting in zero net magnetization despite the breaking of time-reversal (T) and combined inversion time-reversal (PT) symmetries. The electronic structure exhibits strongly anisotropic spin splitting on the Fermi surface, pronounced along Γ!-!X and Γ!-!Y and vanishing near M point, revealing symmetry-enforced nodal features. The spin splitting follows a fourfold angular modulation consistent with dₓ²-y²-type altermagnetism, while the real-space spin density exhibits a corresponding d-wave pattern localized on vanadium sites. Our findings demonstrate that vacancy-driven reconstruction provides an effective route realizing two-dimensional d-wave altermagnets, opening a new avenue for advanced spintronic technologies.

105

超越GGA的体心立方铬第一性原理研究#

A first-principles study of bcc chromium beyond the generalized gradient approximation (GGA)
📚 arXiv👤 Alma Partos (Institute of Physics, Nicolaus Copernicus University, Torun, Poland), Igor Di Marco (Institute of Physics, Nicolaus Copernicus University, Torun, Poland, Department of Physics and Astronomy, Uppsala University, Uppsala, Sweden), Shivalika Sharma (Institute of Physics, Nicolaus Copernicus University, Torun, Poland, Center for Theoretical Physics of Complex Systems, Institute for Basic Science)📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作系统对比了多种meta-GGA泛函对bcc铬磁性基态的描述能力，发现meta-GGA普遍高估局域磁矩并破坏自旋密度波稳定性，而TPSS泛函最接近GGA结果，为强关联磁体中交换关联泛函的选取提供了
该工作对体心立方铬进行了系统的密度泛函理论研究，采用GGA及多种meta-GGA泛函评估总能、结构参数和磁性质。结果显示所有meta-GGA泛函均高估局域磁矩并增强节点磁阻挫，使自旋密度波态相对于共格反铁磁构型失稳；Tao-Perdew-Staroverov-Scuseria(TPSS)泛函结果最接近GGA，对铬的基态描述最为合适。该工作围绕bcc铬的磁性基态挑战展开，详情需查阅原文。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作对体心立方铬进行了系统的密度泛函理论研究，采用GGA及多种meta-GGA泛函评估总能、结构参数和磁性质。结果显示所有meta-GGA泛函均高估局域磁矩并增强节点磁阻挫，使自旋密度波态相对于共格反铁磁构型失稳；Tao-Perdew-Staroverov-Scuseria(TPSS)泛函结果最接近GGA，对铬的基态描述最为合适。该工作围绕bcc铬的磁性基态挑战展开，详情需查阅原文。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.10956v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The study of magnetism in transition metals is a cornerstone in understanding complex electronic and magnetic interactions in condensed matter systems. Among transition metal elements, body-centered cubic (bcc) chromium stands out because of its spin-density wave (SDW) ground state, posing a long-standing challenge for density functional theory (DFT). Conventional functionals, such as the generalized-gradient approximation (GGA) and the local-density approximation (LDA), fail to predict this experimentally observed incommensurate SDW as the ground state. In this study, we present a comprehensive DFT analysis of bcc Cr employing GGA and a variety of meta-GGA functionals. We evaluated total energies, structural parameters, and magnetic properties across a wide range of SDW wave vectors. Our results show that all meta-GGA functionals overestimate the local magnetic moments and enhance the nodal magnetic frustration, destabilizing the SDW state relative to the commensurate antiferromagnetic (AF) configuration. Tao-Perdew-Staroverov-Scuseria (TPSS) yields results closest to those of the GGA, thus providing the most adequate description of bcc Cr among the meta-GGA functionals. These results emphasize the need for the further development of non-local or hybrid functionals tailored for complex magnetic systems.

106

共面kagome反铁磁体中的非常规交替面外自旋极化#

Unconventional alternating out-of-plane spin polarization in the coplanar kagome antiferromagnet
📚 arXiv👤 Ousmane Ly, Satoru Hayami📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地证明，kagome反铁磁体无需自旋-轨道耦合即可产生交替面外自旋极化，其机制源于磁单胞自旋手性而非传统交换作用。空间限域下晶格端面对称性调控实空间自旋分布，破缺镜面对称性诱导类交替磁性自
该研究表明，非共线kagome反铁磁体在无自旋-轨道耦合情况下，可由磁单胞自旋手性产生交替面外自旋极化。空间限域下，晶格端面对称性决定实空间自旋分离图案；破缺横向镜面对称性导致能带中出现类交替磁性自旋劈裂，并揭示边缘态的非常规自旋-边缘锁定机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究表明，非共线kagome反铁磁体在无自旋-轨道耦合情况下，可由磁单胞自旋手性产生交替面外自旋极化。空间限域下，晶格端面对称性决定实空间自旋分离图案；破缺横向镜面对称性导致能带中出现类交替磁性自旋劈裂，并揭示边缘态的非常规自旋-边缘锁定机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11057v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The emergence of spin-polarized currents in nonrelativistic platforms continues to attract significant interest in spintronics. Here we demonstrate that a noncollinear kagome antiferromagnet can generate an alternating out-of-plane spin polarization originating from the spin chirality of the magnetic unit cell, in the absence of relativistic spin--orbit coupling. Under spatial confinement, the system develops distinct real-space spin separation patterns whose structure is governed by the symmetry of the lattice termination. In particular, breaking the transverse mirror symmetry of the ribbon produces an altermagnetic-like spin splitting in the band structure. Furthermore, we uncover a spin--edge locking mechanism in which propagating edge states acquire an unconventional spin polarization. These results highlight how magnetic symmetry and confinement can generate spin-polarized transport in coplanar antiferromagnets without relying on relativistic interactions.

107

SrIr₁₋ₓSnₓO₃中自旋稀释下有效磁交换相互作用的演化#

Evolution of effective magnetic exchange interaction under spin dilution in SrIr₁₋ₓSnₓO₃
📚 arXiv👤 Xiang Li, Yifan Jiang, Yuan Wan, Xuerong Liu📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：利用共振非弹性X射线散射首次在自旋稀释体系SrIr₁₋ₓSnₓO₃中追踪有效磁交换相互作用的连续演化，发现其服从简单标度律。该工作为5d铱氧化物的强电子关联本质提供了直接实验判据，并深化了对金属性体系
共振非弹性X射线散射测量显示，SrIr₁₋ₓSnₓO₃在x=0至0.2范围内存在稳健的磁激发。提取的有效磁交换相互作用随自旋稀释连续减小，并遵循简单的自旋稀释标度律，证实了金属性母体SrIrO₃的强电子关联本质，并揭示了电荷与自旋动力学的纠缠。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

共振非弹性X射线散射测量显示，SrIr₁₋ₓSnₓO₃在x=0至0.2范围内存在稳健的磁激发。提取的有效磁交换相互作用随自旋稀释连续减小，并遵循简单的自旋稀释标度律，证实了金属性母体SrIrO₃的强电子关联本质，并揭示了电荷与自旋动力学的纠缠。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11075v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Resonant inelastic X-ray scattering measurements reveal robust magnetic excitations in the perovskite iridates SrIr₁₋ₓSnₓO₃. We analyzed the dispersions of the magnetic excitation with spin-dilution ratio x = 0, 0.03, 0.06, 0.1, and 0.2, crossing from semi-metal to spin-diluted while antiferromagnetically ordered insulators. The extracted effective magnetic exchange interactions decrease continuously upon increasing spin dilution, and their evolution follows a simple spin-dilution scaling law. These results not only verify the strong electron-correlation nature of the metallic parent SrIrO₃, but also reveal the entanglement of the charge and spin dynamics in this system.

108

旋转磁场下单个磁性Quincke滚子的规则与反常运动#

Regular and Anomalous Motion of Individual Magnetic Quincke Rollers Under Rotating Magnetic Field
📚 arXiv👤 Zoran M. Cenev, Ville S. I. Havu, Jaakko V. I. Timonen📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示了旋转磁场下磁性Quincke滚子的反常逆时针运动，突破了磁场方向决定滚动方向的常规认知。通过耦合静电作用与流体力学理论，建立了描述螺旋-波浪轨迹转变的统一框架，为微纳机器人主动操控及非
该工作报道了磁性Quincke滚子在顺时针旋转磁场下的运动行为。低频时以顺时针螺旋轨迹为主，高频时出现螺旋波浪轨迹；在特定条件下，观察到粒子沿逆时针方向滚动的反常轨迹，与外加磁场方向相反。理论模型结合了静电相互作用与远场流体力学以解释该现象。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作报道了磁性Quincke滚子在顺时针旋转磁场下的运动行为。低频时以顺时针螺旋轨迹为主，高频时出现螺旋波浪轨迹；在特定条件下，观察到粒子沿逆时针方向滚动的反常轨迹，与外加磁场方向相反。理论模型结合了静电相互作用与远场流体力学以解释该现象。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11132v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report the motion of individual magnetic Quincke rollers composed of silica particles doped with superparamagnetic iron oxide nanoparticles, whose activity arises from the coupling between Quincke rolling and an externally applied rotating magnetic field. We applied a clockwise (CW) rotating magnetic field of magnitude approximately 11 mT and rotational frequencies ranging from 0.2 to 2.75 Hz. At low frequencies, the dominant mode of motion is a CW helical trajectory. Circular trajectories emerge as a limiting case of this helical motion, in which lateral translation vanishes and the particle traces overlapping closed loops in the xy-plane. At higher frequencies, a second regular mode becomes prevalent, characterized by helical wavy trajectories in which the particle follows a CW helical path with a spatially varying curvature. Under specific conditions, however, we observe the unexpected emergence of anomalous counterclockwise (CCW) trajectories, in which individual particles roll in a direction opposite to that of the applied CW rotating magnetic field. A theoretical model incorporating electrostatic interactions, far-field hydrodynamic coupling, and a magnetic dipole approximation indicates that the anomalous behavior results from the interplay among the magnitude and orientation of the initial magnetic dipole moment, the frequency of the rotating magnetic field, and the magnitude of the initial translational velocity. Together, these factors determine the likelihood of a particle exhibiting regular or anomalous rotational motion.

109

自助熔剂法合成层状磁性A₂.₄Cr₈Te₁₄（A=Rb,Cs）的梯状结构#

Ladder-like Structural Architecture of Layered Magnetic A₂.₄Cr₈Te₁₄ (A = Rb, Cs) Compounds by Self-flux Synthesis
📚 arXiv👤 Kai D. Röseler, Felix Eder, Fabian O. von Rohr📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：自助熔剂法合成新型层状铬碲化物A₂.₄Cr₈Te₁₄，其梯状结构创新性地桥联了delafossite与hollandite两种结构原型，为二维磁性材料设计提供新范式；碱金属阳离子调控实现反铁磁-亚铁磁
通过微调碱金属-碲助熔剂组成，合成出新型碱金属铬碲化物A₂.₄Cr₈Te₁₄（A=Rb,Cs）。其梯状晶体结构融合了delafossite型ACrTe₂的二维特征与hollandite型AₓCr₅Te₈的隧道 motif。定向单晶磁测量显示Rb₂.₄Cr₈Te₁₄为反铁磁体（T_N=114.5 K），Cs₂.₄Cr₈Te₁₄为亚铁磁体（T_C=125.0 K）。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

通过微调碱金属-碲助熔剂组成，合成出新型碱金属铬碲化物A₂.₄Cr₈Te₁₄（A=Rb,Cs）。其梯状晶体结构融合了delafossite型ACrTe₂的二维特征与hollandite型AₓCr₅Te₈的隧道 motif。定向单晶磁测量显示Rb₂.₄Cr₈Te₁₄为反铁磁体（T_N=114.5 K），Cs₂.₄Cr₈Te₁₄为亚铁磁体（T_C=125.0 K）。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11153v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The discovery and control of intergrowth structures represent an important avenue for the targeted synthesis of new, more complex structure types. When including magnetic framework metal atoms, this enhanced complexity can transfer to rich magnetic ground states. Here, we show that the subtle adjustment of the composition of alkali-tellurium fluxes enables the synthesis of a new family of alkali chromium tellurides, A₂.₄Cr₈Te₁₄ (A = Rb, Cs). Their ladder-like crystal structures integrate the two-dimensional character of delafossite-like ACrTe₂ with the tunnel motifs of hollandite-like AₓCr₅Te₈ phases. This results in a previously unobserved unique hybrid framework. Direction-dependent magnetization measurements on oriented single crystals reveal distinct magnetic ground states: Rb₂.₄Cr₈Te₁₄ is antiferromagnetic with Tₘ̊ N = 114.5 K, while Cs₂.₄Cr₈Te₁₄ is ferrimagnetic with Tₘ̊ C = 125.0 K. This work underscores the simplicity and effectiveness of flux growth as a design strategy for discovering low-dimensional materials.

110

单晶中子衍射研究Dresselhaus型反铁磁体EuIr₄In₂Ge₄的磁有序#

Magnetic Order of Dresselhaus-type Antiferromagnet EuIr₄In₂Ge₄ Studied by Single Crystal Neutron Diffraction
📚 arXiv👤 Chihiro Tabata, Koji Kaneko, Akiko Nakao, Takashi Ohhara, Tatsuma D. Matsuda, Yoshichika Ōnuki📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次通过单晶极化中子衍射精确解析了Dresselhaus型反铁磁体EuIr₄In₂Ge₄的磁结构，揭示局域Eu²⁺磁矩形成共线反铁磁序且与巡游电子弱耦合，为理解自旋-轨道耦合材料中磁性与能带拓扑
飞行时间单晶中子衍射显示EuIr₄In₂Ge₄在T_N=2.5 K以下出现传播矢量为q=(1,0,0)的反铁磁布拉格峰，表明体心平移对称性破缺。极化中子衍射证实Eu²⁺ 4f磁矩位于基面内，形成角位与体心位反平行的共线反铁磁结构。尽管导带存在Dresselhaus型自旋劈裂，磁有序仍保持简单，说明局域磁矩与巡游电子耦合较弱。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

飞行时间单晶中子衍射显示EuIr₄In₂Ge₄在T_N=2.5 K以下出现传播矢量为q=(1,0,0)的反铁磁布拉格峰，表明体心平移对称性破缺。极化中子衍射证实Eu²⁺ 4f磁矩位于基面内，形成角位与体心位反平行的共线反铁磁结构。尽管导带存在Dresselhaus型自旋劈裂，磁有序仍保持简单，说明局域磁矩与巡游电子耦合较弱。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11242v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The magnetic order of EuIr₄In₂Ge₄, which crystallizes in a Dresselhaus-type noncentrosymmetric tetragonal structure, was investigated using two complementary single-crystal neutron diffraction approaches. Time-of-flight single-crystal diffraction reveals antiferromagnetic Bragg reflections with propagation vector q = (1, 0, 0) below the Néel temperature Tₘ̊ N = 2.5 K, indicating a breaking of body-centered translational symmetry. Polarized neutron diffraction on a triple-axis spectrometer demonstrates that the ordered Eu²⁺ 4f moments lie within the basal plane and form a collinear antiferromagnetic structure with antiparallel alignment between corner and body-center sites. Despite the Dresselhaus-type spin splitting in the conduction bands, the magnetic order remains simple, implying weak coupling between localized moments and itinerant electrons.

111

新型螺旋InSeI多晶型：晶体结构与偏振拉曼光谱研究#

A new helical InSeI polymorph: crystal structure and polarized Raman spectroscopy study
📚 arXiv👤 Lucía Olano-Vegas, Davide Spirito, Evgeny Modin, Pavlo Solokha, Sergio Marras, Marco Gobbi, Fèlix Casanova, Serena De Negri, Luis E. Hueso, Beatriz Martín-García📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次合成四方螺旋InSeI新相，突破传统层状结构范式；创新性地将偏振拉曼光谱用于确定螺旋链空间取向及晶面不等价性，建立振动模式对称性完整指认体系。虽未发现手性声子，但为各向异性光电器件与自旋电子
该工作报道了一种尚未报道的四方InSeI多晶型结构，并通过偏振拉曼光谱研究其体晶与剥离纳米线的晶格动力学。线性偏振测量确定了螺旋链取向并区分不等价晶面，完成振动模式对称性指认；圆偏振拉曼未观测到手性声子，为取向依赖的光电器件与自旋电子器件制备提供结构基础。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作报道了一种尚未报道的四方InSeI多晶型结构，并通过偏振拉曼光谱研究其体晶与剥离纳米线的晶格动力学。线性偏振测量确定了螺旋链取向并区分不等价晶面，完成振动模式对称性指认；圆偏振拉曼未观测到手性声子，为取向依赖的光电器件与自旋电子器件制备提供结构基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11316v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Tetragonal InSeI is an interesting low-dimensional metal chalcohalide due to its composition and anisotropic crystal structure composed of helical chains, which give rise to optoelectronic properties with potential application in photodetectors, optical thermometers, and spintronic devices. However, experimental works lack on the study of its anisotropic or chiral behavior. Here we present the crystal structure of an unreported InSeI polymorph and study its lattice dynamics in bulk crystals and exfoliated nanowires by polarized Raman spectroscopy for two non-equivalent crystallographic planes. We determine the orientation of the helical chains and distinguish between crystallographic planes by linearly polarized measurements, evaluating the angle-dependent intensity of the modes, which allows assigning each mode to its representation. Circularly polarized Raman measurements do not reveal chiral phonons, despite the helical chains and anisotropic crystal structure. These results offer insight into the crystal structure of InSeI, which is fundamental for the fabrication of orientation-dependent optoelectronic and spintronic devices.

112

CrI₃纳米带边缘局域应变增强拓扑磁子驱动自旋流#

Enhancement of topological magnon-driven spin currents through local edge strain in CrI₃ nanoribbons
📚 arXiv👤 David Sanz Ruiz, David Soriano📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地提出边缘局域应变调控策略，在CrI₃纳米带中实现拓扑磁子的强局域化与自旋流增强，为低维磁性材料中拓扑磁子器件的设计提供了可实验验证的新途径，突破了本征DMI不足对拓扑磁子稳定的限制。
研究基于第一性原理计算获得应变下的交换耦合参数，结合线性自旋波理论与非平衡格林函数方法，研究锯齿边CrI₃纳米带在边缘应变下的拓扑磁子输运。计算表明，约3%的拉伸边缘应变可在略高于实验报道的DMI值下形成强局域化边缘拓扑磁子，并显著增强自旋流与特征衰减长度。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

研究基于第一性原理计算获得应变下的交换耦合参数，结合线性自旋波理论与非平衡格林函数方法，研究锯齿边CrI₃纳米带在边缘应变下的拓扑磁子输运。计算表明，约3%的拉伸边缘应变可在略高于实验报道的DMI值下形成强局域化边缘拓扑磁子，并显著增强自旋流与特征衰减长度。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11323v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This work describes topological magnon transport in zigzag CrI₃ nanoribbons (ZNR) in presence of edge strain. Exchange coupling terms under strain are obtained from first-principles calculations, and the topological properties are introduced emphvia second-neighbor Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions. The magnon Hamiltonian is calculated using linear spin-wave theory and the Holstein-Primakoff transformation. Then, we use non-equilibrium Green's function method to calculate the spin-wave-generated currents in ribbons with different edge strain. Our calculations show the formation of strongly localized edge topological magnons within the gap for DMI values slightly higher than the ones reported experimentally and in the presence of a tensile edge strain of the order of 3%. The magnon-mediated topological spin transport calculations shows an increase of the spin current and characteristic decay length in tensile-strained CrI₃ nanoribbons compared with unstrained ones. Our findings demonstrate that straintronics provides a powerful route to harness and control topological magnons in two-dimensional magnetic materials.

113

二维交替磁性材料中的超快幽灵霍尔态#

Ultrafast ghost Hall states in a 2d altermagnet
📚 arXiv👤 Ruikai Wu, Deepika Gill, Sangeeta Sharma, Sam Shallcross📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统霍尔效应框架，在二维交替磁体中利用飞秒激光方向选择性激发谷态，首创"幽灵霍尔"态——无需外场即可产生正交自旋-电荷流，为超快谷电子学器件及低能耗自旋操控开辟新路径。
该研究以二维交替磁体Cr₂SO为例，证明其谷态可被飞秒激光调控：线偏振光脉冲的方向决定两个不等价谷中哪个被激发。由此可实现近100%自旋极化的谷流（谷电子学），以及无需霍尔物理即可产生自旋流与电荷流正交的超快“幽灵霍尔”态，为超快自旋-电荷流操控提供了新平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究以二维交替磁体Cr₂SO为例，证明其谷态可被飞秒激光调控：线偏振光脉冲的方向决定两个不等价谷中哪个被激发。由此可实现近100%自旋极化的谷流（谷电子学），以及无需霍尔物理即可产生自旋流与电荷流正交的超快“幽灵霍尔”态，为超快自旋-电荷流操控提供了新平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11361v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Two-dimensional materials that exhibit optically active spin and valley degrees of freedom represent one of the most fascinating -- and potentially most technologically useful -- platforms for the ultrafast interaction of light and matter. Here we show, via the example of Cr₂SO, that two dimensional altermagnets host valley states controllable by femtosecond laser light: linearly polarized light pulses excite charge at one of two inequivalent valleys, with which valley charge is excited at determined by the polarization vector direction. This underpins a rich spin and valley physics including: (i) valleytronics - the generation of nearly 100% spin polarized valley currents, as well as (ii) a "ghost Hall" effect - the ultrafast creation of states in which spin and charge currents are orthogonal without invoking Hall physics. Our findings establish 2d altermagents as a platform providing a new route for the control of spin- and charge currents at ultrafast times.

114

磁场驱动触发磁涡旋中自诱导弗洛凯磁子的实验研究#

Field-driven triggering of self-induced Floquet magnons in a magnetic vortex
📚 arXiv👤 R. Lopes Seeger, G. Philippe, A. Jenkins, L. C. Benetti, A. Schulman, R. Ferreira, J. -V. Kim, T. Devolder📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在磁涡旋体系中实现磁场可调的弗洛凯磁子态，核心创新在于利用涡旋核轨道运动诱导自反馈效应，形成多稳态进动半径，实现常规磁子与弗洛凯磁子的滞回切换。为拓扑磁结构中的非线性磁子操控及频率梳器件提供
该研究在磁隧道结中实现了磁涡旋态弗洛凯磁子的实验调控。利用微波光谱学，作者发现自诱导弗洛凯边带形成频率梳，其存在依赖于涡旋核的轨道运动。通过施加磁场移动涡旋核位置，可在相同驱动条件下实现常规磁子与弗洛凯磁子之间的滞回切换。非线性涡旋-磁子模型表明，这一现象源于弗洛凯介导的反馈效应所产生的多个稳定涡旋进动半径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在磁隧道结中实现了磁涡旋态弗洛凯磁子的实验调控。利用微波光谱学，作者发现自诱导弗洛凯边带形成频率梳，其存在依赖于涡旋核的轨道运动。通过施加磁场移动涡旋核位置，可在相同驱动条件下实现常规磁子与弗洛凯磁子之间的滞回切换。非线性涡旋-磁子模型表明，这一现象源于弗洛凯介导的反馈效应所产生的多个稳定涡旋进动半径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11438v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report the experimental control of Floquet magnons in a magnetic vortex. Using microwave spectroscopy of vortex state magnetic tunnel junctions (MTJs), we find that self-induced Floquet sidebands form frequency combs whose existence depend on the vortex core orbit. By shifting the vortex core with an applied magnetic field, we switch the system between regular and Floquet magnons at identical drive conditions, demonstrating hysteretic control of the Floquet spectrum. A nonlinear vortex-magnon model shows that this behavior originates from multiple stable vortex gyration radii created by Floquet-mediated feedback. These results establish magnetic state initialization as a means to switch between regular and Floquet magnons.

115

磁性拓扑半金属中的巨大畴壁霍尔磁电阻效应#

Giant Domain-Wall Hall Magnetoresistance in Magnetic Topological Semimetal
📚 arXiv👤 Jinying Yang, Qingqi Zeng, Yibo Wang, Meng Lyu, Yang Liu, Xingchen Liu, Xuebin Dong, Binbin Wang, Xiyang Li, Enke Liu📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示磁性外尔半金属中畴壁霍尔磁电阻的物理起源：非纵向电阻变化，而是畴壁处拓扑贝里相位增强的反常霍尔效应诱导的横向电场重分布。其量级较常规材料提升一个数量级，为基于拓扑能带工程的多态存储器件设
该研究在磁性外尔半金属Co₃Sn₂S₂中报道了一种纵向畴壁霍尔磁电阻效应。基于多畴模型，作者推导并实验验证了一个简洁的霍尔磁电阻公式。该效应并非源于纵向电阻的真实变化，而是由畴壁处横向巨大反常霍尔效应诱导的额外电场分布所导致，可直接与拓扑外尔能带的贝里相位关联。在Co₃Sn₂S₂器件中，该霍尔磁电阻比常规磁性材料高出一个数量级，展现了通过外尔增强反常霍尔效应实现多电阻态调控的潜力。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在磁性外尔半金属Co₃Sn₂S₂中报道了一种纵向畴壁霍尔磁电阻效应。基于多畴模型，作者推导并实验验证了一个简洁的霍尔磁电阻公式。该效应并非源于纵向电阻的真实变化，而是由畴壁处横向巨大反常霍尔效应诱导的额外电场分布所导致，可直接与拓扑外尔能带的贝里相位关联。在Co₃Sn₂S₂器件中，该霍尔磁电阻比常规磁性材料高出一个数量级，展现了通过外尔增强反常霍尔效应实现多电阻态调控的潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11452v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic topological semimetals exhibit emerging magneto-transport behaviors, such as the giant anomalous Hall effect (AHE), chiral Hall effect, and antisymmetric magnetoresistance. In this work, based on the magnetic Weyl semimetal Co3Sn2S2, we report an intriguing longitudinal domain-wall Hall magnetoresistance in multi-domain states. According to a multi-domain model, a concise formula of this Hall magnetoresistance was revealed and verified experimentally. Rather than the real change of longitudinal resistance, this Hall magnetoresistance originates from an additional electric field distribution induced by the transverse giant AHE through the domain wall, which can be directly correlated to the Berry phase of topological Weyl bands. In Co3Sn2S2 devices, the Hall magnetoresistance was an order of magnitude larger than that of conventional magnetic materials, indicating its potential for multi-resistance-state modulation via the Weyl-enhanced AHE.

116

外尔半金属中频率依赖线性磁光输运的半经典理论#

Semiclassical theory of frequency dependent linear magneto-optical transport in Weyl semimetals
📚 arXiv👤 Azaz Ahmad, Pankaj Bhalla, Snehasish Nandy, Tanay Nag📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作建立含动量依赖弛豫的半经典玻尔兹曼理论，首次揭示频率调控下谷间散射与手征反常的竞争机制：弱交流场中强散射致纵向磁光电导率符号反转、反常受抑，强交流场中反常恢复。该理论为外尔半金属中磁光效应的量子
该研究发展了外尔半金属中频率依赖磁光输运的半经典玻尔兹曼理论，通过散射矩阵方法引入动量依赖的弛豫。理论分析了轨道磁矩、外尔锥倾斜、谷间散射与电磁驱动的相互作用，得到了静磁场下完整的电导率张量。对于无倾斜且存在轨道磁矩的外尔半金属，弱交流区中强谷间散射会导致纵向磁光电导率符号反转，从而抑制手征反常；而在强交流区，谷间散射无法在驱动周期内中和手征不平衡，不出现符号反转。外尔锥倾斜的方向和取向显著影响纵向磁光电导率：横向倾斜导致对称的非单调…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究发展了外尔半金属中频率依赖磁光输运的半经典玻尔兹曼理论，通过散射矩阵方法引入动量依赖的弛豫。理论分析了轨道磁矩、外尔锥倾斜、谷间散射与电磁驱动的相互作用，得到了静磁场下完整的电导率张量。对于无倾斜且存在轨道磁矩的外尔半金属，弱交流区中强谷间散射会导致纵向磁光电导率符号反转，从而抑制手征反常；而在强交流区，谷间散射无法在驱动周期内中和手征不平衡，不出现符号反转。外尔锥倾斜的方向和取向显著影响纵向磁光电导率：横向倾斜导致对称的非单调行为，平行倾斜则导致不对称的近似单调响应。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11527v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We develop a semiclassical Boltzmann theory for frequency-dependent magneto-optical transport in Weyl semimetals (WSMs), incorporating momentum-dependent relaxation via a scattering matrix approach. The interplay of orbital magnetic moment, Weyl cone tilt, intervalley scattering, and electromagnetic driving is analyzed to obtain the full conductivity tensor in the presence of a static magnetic field. For untilted WSMs with orbital magnetic moment, strong intervalley scattering in the weak ac regime induces a sign reversal of the longitudinal magneto-optical conductivity (LMOC), thereby suppressing the chiral anomaly. In contrast, in the strong ac regime, intervalley scattering fails to neutralize the chiral imbalance within a driving cycle, and no sign reversal is observed. Orbital magnetic moment induces linear magnetic-field contributions, while chiral anomaly yields quadratic response accompanied by expected angular profiles. Tilt direction and orientation strongly affect LMOC such as, transverse tilt gives symmetric non-monotonic behavior, whereas parallel tilt leads to asymmetric, nearly monotonic response. Notably, negative LMOC arises intrinsically for parallel tilt, but requires orbital magnetic moment for transverse tilt. These results highlight frequency-dependent conductivity as a sensitive probe of chiral relaxation in MHz-THz magneto-optical experiments.

117

反铁磁体FeTe中的贝里曲率与场致内禀反常霍尔效应#

Berry curvature and field-induced intrinsic anomalous Hall effect in an antiferromagnet FeTe
📚 arXiv👤 Satoshi Okamoto, Adriana Moreo, Naoto Nagaosa, Stuart S. P. Parkin📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在真实自旋-费米子模型框架下，揭示了四方相FeTe中磁场可调的内禀反常霍尔效应及其贝里曲率起源，发现霍尔电导率具有显著的温度与场强依赖性及符号反转特性。这一理论工作为低维关联反铁磁体中的拓扑
该研究基于真实的自旋-费米子模型，理论研究了四方相FeTe这一具有低温补偿磁序的半金属范德华反铁磁体中的内禀反常霍尔效应（AHE）。计算表明，FeTe在外加磁场下表现出由贝里曲率驱动的大AHE，其霍尔电导率对温度和磁场强度极为敏感，甚至出现符号反转。该工作确立了FeTe作为探索低维关联体系中量子输运的有前景平台，并讨论了近期关于FeTe中AHE和普通霍尔效应实验结果的理论含义。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究基于真实的自旋-费米子模型，理论研究了四方相FeTe这一具有低温补偿磁序的半金属范德华反铁磁体中的内禀反常霍尔效应（AHE）。计算表明，FeTe在外加磁场下表现出由贝里曲率驱动的大AHE，其霍尔电导率对温度和磁场强度极为敏感，甚至出现符号反转。该工作确立了FeTe作为探索低维关联体系中量子输运的有前景平台，并讨论了近期关于FeTe中AHE和普通霍尔效应实验结果的理论含义。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11583v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Berry curvature is ubiquitous in condensed matter physics and materials science. Its main consequence is the intrinsic anomalous Hall effect (AHE) in magnetic materials and plays a pivotal role in spintronic applications and quantum technologies. Here, we present a theoretical study of the intrinsic AHE in tetragonal FeTe, a semimetallic van der Waals antiferromagnet with compensated magnetic ordering at low temperatures. Using a realistic spin-fermion model, we demonstrate that FeTe exhibits a large Berry-curvature-driven AHE under an applied magnetic field. Our calculations reveal that the Hall conductivity of this compound is extremely sensitive to temperature and field strength and even exhibits sign reversal, highlighting FeTe as a prototypical platform where magnetism and topology combine to produce robust intrinsic Hall responses. This work establishes FeTe as a promising candidate for exploring quantum transport in low-dimensional correlated systems. We also discuss the implications for recent experimental results of the AHE and ordinary Hall effect reported for FeTe.

118

畸变笼目金属CrPdAs中的准线性'非金属'电阻率#

Quasi-linear `non-metallic' resistivity in the distorted-kagome metal CrPdAs
📚 arXiv👤 Benny Lau, Wenlong Wu, Bo Yuan, Julian Nickel, Stephen Julian📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在真实畸变笼目金属CrPdAs中实现准线性"非金属"电阻率，突破了传统费米液体理论框架，为理解量子临界行为和奇异金属态提供了理想材料平台，对探索笼目晶格中拓扑电子态与强关联效应的耦合具有重要
该研究报道了畸变笼目晶格化合物CrPdAs单晶的生长与物性表征。所有晶体均表现出约60 mK的自旋玻璃行为，部分生长样品存在约200 K的磁性杂相，退火后可获得单相晶体。单晶样品中Cr与Pd位仍存在29±5%的反位无序。低温比热系数较大（γ = 23 ± 3 mJ/mol·K²），符合笼目金属特征。能带计算显示费米面附近存在多个Dirac点，自旋-轨道耦合解除其简并。最显著的发现是：面内电阻率在2–300 K全温区呈'非金属'行为，1…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究报道了畸变笼目晶格化合物CrPdAs单晶的生长与物性表征。所有晶体均表现出约60 mK的自旋玻璃行为，部分生长样品存在约200 K的磁性杂相，退火后可获得单相晶体。单晶样品中Cr与Pd位仍存在29±5%的反位无序。低温比热系数较大（γ = 23 ± 3 mJ/mol·K²），符合笼目金属特征。能带计算显示费米面附近存在多个Dirac点，自旋-轨道耦合解除其简并。最显著的发现是：面内电阻率在2–300 K全温区呈'非金属'行为，130 K以下为准线性，且在最低测量温度下无饱和迹象。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11630v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report the growth and characterization of single crystals of the disorted-kagome lattice compound CrPdAs. Spin-glass behaviour with TSG sim 60 m̊ K is observed in all crystals tested. Some growths show in addition a magnetic impurity phase with T_c around 200 K, but annealing produces single-phase crystals without the ferromagnetic impurity phase. Single-phase crystals nevertheless have 29± 5% anti-site disorder of the Cr and Pd sites, similar to a previous generation of flux-grown polycrystalline samples. We observe a large linear-coefficient of the heat capacity at low temperature, γ = 23 ± 3 mJ/mole,K², which is typical of kagome metals. The calculated band structure shows several Dirac band-crossings very near E_F whose degeneracy is lifted when spin-orbit interaction is included. Our most curious finding is a `non-metallic' in-plane resistivity, extending over the entire measured temperature range from 300 K down to 2 K. This resistivity is quasi-linear below about 130 K, and shows no sign of saturation down to the lowest temperature measured.

119

双层平面腔中的几何调控磁振子-极化激元激发#

Geometry-controlled magnon-polariton excitations in a bilayer planar cavity
📚 arXiv👤 S. Solihin, Ahmad R. T. Nugraha, Muhammad Aziz Majidi📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破了"增加磁性材料即可增强耦合"的直观认知，揭示双层腔中几何构型对磁振子-极化激元耦合的位置选择性调控机制：反节点处增强、节点处抑制，且弱对称性破缺可激活暗模式。为量子信息处理中可调谐强耦合器
该研究构建了一种双层平面腔体系，将两个磁性薄膜嵌入同一微波腔中，通过腔场及它们在驻波图案中的相对位置实现相互作用。作者推导了宏观自旋极限下的完整双薄膜散射理论，发现双层结构并非简单地通过增加磁性材料来增强磁振子-光子相互作用，而是能够实现对集体亮通道的位置依赖型调控：反节点兼容位置增强有效耦合，节点兼容位置则抑制耦合。此外，两膜间弱对称性破缺可将有限腔权重转移至对称极限下为暗的模式，从而产生额外的光谱分支。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究构建了一种双层平面腔体系，将两个磁性薄膜嵌入同一微波腔中，通过腔场及它们在驻波图案中的相对位置实现相互作用。作者推导了宏观自旋极限下的完整双薄膜散射理论，发现双层结构并非简单地通过增加磁性材料来增强磁振子-光子相互作用，而是能够实现对集体亮通道的位置依赖型调控：反节点兼容位置增强有效耦合，节点兼容位置则抑制耦合。此外，两膜间弱对称性破缺可将有限腔权重转移至对称极限下为暗的模式，从而产生额外的光谱分支。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11690v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Planar cavity magnonics has been developed predominantly for a single magnetic film, leaving the role of multiple magnetic layers in a cavity-scattering framework with spatial resolution largely unexplored. In this study, we introduce a bilayer planar cavity in which two magnetic films are embedded inside the same microwave cavity and interact through the cavity field and their relative placement within the standing-wave pattern. First, we derive a full two-film scattering theory in the macrospin limit and recover the exact zero-gap half-thickness limit to benchmark it against the known one-film planar result. This formulation reveals that the bilayer does not simply strengthen the magnon-photon interaction by adding magnetic material but instead enables position-dependent control of the collective bright channel. Antinode-compatible placements enhance effective coupling, whereas node-compatible placements suppress it. We then show that weak symmetry breaking between the two films transfers the finite cavity weight to a mode that is dark in the symmetric limit, producing an additional spectroscopic branch without immediately destroying the main avoided crossing. To extend the analysis beyond the macrospin regime, we formulate a reduced multimode bilayer theory for J≠ 0, where odd standing-spin-wave families reorganize into family-resolved bright and dark bilayer channels. Our results show that bilayer planar cavities are a minimal but versatile setting for controlling the collective magnon-polariton structure through geometry, symmetry, and exchange-driven mode hierarchy.

120

螺旋磁晶格中通过单纯形桥实现的爆炸性同步与磁性奇美拉态#

Explosive Synchronization and Magnetic Chimeras via the Simplicial Bridge in Helimagnetic Lattices
📚 arXiv👤 Alok Yadav📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究构建"单纯形桥"理论框架，将螺旋磁连续体映射至高阶Kuramoto网络，揭示三体相位耦合诱导爆炸性同步与磁奇美拉态的新机制，为范德华异质结物性调控与磁振子储备计算提供新范式。
该研究将螺旋磁连续体模型扩展至包含多自旋双二次交换相互作用，利用Karpman-Solov'ev绝热微扰理论严格将非线性Landau-Lifshitz偏微分方程映射到单纯形复形上的广义Kuramoto网络。这种"单纯形桥"揭示了高阶三体相位耦合可诱导爆炸性的一阶同步转变，伴随巨大的双稳滞后回线。在二分蜂窝晶格上的谱分析表明，这些网络能够规避几何阻挫，并涌现出宏观磁性奇美拉态——即冻结与涨落自旋纹理共存的自发空间域。作者讨论了这些态在强…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究将螺旋磁连续体模型扩展至包含多自旋双二次交换相互作用，利用Karpman-Solov'ev绝热微扰理论严格将非线性Landau-Lifshitz偏微分方程映射到单纯形复形上的广义Kuramoto网络。这种"单纯形桥"揭示了高阶三体相位耦合可诱导爆炸性的一阶同步转变，伴随巨大的双稳滞后回线。在二分蜂窝晶格上的谱分析表明，这些网络能够规避几何阻挫，并涌现出宏观磁性奇美拉态——即冻结与涨落自旋纹理共存的自发空间域。作者讨论了这些态在强关联范德华异质结中的物理表现及其在可重构磁振子储备计算中的潜在应用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.10773v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The macroscopic dynamics of topological defects in magnetic materials are traditionally modeled using pairwise interactions, universally yielding continuous thermodynamic phase transitions. In this work, we extend the helimagnetic continuum model to include multi-spin biquadratic exchange. Using the Karpman-Solov'ev adiabatic perturbation theory, we rigorously map the non-linear Landau-Lifshitz partial differential equations onto a generalized Kuramoto network operating on a simplicial complex. This "Simplicial Bridge" reveals that higher-order, triadic phase couplings induce explosive, first-order synchronization transitions characterized by a massive bistable hysteresis loop. Furthermore, spectral analysis of these networks on bipartite honeycomb lattices demonstrates the evasion of geometric frustration and the emergence of macroscopic magnetic chimera states-spontaneous spatial domains of coexisting frozen and fluctuating spin textures. We discuss the physical manifestation of these states in strongly correlated van der Waals heterostructures and their potential application in reconfigurable magnonic reservoir computing.

121

CrSBr光子晶体板中自杂化激子-极化激元的磁开关效应#

Magnetic switching of self-hybridized exciton-polaritons in CrSBr photonic crystal slabs
📚 arXiv👤 T. D. Gorelkina, I. E. Kalantaevskii, A. N. Abramov, K. A. Gasnikova, P. A. Alekseev, X. Zeng, D. Huang, T. Jiang, I. V. Iorsh, I. Y. Chestnov, V. Kravtsov📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：在范德华反铁磁体CrSBr光子晶体板中，利用层间磁化翻转诱导自杂化激子-极化激元色散连续演变，以极低磁场（40 mT）实现群速度符号反转与传播方向开关，突破了传统极化激元调控需大磁场或结构重构的局限，
该研究在层状范德华反铁磁体CrSBr光子晶体板中实现了对自杂化激子-极化激元传播方向的主动磁调控。通过角分辨反射与光致发光光谱，作者发现极化激元能量随层间磁化逐步翻转而连续变化；尤为重要的是，仅40 mT的小磁场变化即可反转极化激元群速度符号，实现传播方向的完全开关，为磁控极化激元输运提供了新平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在层状范德华反铁磁体CrSBr光子晶体板中实现了对自杂化激子-极化激元传播方向的主动磁调控。通过角分辨反射与光致发光光谱，作者发现极化激元能量随层间磁化逐步翻转而连续变化；尤为重要的是，仅40 mT的小磁场变化即可反转极化激元群速度符号，实现传播方向的完全开关，为磁控极化激元输运提供了新平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11750v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Layered van der Waals antiferromagnet CrSBr supports strong light--matter coupling and formation of magnetically tunable exciton-polaritons, yet active magnetic control over polariton propagation direction has remained elusive. Here, we investigate self-hybridized exciton-polaritons in photonic crystal slabs fabricated from CrSBr flakes and their evolution across the antiferromagnetic-to-ferromagnetic spin-flip transition induced by moderate in-plane magnetic fields. Using angle-resolved reflectance and photoluminescence spectroscopy supported by modeling, we show that the polariton energy continuously tracks the layer-by-layer magnetization switching, revealing a gradual redistribution of oscillator strength from antiferromagnetic to ferromagnetic excitons near the critical field. Most notably, we demonstrate that the sign of the polariton group velocity can be reversed by a small change in the external magnetic field of only 40 mT, resulting in complete switching of the polariton propagation direction. Our results establish CrSBr photonic crystal slabs as a platform for magnetically controlled polariton transport, opening opportunities for active integrated photonic and polaritonic devices.

122

与涨落自旋耦合导致的奇异金属输运#

Strange metal transport from coupling to fluctuating spins
📚 arXiv👤 Simone Fratini, Ivan Duchemin, Arnaud Ralko, Sergio Ciuchi📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作以数值精确方法突破了传统解析近似的局限，首次在微观层面证实奇异金属性与反铁磁序的排斥关系，并颠覆性地将Planckian弛豫归因于量子统计而非散射机制，为理解高温超导正常态的普适输运规律提供了全
该工作利用有限温度Lanczos方法，对二维t-J模型的直流和频率依赖电导率进行了数值精确计算，以探究奇异金属行为的微观起源。研究发现，只要反铁磁序被抑制，奇异金属性在温度-掺杂相图中普遍存在；并指出Planckian弛豫行为并非源于载流子的散射特性，而是根植于电荷响应的量子统计本性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用有限温度Lanczos方法，对二维t-J模型的直流和频率依赖电导率进行了数值精确计算，以探究奇异金属行为的微观起源。研究发现，只要反铁磁序被抑制，奇异金属性在温度-掺杂相图中普遍存在；并指出Planckian弛豫行为并非源于载流子的散射特性，而是根植于电荷响应的量子统计本性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2412.04322v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Metals hosting strong electronic interactions, including high-temperature superconductors, behave in ways that do not conform to normal Fermi liquid theory. To pinpoint the microscopic origin of this strange metal behavior, here we reexamine the d.c. and frequency-dependent conductivity of the two-dimensional t-J model taking advantage of recent improvements made on the finite temperature Lanczos method, enabling numerically exact calculations at unprecedentedly low temperatures and high spectral resolution. We find that strange metallicity is pervasive in the temperature-doping phase diagram whenever anti-ferromagnetic order is suppressed, and advocate that key insights on Planckian relaxation can be gained by extending the study to the frequency and time domain. Our results indicate that Planckian behavior does not originate from the scattering properties of the current carriers, being instead rooted in the quantum statistical nature of the charge response.

123

Fe/Si多层膜中持续存在的非关联磁畴及其通过掺入¹¹B₄C的抑制#

Persistent Uncorrelated Magnetic Domains in Fe/Si Multilayers and their suppression by incorporating 11B4C
📚 arXiv👤 Anton Zubayer, Artur Glavic, Naureen Ghafoor, Yuqing Ge, Yasmine Sassa, Martin Månsson, Andreas Suter, Thomas Prokscha, Zaher Salman, Wai-Tung Lee, Kristbjörg Anna Thórarinsdóttir, Arnaud Le Febvrier, Per Eklund, Jens Birch, Fridrik Magnus, Sean Langridge, Andrew Caruana, Christy Kinane, Fredrik Eriksson📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示Fe/Si多层膜中面外非关联磁畴的演化机制，发现B₄C掺杂可有效抑制磁畴非关联性并降低饱和磁场；同时开创性地将低能μ⁺SR技术引入极化中子光学多层膜表征，为调控多层膜磁构型、优化中子光学
该研究利用自旋翻转非镜面极化中子反射谱研究了Fe/Si和Fe/Si+B₄C多层膜的磁畴结构。结果表明，Fe/Si多层膜存在显著的面外非关联磁畴，随外场增加逐渐合并并转向均匀磁态；而掺入B₄C后，多层膜在更低磁场下即可达到磁饱和。研究还首次对极化中子光学多层膜进行了低能μ⁺SR测量，以进一步探测其磁行为。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用自旋翻转非镜面极化中子反射谱研究了Fe/Si和Fe/Si+B₄C多层膜的磁畴结构。结果表明，Fe/Si多层膜存在显著的面外非关联磁畴，随外场增加逐渐合并并转向均匀磁态；而掺入B₄C后，多层膜在更低磁场下即可达到磁饱和。研究还首次对极化中子光学多层膜进行了低能μ⁺SR测量，以进一步探测其磁行为。

English Abstract

arXiv:2502.07515v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: This study investigates magnetic domains in Fe/Si and Fe/Si + B4C multilayers using spin flip off-specular polarized neutron reflectometry. The results show that Fe/Si multilayers exhibit pronounced spin flip off-specular scattering originating from magnetic domains that are uncorrelated out of plane. With increasing external magnetic field the domains progressively coalesce and their magnetization rotates toward alignment with the applied field, approaching a homogeneous magnetic state at higher fields. In contrast, Fe/Si + B4C multilayers exhibit no detectable spin flip off-specular scattering already at low fields, indicating that the multilayer reaches magnetic saturation at significantly lower applied fields. The scattering patterns are interpreted using distorted wave Born approximation simulations in BornAgain, enabled by our added code for simulating magnetic domains and magnetic ordering. To further probe the magnetic behavior, low-energy mu+SR measurements were performed, representing the first mu+SR investigation of polarizing neutron optics multilayers. Together with comparison to previously reported VSM data, these measurements provide insight into the magnetic behavior across short range, medium range, and long range length scales. The results show that incorporating approximately 15 vol.% B4C makes the magnetic configuration highly responsive to external magnetic fields, with clear sensitivity to both in-plane and out-of-plane field geometries. These results show that B4C suppresses magnetic domains and spin flip off-specular scattering, improving Fe/Si coatings for neutron polarization optics in regards to off-specular scattering, and other applications requiring easy magnetic manipulation.

124

NiTiO₃中铁轴序诱导的拉曼光学活性#

Raman Optical Activity Induced by Ferroaxial Order in NiTiO₃
📚 arXiv👤 Gakuto Kusuno, Takeshi Hayashida, Takayuki Nagai, Hikaru Watanabe, Rikuto Oiwa, Tsuyoshi Kimura, Takuya Satoh📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：在中心对称非磁性材料NiTiO₃中首次观测到由铁轴序本征诱导的拉曼光学活性，突破传统ROA需手性分子或磁场的限制，为探测中心对称体系中的铁轴序提供了全新光谱手段。
该工作在中心对称、非磁性的铁轴晶体NiTiO₃中观测到了拉曼光学活性（ROA）。通过圆偏振拉曼光谱，发现交叉圆偏振构型下存在显著的ROA信号，且与铁轴畴结构相关。对称性分析、第一性原理声子计算及紧束缚模型计算表明，该天然ROA源于铁轴序，即使在电偶极近似下依然存在，确立了ROA作为探测中心对称体系中铁轴序的有力手段。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在中心对称、非磁性的铁轴晶体NiTiO₃中观测到了拉曼光学活性（ROA）。通过圆偏振拉曼光谱，发现交叉圆偏振构型下存在显著的ROA信号，且与铁轴畴结构相关。对称性分析、第一性原理声子计算及紧束缚模型计算表明，该天然ROA源于铁轴序，即使在电偶极近似下依然存在，确立了ROA作为探测中心对称体系中铁轴序的有力手段。

English Abstract

arXiv:2505.22488v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Raman optical activity (ROA), the dependence of Raman intensity on the circular polarization of incident and scattered light, has traditionally been observed in chiral molecules and magnetic materials, where inversion or time-reversal symmetry is broken. Here we demonstrate that ROA can also arise in a centrosymmetric and non-magnetic ferroaxial crystal. Using circularly polarized Raman spectroscopy on single-crystalline NiTiO₃, we observed a pronounced ROA signal in the cross-circular polarization configurations, which correlates with the ferroaxial domain structure. Our symmetry analysis, first-principles calculations of phonons, and tight-binding model calculations reveal that the natural ROA originates from the ferroaxial order and persists even within the electric dipole approximation. These results establish ROA as a powerful probe of ferroaxial order in centrosymmetric systems.

125

二维自旋-1/2模型中的经典分形子自旋液体与希尔伯特空间碎裂#

Classical fracton spin liquid and Hilbert space fragmentation in a 2D spin-1/2 model
📚 arXiv👤 Nils Niggemann, Meghadeepa Adhikary, Yannik Schaden-Thillmann, Johannes Reuther📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在严格自旋-1/2约束下实现经典分形子液体，创新性地揭示张量高斯定律的鲁棒性；同时发现希尔伯特空间碎裂会抑制量子隧穿，为理解分形子相的量子化障碍提供关键洞见，对量子自旋液体和拓扑物态设计具有
该研究通过在方格子上对高阶规范理论进行直接离散化，构造了一个简单的自旋模型，实现了经典的U(1)分形子自旋液体。该模型具有广延的基态简并度，并满足有效张量高斯定律。通过对经典Ising基态流形的采样，作者证明了在严格满足自旋-1/2长度约束时张量高斯定律仍然成立；但同时发现微扰量子效应不足以在经典基态间有效隧穿，导致严重的希尔伯特空间碎裂，掩盖了分形子量子行为。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究通过在方格子上对高阶规范理论进行直接离散化，构造了一个简单的自旋模型，实现了经典的U(1)分形子自旋液体。该模型具有广延的基态简并度，并满足有效张量高斯定律。通过对经典Ising基态流形的采样，作者证明了在严格满足自旋-1/2长度约束时张量高斯定律仍然成立；但同时发现微扰量子效应不足以在经典基态间有效隧穿，导致严重的希尔伯特空间碎裂，掩盖了分形子量子行为。

English Abstract

arXiv:2508.06606v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Classical U(1) fracton spin liquids feature an extensive ground state degeneracy and follow an effective description in terms of a tensor Gauss' law where charges, so-called fractons, have restricted mobility. Here we introduce a simple spin model that realizes such a state by straightforward discretization of the higher-rank gauge theory on a square lattice. The simplicity of this construction offers direct insights into the system's fundamental fractonic properties, such as real-space fracton configurations, height-field representation of the classical ground state manifold as well as properties of local and non-local fluctuations within the fracton-free subspace. By sampling classical Ising states from the extensive ground state manifold, we show that the effective tensor Gauss' law remains intact when explicitly enforcing the spin-1/2 length constraint, demonstrating the existence of a classical Ising fracton spin liquid. However, we observe that perturbative quantum effects are insufficient to efficiently tunnel between classical ground states, leading to severe Hilbert space fragmentation which obscures fractonic quantum behavior. Specifically, by simulating the spin-1/2 quantum model with Green function Monte Carlo as a function of the Rokhsar-Kivelson potential, we find that the system supports either magnetic long-range order or a classical spin liquid. Our findings highlight the crucial role of Hilbert-space fragmentation in fractonic spin systems but also indicate ways to mitigate such effects via increasing the spin magnitude to S=1, investigated in a companion paper.

126

非厄米趋肤效应与电子非局域输运#

Non-Hermitian skin effect and electronic nonlocal transport
📚 arXiv👤 Carlos Payá, Oliver Solow, Elsa Prada, Ramón Aguado, Karsten Flensberg📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作将非厄米趋肤效应从拓扑光子学拓展至固态电子体系，核心创新在于提出非局域电导的非互易性可作为探测该效应的"指纹"——局域测量无法区分，而非局域输运能直接捕捉边界条件依赖的异常点演化。这为实验验证开
该工作研究了与铁磁引线耦合的Rashba纳米线中的非厄米趋肤效应，提出可通过非局域输运谱学探测该效应：局域电导保持对称，而非局域电导呈现非互易性。作者还解释了从周期边界到开放边界条件转变时例外点在参数空间中移动的现象。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究了与铁磁引线耦合的Rashba纳米线中的非厄米趋肤效应，提出可通过非局域输运谱学探测该效应：局域电导保持对称，而非局域电导呈现非互易性。作者还解释了从周期边界到开放边界条件转变时例外点在参数空间中移动的现象。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.00921v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Open quantum systems governed by non-Hermitian effective Hamiltonians exhibit unique phenomena, such as the non-Hermitian skin effect, where eigenstates localize at system boundaries. We investigate this effect in a Rashba nanowire coupled to a ferromagnetic lead and demonstrate that it can be detected via nonlocal transport spectroscopy: while local conductance remains symmetric, the nonlocal conductance becomes nonreciprocal. We account for this behavior using both conventional transport arguments and the framework of non-Hermitian physics. Furthermore, we explain that exceptional points shift in parameter space when transitioning from periodic to open boundary conditions, a phenomenon observed in other non-Hermitian systems but so far not explained. Our results establish transport spectroscopy as a tool to probe non-Hermitian effects in open electronic systems.

127

Nagaoka铁磁体的坏金属行为与Lifshitz转变#

Bad metal behavior and Lifshitz transition of a Nagaoka ferromagnet
📚 arXiv👤 Jonas Arnold, Peter Kopietz, Andreas Rückriegel📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在无限大U Hubbard模型中建立完整相图，揭示Nagaoka铁磁体具有坏金属特性及Lifshitz转变驱动的双regime结构，为理解掺杂莫特绝缘体中的反常输运与磁性关联提供了严格理论框
该工作利用费米子泛函重正化群方法研究了无限大在位排斥Hubbard模型的相图与电子谱函数。对于最近邻跃迁的方格晶格，基态随电子密度从低密度的顺磁费米液体，经中间密度的反铁磁条纹序，演变为高密度的扩展Nagaoka铁磁体；铁磁区中存在由Lifshitz转变分隔的两个不同regime。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用费米子泛函重正化群方法研究了无限大在位排斥Hubbard模型的相图与电子谱函数。对于最近邻跃迁的方格晶格，基态随电子密度从低密度的顺磁费米液体，经中间密度的反铁磁条纹序，演变为高密度的扩展Nagaoka铁磁体；铁磁区中存在由Lifshitz转变分隔的两个不同regime。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.01909v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Using an extension of the fermionic functional renormalization group for systems where strong correlations give rise to projected Hilbert spaces we calculate the phase diagram and the electronic spectral function of the Hubbard model at infinite on-site repulsion. For a square lattice with nearest-neighbor hopping we find that the ground state evolves from a paramagnetic Fermi liquid at low densities via a state with antiferromagnetic stripe order at intermediate densities to an extended Nagaoka ferromagnet at high densities. The single-particle spectral function of the Nagaoka ferromagnet exhibits a flat but rather broad band characteristic for an incoherent non-Fermi liquid. We identify two distinct ferromagnetic regimes separated by a Lifshitz transition.

128

超导/反铁磁/超导异质结构在太赫兹频段的超强磁子-光子耦合#

Ultrastrong magnon-photon coupling in superconductor/antiferromagnet/superconductor heterostructures at terahertz frequencies
📚 arXiv👤 V. M. Gordeeva, Yanmeng Lei, Xiyin Ye, G. A. Bobkov, A. M. Bobkov, Tao Yu, I. V. Bobkova📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将超导引入反铁磁光子学体系，突破传统磁子-光子耦合强度瓶颈，实现太赫兹频段超强耦合与磁场可调的杂化模式；为超导自旋电子学及量子信息处理提供了新平台，兼具基础物理探索与高频器件应用价值。
该工作从量子与经典双重视角预言了超导/反铁磁/超导异质结构中太赫兹频段的超强磁子-光子耦合，耦合强度约100 GHz，超过反铁磁共振频率的10%。外加磁场可激活两个反铁磁模式与光子的耦合；超导层还能调控磁子-极化激元的自旋与群速度，实现对反铁磁中磁子输运的有效调控。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作从量子与经典双重视角预言了超导/反铁磁/超导异质结构中太赫兹频段的超强磁子-光子耦合，耦合强度约100 GHz，超过反铁磁共振频率的10%。外加磁场可激活两个反铁磁模式与光子的耦合；超导层还能调控磁子-极化激元的自旋与群速度，实现对反铁磁中磁子输运的有效调控。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.24264v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We predict the realization of ultrastrong coupling between magnons of antiferromagnets and photons in superconductor/antiferromagnet/superconductor heterostructures at terahertz frequencies, from both quantum and classical perspectives. The hybridization of the two magnon modes with photons strongly depends on the applied magnetic field: at zero magnetic field, only a single antiferromagnetic mode with a lower frequency couples to the photon, forming a magnon-polariton, while using a magnetic field activates coupling for both antiferromagnetic modes. The coupling between magnon and photon is ultrastrong with the coupling constant sim 100 GHz exceeding 10% of the antiferromagnetic resonant frequency. The superconductor modulates the spin of the resulting magnon-polaritons and the group velocity, achieving values amounting to several tenths of the speed of light, which promises strong tunability of magnon transport in antiferromagnets by superconductors.

129

来自Bloch态轨道磁矩的轨道霍尔效应：一项新修正项的作用#

Orbital Hall effect from orbital magnetic moments of Bloch states: the role of a new correction term
📚 arXiv👤 Tarik P. Cysne, Ivo Souza, Tatiana G. Rappoport📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作修正了Bloch态轨道磁矩的矩阵元理论，发现被忽略的Berry联络项产生两项新贡献：一项保证规范协变性，另一项显著降低轨道霍尔电导。这为准确预言过渡金属硫族化合物和偏置双层石墨烯等体系的轨道霍尔
该工作严格推导了Bloch态轨道磁矩的矩阵元公式，补入了前人工作中忽略的Berry联络项，识别出两项新贡献：一项恢复非简并态的规范协变性，另一项则提供可观的定量修正。在2H过渡金属硫族化合物双层和偏置双层石墨烯中，这些修正项均降低了轨道霍尔电导平台值。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作严格推导了Bloch态轨道磁矩的矩阵元公式，补入了前人工作中忽略的Berry联络项，识别出两项新贡献：一项恢复非简并态的规范协变性，另一项则提供可观的定量修正。在2H过渡金属硫族化合物双层和偏置双层石墨烯中，这些修正项均降低了轨道霍尔电导平台值。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.03901v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We present a rigorous derivation of the matrix elements of the orbital magnetic moment (OMM) of Bloch states. Our calculations include the Berry connection term in the k-derivatives of Bloch states, which was omitted in previous works. The resulting formula for the OMM matrix elements applies to any non-degenerate Bloch states within Hilbert space. We identify two new contributions: the first restores gauge covariance for non-degenerate states, while the second, being itself gauge covariant, can provide significant quantitative corrections depending on the system under study. We examine their impact on the orbital Hall effect in two bilayer systems: a 2H transition metal dichalcogenide bilayer and a biased bilayer graphene. In both cases, these new terms reduce the orbital Hall conductivity plateau compared with results that neglect them, suggesting that multi-layered van der Waals materials may be particularly susceptible to the derived OMM corrections. Our findings may contribute to the formal understanding of electronic OMM transport and to the conceptual foundations of the emerging field of orbitronics.

130

ESS新谱仪提案：Njord与Remora#

Proposal for a new spectrometer at ESS: Njord and Remora
📚 arXiv👤 E. Fogh, N. L. Amin, G. S. Tucker, M. Aouane, R. Georgii, J. Voigt, R. Toft-Petersen📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该提案针对ESS中子散射瓶颈，创新性地设计Njord谱仪实现亮度-紧束聚焦以提升小样品通量，同时以Remora回收剩余谱窗扩展束流利用率。双谱仪协同突破了极端环境下样品尺寸与测量时间的双重限制，为量子
该提案为欧洲散裂中子源（ESS）提出了一对配套谱仪Njord和Remora，以解决小样品、弱信号及极端样品环境（如高压腔、高场低温磁体）下的中子散射瓶颈。Njord通过将亮度聚焦成紧束以提升通量，Remora则利用剩余谱窗增加一台互补谱仪以扩展束流时间。该提案旨在突破现有仪器在样品尺寸和测量时间上的实际限制，推动金属有机框架、有机超导体、量子磁体等材料的研究。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该提案为欧洲散裂中子源（ESS）提出了一对配套谱仪Njord和Remora，以解决小样品、弱信号及极端样品环境（如高压腔、高场低温磁体）下的中子散射瓶颈。Njord通过将亮度聚焦成紧束以提升通量，Remora则利用剩余谱窗增加一台互补谱仪以扩展束流时间。该提案旨在突破现有仪器在样品尺寸和测量时间上的实际限制，推动金属有机框架、有机超导体、量子磁体等材料的研究。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11383v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Many of the most interesting scientific subjects are also the hardest to study with neutrons. Metal-organic frameworks, organic superconductors, quantum magnets, pressure-tuned materials, are systems where the relevant signals are weak, the samples are tiny, or the experiments need extreme sample environments such as pressure cells and high-field cryomagnets. Existing instruments often run into practical limits before the science is exhausted. For some questions the samples are simply too small; for others, the signal is buried in background or the required measurement time becomes prohibitive. This is both a scientific opportunity and a challenge for the European neutron scattering community. We present Njord and Remora as a paired instrument concept for the European Spallation Source (ESS). The proposal focuses on two linked problems: important science cases are being limited by neutron flux and sample geometry, and the community also needs more beamtime. Njord addresses the first by pushing the available brightness into a tightly focused beam, while Remora uses the remaining spectral window to add a complementary spectrometer on the same beamport.

131

手性纳米线中的电流驱动对称性破缺与自旋-轨道极化#

Current-Driven Symmetry Breaking and Spin-Orbit Polarization in Chiral Wires
📚 arXiv👤 Uiseok Jeong, Daniel Hill, Binghai Yan, Angel Rubio, Carsten A. Ullrich, Noejung Park📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次利用rt-TDDFT非微扰模拟揭示手性纳米线中电流驱动的动态对称性破缺机制，发现超阈值电流可解除时间反演对称性并诱导自旋-轨道极化，将动量耗散与手性诱导自旋选择效应关联，为低功耗自旋电子器件
该工作采用从头算实时含时密度泛函理论（rt-TDDFT）直接模拟手性分子体系中电荷电流、自旋与轨道之间的非微扰相互作用。研究发现当电流超过临界阈值时，时间反演对称性约束被动态解除，导致显著的自旋和轨道极化，且该现象与平移动量的损失相关，为手性诱导自旋选择效应和自旋电子学应用提供了新见解。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用从头算实时含时密度泛函理论（rt-TDDFT）直接模拟手性分子体系中电荷电流、自旋与轨道之间的非微扰相互作用。研究发现当电流超过临界阈值时，时间反演对称性约束被动态解除，导致显著的自旋和轨道极化，且该现象与平移动量的损失相关，为手性诱导自旋选择效应和自旋电子学应用提供了新见解。

English Abstract

arXiv:2508.19519v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The spin dynamics of electrons in chiral molecular systems remains a topic of intense interest, particularly regarding whether geometric chirality inherently induces spin polarization or simply modulates spin transport. In this work, we employ ab initio real-time time-dependent density functional theory (rt-TDDFT) to directly simulate the interplay between charge current, spin, and orbital. This real-time tracking goes beyond perturbative treatments, and we analyze how nonequilibrium currents effectively lift the symmetry constraints of screw-rotation and time-reversal symmetry. We find that above a critical current threshold, time-reversal symmetry constraints are dynamically lifted -- leading to pronounced spin and orbital polarizations, even when the underlying Hamiltonian remains symmetric. Notably, the emergence of spin and orbital angular momenta dynamics correlates with a loss of translational (linear) momentum, suggesting a redistribution of angular degrees of freedom as an intrinsic consequence of a current-driven symmetry lowering in a chiral system, with implications for chirality-induced spin selectivity and spintronic device design.

132

反铁磁FeGe中锥态与电荷密度波的磁弹性特征#

Magnetoelastic signatures of the conical state and charge density waves in antiferromagnetic FeGe
📚 arXiv👤 L. Prodan, J. Sourd, S. Zherlitsyn, L. Chioncel📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在kagome反铁磁体FeGe中解耦了磁涨落与电荷密度波两种能量尺度，创新性地利用超声探测交换重整化磁刚度的场依赖软化行为，建立了磁刚度调控自旋-晶格耦合的微观图像，为拓扑磁性材料中集体激发
该研究在非共线kagome磁体FeGe中识别出两个 distinct 能量尺度：约35 K的可磁场调谐的磁涨落通道（关联于锥态）和约100 K的与磁场无关的电荷密度波涨落通道。超声测量直接探测到交换重整化的磁刚度，其软化主导了声学异常并遵循对称性约束的二次场依赖关系。研究进一步预言了固定场下中子衍射强度的线性温度依赖和固定温度下的二次场抑制，确立了磁刚度作为自旋-晶格动力学关键控制参数，并将超声定位为耦合集体模式的灵敏探针。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在非共线kagome磁体FeGe中识别出两个 distinct 能量尺度：约35 K的可磁场调谐的磁涨落通道（关联于锥态）和约100 K的与磁场无关的电荷密度波涨落通道。超声测量直接探测到交换重整化的磁刚度，其软化主导了声学异常并遵循对称性约束的二次场依赖关系。研究进一步预言了固定场下中子衍射强度的线性温度依赖和固定温度下的二次场抑制，确立了磁刚度作为自旋-晶格动力学关键控制参数，并将超声定位为耦合集体模式的灵敏探针。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.05734v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Kagome systems host intertwined spin, charge, and lattice degrees of freedom that drive emergent collective states. Here, we identify two distinct energy scales in the noncollinear kagome magnet FeGe: a field-tunable magnetic fluctuation channel at sim 35~K associated with the conical state, and a field-independent channel at sim 100~K linked to charge-density-wave fluctuations. Ultrasound measurements provide direct access to the exchange-renormalized magnetic stiffness, whose softening governs the acoustic anomaly and follows a symmetry-constrained quadratic field dependence. We further predict a linear temperature dependence of neutron diffraction intensities at fixed field and a quadratic field suppression at fixed temperature. These results identify magnetic stiffness as a key control parameter of spin-lattice dynamics and establish ultrasound as a sensitive probe of coupled collective modes.

133

通过解耦剪切与压缩声子理解反常磁热输运#

Understanding Anomalous Magnetothermal Transport via Disentangling Shear and Compression Phonons
📚 arXiv👤 Haoting Xu, Antoine Matar, Hae-Young Kee📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究的核心创新在于揭示对称性约束下剪切/压缩声子与自旋算符的模式选择性耦合机制，突破传统声子热输运图像；通过Landauer理论与精确对角化相结合，首次从微观层面解释了自旋-轨道耦合Mott绝缘体中
该工作推导了强自旋-轨道耦合极限下的有效自旋-声子哈密顿量，其中不同偏振的声子选择性地与不同自旋算符耦合，表明对称性约束的自旋-晶格耦合自然导致模式选择的自旋-声子相互作用。压缩和剪切声子模式在不同磁场区间对自旋热流产生贡献。结合Landauer输运框架与自旋链-声子浴的精确对角化，该机制再现了热流场依赖中特征性的峰-谷-峰结构，为自旋-轨道耦合Mott绝缘体中场诱导输运反常提供了微观解释。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作推导了强自旋-轨道耦合极限下的有效自旋-声子哈密顿量，其中不同偏振的声子选择性地与不同自旋算符耦合，表明对称性约束的自旋-晶格耦合自然导致模式选择的自旋-声子相互作用。压缩和剪切声子模式在不同磁场区间对自旋热流产生贡献。结合Landauer输运框架与自旋链-声子浴的精确对角化，该机制再现了热流场依赖中特征性的峰-谷-峰结构，为自旋-轨道耦合Mott绝缘体中场诱导输运反常提供了微观解释。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.18137v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Magnetothermal transport in various frustrated magnets exhibits striking field-dependent anomalies that deviate from conventional magnon or phonon transport. To understand such anomalies, we derive an effective spin-phonon Hamiltonian in which phonons with different polarizations couple selectively to distinct spin operators in the strong spin-orbit coupling limit, and show that symmetry-constrained spin-lattice coupling naturally leads to mode-selective spin-phonon interactions. As a result, compression and shear phonon modes contribute to spin heat current across different magnetic-field regimes. Using a Landauer transport framework combined with exact diagonalization of spin chains coupled to a phonon bath, we show that this mechanism produces a characteristic peak-dip-peak structure in the field dependence of heat current, providing a microscopic explanation for field-induced transport anomalies in spin-orbit-coupled Mott insulators.

134

CrSBr中的自旋-声子重整化#

Spin-Phonon Renormalization in CrSBr
📚 arXiv👤 Jayajeewana N. Ranhili, Chamini S. Pathiraja, Brody Brogdon, John Cenker, Xiadong Xu, Daniel Chica, Xavier Roy, Stefano Agrestini, Mirian Garcia-Fernandez, Ke-Jin Zhou, Yi-De Chuang, Trinanjan Datta, Byron Freelon📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次利用RIXS直接观测到CrSBr中自旋-声子耦合的实验证据，揭示了低温反铁磁序对光学声子能量的重整化效应，为理解二维磁体的磁弹性相互作用及自旋-晶格动力学提供了关键微观机制。
该研究通过温度依赖的Cr L边共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）光谱，直接实验证实了CrSBr中的自旋-声子耦合。仅在低温反铁磁相中观测到布里渊区中心的光学声子能量损失峰，能量分别约为43.5 meV（σ偏振沿a轴）、43.1 meV（σ偏振沿b轴）和42.1 meV（π偏振）。密度泛函理论和声子计算确认这些模式为键弯曲光学声子，而室温下低能RIXS峰的消失可用L边电子-声子RIXS机制中的自旋-声子重整化效应解释。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究通过温度依赖的Cr L边共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）光谱，直接实验证实了CrSBr中的自旋-声子耦合。仅在低温反铁磁相中观测到布里渊区中心的光学声子能量损失峰，能量分别约为43.5 meV（σ偏振沿a轴）、43.1 meV（σ偏振沿b轴）和42.1 meV（π偏振）。密度泛函理论和声子计算确认这些模式为键弯曲光学声子，而室温下低能RIXS峰的消失可用L边电子-声子RIXS机制中的自旋-声子重整化效应解释。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.06042v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Direct experimental evidence of spin-phonon coupling in CrSBr is provided by the temperature dependent Cr L-edge resonant inelastic x-ray scattering (RIXS) spectra. Zone-center optical phonons are observed exclusively in the low-temperature antiferromagnetic phase as energy loss features. These phonon modes have energies of approximately, 43.5 meV and 43.1 meV for x-rays that are σ-polarized along the a and b axes, respectively. While a phonon mode of approximately 42.1 meV is observed under π-polarization. Density functional theory and phonon mode calculations identify these features as bond-bending optical phonon modes arising in the RIXS spectra. Room temperature melting of these low-energy RIXS peaks is explained in terms of a spin-phonon renormalization effect on the L-edge electron-phonon RIXS mechanism.

135

非厄米Josephson结中Andreev能级虚部产生的超电流#

Supercurrent from the imaginary part of the Andreev levels in non-Hermitian Josephson junctions
📚 arXiv👤 Roberto Capecelatro, Marco Marciani, Gabriele Campagnano, Roberta Citro, Procolo Lucignano📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示非厄米Josephson结中Andreev能级虚部可产生新型超电流贡献，其物理根源在于类时间反演对称性破缺；该发现拓展了Josephson效应的理论框架，并为非厄米拓扑超导体系的实验探测
该研究探讨了耦合到铁磁金属库并置于外磁场中的超导体-量子点-超导体Josephson结的非厄米电子输运性质。有效非厄米哈密顿量的复本征值编码了Andreev准束缚态的能量（实部）和展宽（虚部）。将Andreev电流公式推广到非厄米情形时，出现一项正比于能级展宽相位导数的新贡献，在谱中存在 exceptional points 时尤为显著。作者识别了可清晰突显该新电流项的最优Andreev谱构型，并提出了实验探测方案，指出能级虚部的相位…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究探讨了耦合到铁磁金属库并置于外磁场中的超导体-量子点-超导体Josephson结的非厄米电子输运性质。有效非厄米哈密顿量的复本征值编码了Andreev准束缚态的能量（实部）和展宽（虚部）。将Andreev电流公式推广到非厄米情形时，出现一项正比于能级展宽相位导数的新贡献，在谱中存在 exceptional points 时尤为显著。作者识别了可清晰突显该新电流项的最优Andreev谱构型，并提出了实验探测方案，指出能级虚部的相位依赖源于类时间反演对称性的破缺。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.24745v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We investigate the electronic transport properties of a superconductor-quantum dot-superconductor Josephson junction coupled to a ferromagnetic metal reservoir in the presence of an external magnetic field. The device is described by an effective non-Hermitian Hamiltonian, whose complex eigenvalues encode the energy (real part) and the broadening (imaginary part) of the Andreev quasi-bound states. When extending the Andreev current formula to the non-Hermitian case, a novel contribution arises that is proportional to the phase derivative of the levels broadening. This term becomes particularly relevant in the presence of exceptional points (EPs) in the spectrum, but its experimental detection is not straightforward. We identify optimal Andreev spectrum configurations where this novel current contribution can be clearly highlighted, and we outline an experimental protocol for its detection. We point out that the phase dependence in the levels imaginary part originates from the breaking of a time-reversal-like symmetry. In particular, spectral configurations in the broken phase of the symmetry and without EPs can be obtained, where this novel contribution can be easily resolved. The proposed protocol would allow to probe for the first time a fingerprint of non-Hermiticity in open junctions that is not strictly related to the presence of EPs.

136

自旋环流诱导的拓扑近藤绝缘体#

Topological Kondo Insulator from Spin Loop Currents
📚 arXiv👤 Andreas Gleis, Kevin Lucht, Po-Jui Chen, Daniele Guerci, Andrew J Millis, J. H. Pixley📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地揭示非局域关联诱导的量子几何自旋环流可解除对称性强制能带交叠，将补偿半金属驱动为完全能隙化的拓扑近藤绝缘体，为理解转角过渡金属硫化物中观测到的拓扑-平庸转变提供了内禀关联机制，拓展了拓扑
该研究指出，AB堆垛MoTe₂/WSe₂双层在空穴填充ν=2时每莫尔单胞可实现拓扑近藤绝缘体。仅考虑局域关联时，莫尔能带结构的对称性会将能带反转与能带交叠绑定，导致补偿型拓扑半金属；而非局域相互作用可诱导内禀的、由量子几何驱动的自旋环流，反馈到有效能带结构上，消除偶然简并并打开全能隙，从而形成完全能隙化的拓扑近藤绝缘体。研究结合实频动力学平均场理论与Hartree-Fock计算，结果与近期实验观测到的拓扑-平庸转变相符。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究指出，AB堆垛MoTe₂/WSe₂双层在空穴填充ν=2时每莫尔单胞可实现拓扑近藤绝缘体。仅考虑局域关联时，莫尔能带结构的对称性会将能带反转与能带交叠绑定，导致补偿型拓扑半金属；而非局域相互作用可诱导内禀的、由量子几何驱动的自旋环流，反馈到有效能带结构上，消除偶然简并并打开全能隙，从而形成完全能隙化的拓扑近藤绝缘体。研究结合实频动力学平均场理论与Hartree-Fock计算，结果与近期实验观测到的拓扑-平庸转变相符。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11739v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We demonstrate that interacting electrons in AB-stacked MoTe₂/WSe₂ realize a topological Kondo insulator at hole filling ν=2 per moiré unit cell. In the presence of only local correlations, a symmetry of the moiré-scale bandstructure enforces a compensated topological semimetal by tying band inversion to band overlap. We show that non-local interactions change the physics qualitatively, since they allow intrinsic, quantum-geometry-induced spin loop currents to feed back on the effective bandstructure, which lift the remaining accidental degeneracies and open a full gap in the spectrum, leading to a fully gapped topological Kondo insulator. We establish this using real-frequency dynamical mean-field theory to capture Kondo physics alongside Hartree-Fock for non-local interactions. The topological Kondo insulator emerges at intermediate displacement fields, where strong correlations manifest through an enhanced spin susceptibility, a suppressed charge susceptibility, and a stronger thermal dependence of the resistivity. Our results are in good agreement with recent experiments on MoTe₂/WSe₂ bilayers demonstrating topological to trivial phase transitions controlled by the displacement field.

137

驱动磁子-光子系统作为可调谐量子热整流器#

Driven Magnon-Photon System as a Tunable Quantum Heat Rectifier
📚 arXiv👤 C. O. Edet, K. Słowik, N. Ali, M. Asjad, O. Abah📅 2026-04-14⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将非对称外部驱动引入磁子-光子混合系统，突破了传统热整流依赖材料本征非对称性的局限，实现了整流参数在全范围内动态可调，为量子热器件的主动控制开辟了新范式。
该研究探讨了一个与两个不同温度热浴接触、且磁子子系统受到非对称外部驱动的混合磁子-光子系统中的量子热输运。作者发现，外部驱动为调控稳态热流及其不对称性提供了灵活手段：在磁子-光子杂化较弱且磁子驱动较强的 regime 下，系统出现强热整流效应，外部驱动可同时控制热流的大小与方向，使整流参数可在整个物理允许范围内调谐。该结果为量子热管理和量子信息处理中的热流控制提供了新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究探讨了一个与两个不同温度热浴接触、且磁子子系统受到非对称外部驱动的混合磁子-光子系统中的量子热输运。作者发现，外部驱动为调控稳态热流及其不对称性提供了灵活手段：在磁子-光子杂化较弱且磁子驱动较强的 regime 下，系统出现强热整流效应，外部驱动可同时控制热流的大小与方向，使整流参数可在整个物理允许范围内调谐。该结果为量子热管理和量子信息处理中的热流控制提供了新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2503.06301v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Controlling heat flow at the quantum level is a key challenge for next-generation quantum technologies, including thermal management and quantum information processing. Here, we investigate quantum heat transport in an asymmetrically driven hybrid magnon-photon system in contact with two thermal baths at different temperatures. We demonstrate that external driving of the magnonic subsystem provides a versatile control knob for tailoring steady-state heat currents and their asymmetry. We identify the mechanisms governing thermal rectification in the hybrid system: we find that strong rectification emerges in the regime of weak magnon-photon hybridization combined with intense magnon driving. In this regime, the external drive enables control over both the magnitude and direction of the heat current, allowing the rectification parameter to be tuned across its entire physically accessible range.

138

镝与铋双(锡杂环戊二烯)配合物的单分子磁体行为对比#

Contrasting single-molecule magnet behaviour in dysprosium and terbium bis(stannolediide) complexes
📚 Nature Chemistry👤 Xiaofei Sun, Alexander Hinz, Stefanie Maier, Sebastian Gillhuber 等12位作者📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本工作创新性地将双负离子锡杂环戊二烯配体引入单分子磁体设计，突破传统环戊二烯基体系。Dy(III)配合物实现1502 K超高磁反转能垒与55 K阻塞温度，为高密度信息存储材料开辟新配体平台，推动镧系磁
用于高密度数据存储的单分子磁体的发展已从多金属笼状化合物推进到镧系配合物。自2017年以来，高轴向性的二(环戊二烯基)镝配合物展现出优异的磁反转能垒（Ueff）和高矫顽温度（TH），2025年通过使用大位阻酰胺配体进一步提升了性能。近期，双负离子重第14族环戊二烯化物因其更高的电荷密度而成为有前景的配体。本文报道了两个同构型纯配位双(锡杂环戊二烯二价负离子)配合物[Ln(η5-LSn)2K(thf)4]（Ln = Tb(III)或Dy…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

用于高密度数据存储的单分子磁体的发展已从多金属笼状化合物推进到镧系配合物。自2017年以来，高轴向性的二(环戊二烯基)镝配合物展现出优异的磁反转能垒（Ueff）和高矫顽温度（TH），2025年通过使用大位阻酰胺配体进一步提升了性能。近期，双负离子重第14族环戊二烯化物因其更高的电荷密度而成为有前景的配体。本文报道了两个同构型纯配位双(锡杂环戊二烯二价负离子)配合物[Ln(η5-LSn)2K(thf)4]（Ln = Tb(III)或Dy(III)）的合成。Dy(III)配合物表现出单分子磁体行为，Ueff为1,502(4) K，阻塞温度为55 K，而Tb(III)类似物则显示拉曼主导的弛豫（<~6 K）。去除钾阳离子得到[Tb(η5-LSn)2]−或二价配合物[Dy(η5-LSn)2]2−。Dy(II)配合物呈现弱磁各向异性。这些结果凸显了双(锡杂环戊二烯二价负离子)配体作为高势垒镧系单分子磁体的一类有前景的新配体。

English Abstract

The development of single-molecule magnets for high-density data storage has advanced from poly(metallic) cages to lanthanide complexes. Since 2017, highly axial dysprosium bis(cyclopentadienide) complexes have demonstrated exceptional energy barriers to magnetic reversal (Ueff) and high hysteresis temperatures (TH), with further enhancement achieved in 2025 using bulky amide ligands. Recently, dianionic heavy group 14 cyclopentadienides have emerged as promising ligands due to their higher charge density. Here we report the synthesis of two isostructural homoleptic bis(stannolediide) complexes [Ln(η5-LSn)2K(thf)4] (Ln = Tb(III) or Dy(III)). The Dy(III) complex exhibits single-molecule magnet behaviour with aUeffof 1,502(4) K and a blocking temperature of 55 K, whereas the Tb(III) analogue shows Raman-dominated relaxation <~6 K. Removal of the potassium cation yields [Tb(η5-LSn)2]−or a divalent complex [Dy(η5-LSn)2]2−. The Dy(II) complex displays weak magnetic anisotropy. These results highlight bis(stannolediide) ligands as a promising new class for high‑barrier lanthanide single-molecule magnets.

139

陈镶嵌中的介观输运#

Mesoscopic transport in a Chern mosaic
📚 arXiv👤 Sayak Bhattacharjee, Julian May-Mann, Yves H. Kwan, Trithep Devakul, Aaron Sharpe📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作建立陈镶嵌介观输运的半经典计算框架，揭示畴区构型与量子化电阻的对应规律，为莫尔异质结构等二维拓扑材料提供可实验验证的理论预言与系统分类。
该研究分析陈镶嵌——即具有不同局域陈数的规则畴区图案——中的介观电子输运特性。以莫尔异质结构为典型平台，计算了零温零磁场下线性响应电阻，发现简单畴构型可在纵向和横向（霍尔）响应中呈现零、整数或分数倍量子电阻，为二维拓扑材料实验提供了半经典计算框架与对比目录。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究分析陈镶嵌——即具有不同局域陈数的规则畴区图案——中的介观电子输运特性。以莫尔异质结构为典型平台，计算了零温零磁场下线性响应电阻，发现简单畴构型可在纵向和横向（霍尔）响应中呈现零、整数或分数倍量子电阻，为二维拓扑材料实验提供了半经典计算框架与对比目录。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.08654v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We analyze mesoscopic electronic transport in a Chern mosaic: a regular pattern of domains whose electronic bands carry differing local Chern numbers. An example platform where a Chern mosaic can arise is a moiré heterostructure, where variations in the local moiré parameters can produce such domains. We compute resistances at linear response for a variety of domain wall network geometries at zero temperature and magnetic field. Simple domain configurations can exhibit zero, integer, or fractional multiples of the quantum of resistance in both the longitudinal and transverse (Hall) responses. Our simple semi-classical analysis provides a useful computational method and comparative catalog for ongoing experiments in two-dimensional topological materials.

140

腔量子材料中的涨落工程#

Fluctuation engineering in cavity quantum materials
📚 arXiv👤 Hope M Bretscher, Lorenzo Graziotto, Marios H Michael, Angela Montanaro, I-Te Lu, Andrey Grankin, James W McIver, Jerome Faist, Daniele Fausti, Martin Eckstein, Michael Ruggenthaler, Angel Rubio, DN Basov, Mohammad Hafezi, Martin Claassen, Dante M Kennes, Michael A Sentef📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该综述开创性地从涨落工程视角重构腔量子材料研究范式，突破传统光-物质耦合框架，将电磁涨落作为可编程的量子调控自由度。通过频率-空间-模式的多维操控，实现对强关联体系相变与有序态的精准设计，为超导、拓扑
该综述从涨落视角系统梳理腔量子材料领域，探讨通过调控电磁涨落的频率、空间与模式分布来操控关联量子物态。涵盖真空与热谱对相边界、有序态的调控，介绍实用设计工具箱与最新里程碑，并展望多模、超越长波长极限等理论与实验挑战，涉及超导、磁性、莫尔及拓扑平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该综述从涨落视角系统梳理腔量子材料领域，探讨通过调控电磁涨落的频率、空间与模式分布来操控关联量子物态。涵盖真空与热谱对相边界、有序态的调控，介绍实用设计工具箱与最新里程碑，并展望多模、超越长波长极限等理论与实验挑战，涉及超导、磁性、莫尔及拓扑平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.08666v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Coupling tailored electromagnetic fluctuations to materials provides a resource for controlling correlated quantum matter. By structuring the frequency, spatial, and modal distribution of fluctuations through a new generation of cavity quantum materials, vacuum and thermal spectra can shift phase boundaries and stabilize or suppress orders. This review organizes the field around a fluctuation-focused perspective, surveying a practical design toolbox and recent milestones, and outlining theory-experiment challenges in realistic, multimode, beyond-long-wavelength regimes. We highlight photonic observables and map opportunities for equilibrium and driven control across superconducting, magnetic, moire, and topological platforms.

141

三维周期性边界条件微磁学中的样品形状效应#

Including sample shape in micromagnetics with 3D periodic boundary conditions
📚 arXiv👤 Frederik Laust Durhuus, Andrea Roberto Insinga, Rasmus Bjørk📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作从理论层面严格证明了大尺度磁性体系中形状效应的局域化特征，将复杂的长程偶极相互作用简化为平均磁化强度的宏观修正，突破了传统周期性边界条件方法忽略样品形貌的局限。所提出的修正方案以极小计算代价实现
该工作严格证明对于足够大的磁性样品，仅平均磁化强度产生不可忽略的形状效应。基于此认识，发展了一种简单且计算高效的现有实现修正方案，可在周期性边界条件方法中纳入样品形状效应，避免了准周期宏观几何法中多重复制域的计算困难。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作严格证明对于足够大的磁性样品，仅平均磁化强度产生不可忽略的形状效应。基于此认识，发展了一种简单且计算高效的现有实现修正方案，可在周期性边界条件方法中纳入样品形状效应，避免了准周期宏观几何法中多重复制域的计算困难。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.08777v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Periodic boundary conditions (PBCs) for computing magnetic fields in repeating magnetic structures, e.g. in micromagnetic simulations, are typically imposed using the quasi periodic macrogeometry approach, where many copies of the simulated domain are introduced. This can be computationally problematic, especially if the simulated domain is incommensurate with the desired sample shape. In this work, we present a formal proof that for sufficiently large magnetic samples, only the average magnetisation gives non-negligible shape effects. Using this insight, we develop a simple, computationally efficient modification of existing implementations which incorporates shape effects in PBC methods.

142

受挫反铁磁耦合双层中的反拓扑磁性纹理#

Antitopological magnetic textures in an antiferromagnetically coupled bilayer with frustration
📚 arXiv👤 Lewei Zhou, Jun Chen, Zhong Shen, Shuai Dong, Xiaoyan Yao📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究构建无外场下受挫反铁磁耦合双层的通用模型，发现层间耦合可稳定反拓扑磁性纹理并提升其运动速度，突破了传统拓扑磁结构依赖外场或单层的局限，为高速低耗散自旋电子器件的材料设计提供新范式。
该研究在无外磁场条件下研究受挫诱导的反拓扑双层磁性纹理的一般模型，揭示层间耦合在防止畸变、实现更高速度方面的关键作用。该模型可实现在多种具有反铁磁耦合双层的受挫磁性材料中，为拓扑磁性纹理的材料设计与应用提供指导。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在无外磁场条件下研究受挫诱导的反拓扑双层磁性纹理的一般模型，揭示层间耦合在防止畸变、实现更高速度方面的关键作用。该模型可实现在多种具有反铁磁耦合双层的受挫磁性材料中，为拓扑磁性纹理的材料设计与应用提供指导。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.08845v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The bilayer skyrmion composed of upper and lower tightly coupled skyrmions on two layers with completely compensated topological charges (called as anti-topology here), has become one feasible improvement of conventional skyrmion to realize straight motion without skyrmion Hall effect, which has aroused great interest in practical applications. The present work investigates a general model (without external magnetic field) for the frustration-induced anti-topological bilayer magnetic textures with rich morphologies, and discusses the modulations of key parameters on the energy barrier and the current-driven dynamics. It is revealed that the interlayer coupling plays a key role in preventing distortion, and thus helps to reach a faster velocity. This model can be realized in various frustrated magnetic materials with antiferromagnetically coupled bilayer, providing a helpful guidance for the material design and application of topological magnetic textures.

143

二维反铁磁与交错磁铬基IV族硫族化物中的高阶拓扑绝缘体#

Higher-order topological insulators in two-dimensional antiferromagnetic and altermagnetic chromium-based group-IV chalcogenides
📚 arXiv👤 Ruo-Yu Ning, Yong-Kun Wang, Shifeng Qian, Si Li, Wen-Li Yang📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在二维磁体系中实现高阶拓扑绝缘体与反铁磁/交错磁性的耦合，突破传统铁磁拓扑材料范式；C₃对称性保护的零维角态与分数电荷在自旋-轨道耦合下保持鲁棒，为低功耗自旋电子器件与拓扑量子计算提供全新材
通过第一性原理计算与理论分析，该研究识别出铬基IV族硫族化物单层（CrCX₃、CrSiS₃及Janus结构Cr₂C₂S₃Se₃、Cr₂Si₂S₃Se₃）作为新型二维磁高阶拓扑绝缘体。其中CrCX₃和CrSiS₃具有PT对称的反铁磁基态，Janus化合物呈现交错磁性；所有材料均受C₃旋转对称性保护，展现零维角态与量子化分数电荷。考虑自旋-轨道耦合后仍保持高阶拓扑相，证实其拓扑性质的鲁棒性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

通过第一性原理计算与理论分析，该研究识别出铬基IV族硫族化物单层（CrCX₃、CrSiS₃及Janus结构Cr₂C₂S₃Se₃、Cr₂Si₂S₃Se₃）作为新型二维磁高阶拓扑绝缘体。其中CrCX₃和CrSiS₃具有PT对称的反铁磁基态，Janus化合物呈现交错磁性；所有材料均受C₃旋转对称性保护，展现零维角态与量子化分数电荷。考虑自旋-轨道耦合后仍保持高阶拓扑相，证实其拓扑性质的鲁棒性。

English Abstract
