arXiv:2604.08907v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Based on first-principles calculations combined with theoretical analysis, we identify a family of monolayer chromium-based group-IV chalcogenides as a new class of two-dimensional (2D) magnetic higher-order topological insulators (HOTIs). Specifically, the CrCX₃ (X= S, Se, Te) and CrSiS₃ monolayers are found to host conventional antiferromagnetic ground states with PT symmetry, whereas the Janus compounds Cr₂C₂S₃Se₃ and Cr₂Si₂S₃Se₃ exhibit altermagnetic ground states. We demonstrate that all these monolayer magnetic materials realize 2D HOTI phases, in which the nontrivial topology is protected by lattice C₃ rotational symmetry and manifests as zero-dimensional corner states carrying quantized fractional charges. Moreover, upon inclusion of spin-orbit coupling, these systems remain in the HOTI phase and continue to host robust corner-localized states, confirming the stability of their higher-order topological nature. Our results reveal an intrinsic connection between higher-order topology and magnetic order in 2D antiferromagnetic and altermagnetic systems, identifying chromium-based group-IV chalcogenide monolayers as promising platforms for exploring higher-order topological phases and their potential relevance for future topological and spintronic applications.

144

钛铁矿AIrO₃（A=Mg,Zn,Cd）及超蜂窝β-ZnIrO₃中晶体场与离子内相互作用的演化#

Evolution of crystal field and intraionic interactions in the ilmenite AIrO₃ (A = Mg, Zn, Cd) and hyperhoneycomb β-ZnIrO₃
📚 arXiv👤 Yuya Haraguchi, Hiroko Aruga Katori, Kenji Ishii, Hakuto Suzuki📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次通过RIXS多重态分析量化钛铁矿型铱氧化物的晶体场与离子内相互作用参数演化，揭示A位离子半径对三角畸变及J=1/2态偏离的微观调控机制；关键发现ZnIrO₃两种结构相具有几乎相同的局域电子参
利用Ir L₃边共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）研究钛铁矿型AIrO₃和超蜂窝β-ZnIrO₃的局域电子结构，多重态分析揭示A位化学替代导致晶体场和离子内相互作用参数的系统演化：A位离子半径增大增强三角畸变，微观解释了CdIrO₃偏离理想J=1/2态及反铁磁相互作用的出现。钛铁矿ZnIrO₃与超蜂窝β-ZnIrO₃的局域多重态参数几乎相同，表明二者不同磁基态主要由晶格结构而非单离子性质决定。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

利用Ir L₃边共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）研究钛铁矿型AIrO₃和超蜂窝β-ZnIrO₃的局域电子结构，多重态分析揭示A位化学替代导致晶体场和离子内相互作用参数的系统演化：A位离子半径增大增强三角畸变，微观解释了CdIrO₃偏离理想J=1/2态及反铁磁相互作用的出现。钛铁矿ZnIrO₃与超蜂窝β-ZnIrO₃的局域多重态参数几乎相同，表明二者不同磁基态主要由晶格结构而非单离子性质决定。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.08934v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Spin-orbit Mott insulators with the t₂g⁵ electron configuration are promising platforms for the Kitaev spin liquid, yet fine-tuning of their crystal structures is essential to suppress non-Kitaev interactions. Here, we investigate the local electronic structures of the ilmenite iridates AIrO₃ (A = Mg, Zn, Cd) and the hyperhoneycomb β-ZnIrO₃ using Ir L₃₋ₑdge resonant inelastic x-ray scattering (RIXS). Multiplet analysis of the RIXS spectra reveals a systematic evolution of the crystal field and intraionic interaction parameters upon chemical substitution at the A-site. We observe an enhancement of the trigonal distortion with increasing A-site ionic radius. This provides a microscopic explanation for the deviation from the ideal J=1/2 state and the antiferromagnetic interactions identified in CdIrO₃. Furthermore, the local multiplet parameters of ilmenite ZnIrO₃ and hyperhoneycomb β-ZnIrO₃ are found to be nearly identical, demonstrating that their different magnetic ground states are primarily governed by their distinct lattice structures rather than the single-ion properties. These findings establish a solid foundation for understanding how local crystal-field distortions control the magnetic Hamiltonian in Kitaev candidate materials.

145

正常金属/铁磁体异质结构中电荷-轨道-自旋输运的互易性#

Reciprocity of Charge-Orbital-Spin Transport in Normal-Metal/Ferromagnet Heterostructures
📚 arXiv👤 Abhishek Erram, Akanksha Chouhan, Ashwin A. Tulapurkar📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在同一器件中同时探测轨道力矩与轨道泵浦，以实验严格验证Onsager互易关系，突破以往分离研究的局限。核心创新在于建立电荷-轨道-自旋转换的统一互易框架，为轨道电子学器件的能效优化与双向操控
该研究通过两端口散射参数测量，在同一器件平台上直接探测Ru/Ni、Ru/Pt/CoFeB和Co/Cu/SiO₂器件中的轨道力矩驱动磁化动力学与轨道泵浦效应，验证传输系数满足Onsager互易对称关系，证实电荷、轨道与自旋角动量间的互易转换。实验确立轨道泵浦作为轨道力矩的互易对应过程，为轨道输运现象提供统一框架。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究通过两端口散射参数测量，在同一器件平台上直接探测Ru/Ni、Ru/Pt/CoFeB和Co/Cu/SiO₂器件中的轨道力矩驱动磁化动力学与轨道泵浦效应，验证传输系数满足Onsager互易对称关系，证实电荷、轨道与自旋角动量间的互易转换。实验确立轨道泵浦作为轨道力矩的互易对应过程，为轨道输运现象提供统一框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.08989v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Orbital angular momentum has recently emerged as an important carrier of angular momentum in solids, offering new pathways for spin orbitronic functionality beyond conventional spin transport. Here, we investigate the orbital Hall effect which generates orbital torques and their reciprocal process viz orbital pumping and the inverse orbital Hall effect (iOHE) in non-magnet/ferromagnet heterostructures. Using two port scattering parameter measurements on Ru/Ni, Ru/Pt/CoFeB and Co/Cu/SiO2 devices, we directly probe both orbital torque driven magnetization dynamics and orbital pumping within the same device platform. We observe that the transmission coefficients satisfy the symmetry relations required by Onsager reciprocity, demonstrating reciprocal conversion between charge, orbital and spin angular momenta. Our results establish orbital pumping as the reciprocal counterpart of orbital torque. Our experimental findings provide a unified framework for orbital transport phenomena.

146

Zn替代FeSe单晶中超导转变温度的非单调演化及鲁棒多能隙扩展s波+s波配对#

Nonmonotonic Evolution of the Superconducting Transition Temperature and Robust Multigap Extended s-wave + s-wave Pairing in Zn-Substituted FeSe Single Crystals
📚 arXiv👤 Han-Shu Xu, Changhao Ding, Guanyin Gao, Xin Zhang, Xinyu Yin, Xucai Kan, Jiaping Hu, Wen Xie, Wensen Wei, Yuxiao Hou, Keyu An, Haoxiang Li, Kaibin Tang, Yu-Yan Han📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示Zn掺杂FeSe中Tc非单调演化，突破简单杂质效应框架；首次证实扩展s波+s波两能隙配对在强散射下保持权重稳定，证明FeSe多能隙超导具有本征鲁棒性，为理解铁基超导杂质耐受机制提供关键实验依
在宽掺杂范围（x=0-0.023）合成的Fe₁₋ₓZnₓSe单晶中，超导转变温度Tc呈现显著非单调依赖，表明其演化机制不能仅用简单杂质对破缺解释。磁化与输运测量证实体超导性及Zn掺杂增强的散射效应。低温比热始终由各向同性s波与各向异性扩展s波的两能隙模型描述，单能隙及其他配对对称性均不适用；两能隙分量相对权重几乎不变，表明Zn替代引起的弱带间散射保护了多带超导性，展示FeSe多能隙超导的鲁棒性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

在宽掺杂范围（x=0-0.023）合成的Fe₁₋ₓZnₓSe单晶中，超导转变温度Tc呈现显著非单调依赖，表明其演化机制不能仅用简单杂质对破缺解释。磁化与输运测量证实体超导性及Zn掺杂增强的散射效应。低温比热始终由各向同性s波与各向异性扩展s波的两能隙模型描述，单能隙及其他配对对称性均不适用；两能隙分量相对权重几乎不变，表明Zn替代引起的弱带间散射保护了多带超导性，展示FeSe多能隙超导的鲁棒性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.09172v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report a systematic study of superconductivity on Fe1-xZnxSe single crystals synthesized over a broad Zn doping range (x = 0-0.023). High-quality single crystals across all compositions range exhibit superconducting transitions, while the transition temperature Tc shows a pronounced nonmonotonic dependence on Zn doping concentration, indicating that the underlying mechanism govering Tc its evolution cannot be explained solely by simple impurity pair breaking alone. Magnetization and transport measurements confirm the bulk behavior of superconductivity and reveal enhanced scattering effects with Zn doping. Low-temperature specific heat is consistently described by a two-gap scenario composed of an isotropic s-wave gap and an anisotropic extended s-wave gap, whereas single-gap and alternative pairing symmetries fail to describe the data. The nearly unchanged relative weights of the two gap components suggest the weak interband scattering induced by Zn substitution, thereby preserving multiband superconductivity. These results demonstrate the robustness of multigap superconductivity in FeSe and impose stringent constraints on candidate pairing mechanisms, highlighting the role of multiband electronic structure and anisotropic gap formation.

147

非对称反双半子及其团簇的拓扑约束自旋波模式#

Topology-constrained spin-wave modes of asymmetric antibimerons and their clusters
📚 arXiv👤 Pavel A. Vorobyev, Daichi Kurebayashi, Oleg A. Tretiakov📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次建立非对称反双半子团簇的集体自旋波理论框架，核心创新在于揭示纹理耦合导致N重模式劈裂的拓扑约束机制，并以有效振子模型统一描述其正则动力学，为拓扑磁存储器件的多比特协同操控奠定理论基础。
该理论研究超薄铁磁膜中孤立非对称反双半子及其团簇的低能集体自旋波激发：孤立反双半子支持反映其内部自由度的离散局域模式谱；多反双半子形成团簇时，纹理间耦合导致模式劈裂为N重多重态（N为反双半子数）。基于半子对的有效耦合振子模型可捕捉系统集体动力学本质，揭示反双半子团簇运动可用明确定义的正则模式理解，为纳米尺度拓扑磁纹理的集体激发调控提供理论基础。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该理论研究超薄铁磁膜中孤立非对称反双半子及其团簇的低能集体自旋波激发：孤立反双半子支持反映其内部自由度的离散局域模式谱；多反双半子形成团簇时，纹理间耦合导致模式劈裂为N重多重态（N为反双半子数）。基于半子对的有效耦合振子模型可捕捉系统集体动力学本质，揭示反双半子团簇运动可用明确定义的正则模式理解，为纳米尺度拓扑磁纹理的集体激发调控提供理论基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.09178v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Collective modes are a defining signature of coupled degrees of freedom, forming a bridge between understanding of interactions in condensed-matter systems and emergent functionality. Topological magnetic textures provide a natural platform to realize and control such collective modes at the nanoscale. Here we theoretically identify and characterize low-energy collective spin-wave excitations of isolated asymmetric antibimerons and their clusters in ultrathin ferromagnetic films. We demonstrate that an isolated asymmetric antibimeron supports a discrete spectrum of localized modes, reflecting its internal degrees of freedom. When multiple asymmetric antibimerons form a cluster, inter-texture coupling leads to the splitting of these modes into N-fold multiplets, where N denotes the number of asymmetric antibimerons. To rationalize these findings, we introduce an effective coupled-oscillator model based on meron pairs that captures the essential collective dynamics of the system. This emergent classical mechanics description reveals that the motion of asymmetric antibimeron clusters can be understood in terms of well-defined normal modes governed by topology-constrained particle-like degrees of freedom. These results establish coupled asymmetric antibimerons as a tunable platform for spin-wave based nano-oscillators, whose normal-mode spectrum is controllable through cluster size, thus providing a programmable set of low-lying resonances for these nano-oscillators.

148

压力对FeWO₄晶体与磁结构的影响#

The effect of pressure in the crystal and magnetic structure of FeWO4
📚 arXiv👤 Oscar Fabelo, Javier Gonzalez-Platas, Stanislav Savvin, Pablo Botella, Daniel Errandonea📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本研究首次在低温高压条件下原位测定FeWO₄的磁结构演化，核心创新在于证实压力虽压缩晶格体积约5%，却不改变其Shubnikov磁空间群对称性，仅微调磁矩取向与Néel温度，为理解黑钨矿型钨酸盐中磁-
利用XtremeD中子衍射仪原位研究黑钨矿型FeWO₄在最高8.7(4) GPa、最低30.0(5) K下的结构与磁性质温度依赖关系。Rietveld精修表明，尽管体积压缩约5%，最大压力未改变磁有序以下的Shubnikov空间群；但磁矩取向与Néel温度随压力略有变化，符合钨酸盐磁性的既有认识。同时确定了300 K下的压力-体积状态方程，并与先前X射线衍射研究及密度泛函理论计算比较。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

利用XtremeD中子衍射仪原位研究黑钨矿型FeWO₄在最高8.7(4) GPa、最低30.0(5) K下的结构与磁性质温度依赖关系。Rietveld精修表明，尽管体积压缩约5%，最大压力未改变磁有序以下的Shubnikov空间群；但磁矩取向与Néel温度随压力略有变化，符合钨酸盐磁性的既有认识。同时确定了300 K下的压力-体积状态方程，并与先前X射线衍射研究及密度泛函理论计算比较。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.09190v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The temperature dependence of the structural and magnetic properties of wolframite-type FeWO4 were studied in situ by high pressure neutron diffraction. Neutron diffraction measurements were performed at the XtremeD instrument at the Institut Laue Langevin up to a maximum pressure of 8.7(4) GPa and a minimum temperature of 30.0(5) K. The diffraction data were analyzed via Rietveld refinements. We found that despite of producing a contraction of 5% of the volume, the maximum pressure applied in this study does not modify the Shubnikov space group below magnetic order. However, the orientation of magnetic moments and the Néel temperature, are slightly modified with the pressure, which is expected according to the preexistent understanding of magnetism in wolframites. We also determined a pressure-volume equation of state of FeWO4 at 300 K, which is compared with previous X-ray diffraction studies and density-functional theory calculations.

149

铌酸银隐藏的铁电手性基态#

The hidden ferroelectric chiral ground state of silver niobate
📚 arXiv👤 Safari Amisi, Fernando Gómez-Ortiz, Eric Bousquet, Philippe Ghosez📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：理论预言铌酸银存在能量更低的R3铁电基态，其极化-氧八面体旋转耦合产生类石英强旋光性，揭示动力学受限可导致热力学基态"隐藏"，为设计新型光学铁电材料提供范式。
第一性原理计算揭示铌酸银存在一种此前被忽视的R3对称性三方铁电相，该相为热力学基态，具有由极化与氧八面体同相旋转耦合产生的不完整抵消的铁手性特征，表现出与石英相当的自然旋光性。该相虽能量占优，但动力学限制可能阻碍其实验观测。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

第一性原理计算揭示铌酸银存在一种此前被忽视的R3对称性三方铁电相，该相为热力学基态，具有由极化与氧八面体同相旋转耦合产生的不完整抵消的铁手性特征，表现出与石英相当的自然旋光性。该相虽能量占优，但动力学限制可能阻碍其实验观测。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.09193v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Silver niobate is a conventional perovskite oxide compound, known to exhibit a rich polymorphism. Although often classified as antiferroelectric, its low-temperature structure remains unclear. Here, first-principles calculations reveal a previously overlooked and unusual rhombohedral ferroelectric phase with R3 symmetry that emerges as the thermodynamic ground state despite its close energetic competition among previously proposed structures. Remarkably, this phase is structurally chiral, with chirality emerging improperly from the coupling between polarization and in-phase rotations of the oxygen octahedra along [111], producing a ferri-chiral state with incomplete cancellation of local chiral motifs. As a consequence, the phase exhibits significant natural optical activity comparable to that of quartz. Although energetically favored, its experimental observation may be hindered by kinetic limitations, potentially contributing to the ongoing controversy surrounding the low-temperature structure of silver niobate.

150

纳米磁性超材料中的单向信息流动#

Unidirectional information flow in a nanomagnetic metamaterial
📚 arXiv👤 Johannes H. Jensen, Ida Breivik, Arthur Penty, Anders Strømberg, Henrik Tidemann Kaarbø, Dheerendra S. Bhandari, Thea M. Dale, Michael Foerster, Miguel Angel Niño, Deepak Dagur, Magnus Själander, Gunnar Tufte, Erik Folven📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地在纳米磁性超材料中实现了本征非互易性，无需复杂结构即可产生单向畴运动，且方向可电场重构。这一可编程方向性为自旋电子器件和储备计算提供了全新物理平台，显著提升了类脑计算系统的记忆容量与可调
提出纳米磁体间非互易影响框架，发现一类具有本征方向性的人工自旋冰几何结构。在外场驱动下，该类结构表现出单向畴生长与反转，实现畴的单向运动，且方向可通过外场强度重构。实验验证了单向畴生长，并展示该方向性显著提升了储备计算框架中的记忆能力。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

提出纳米磁体间非互易影响框架，发现一类具有本征方向性的人工自旋冰几何结构。在外场驱动下，该类结构表现出单向畴生长与反转，实现畴的单向运动，且方向可通过外场强度重构。实验验证了单向畴生长，并展示该方向性显著提升了储备计算框架中的记忆能力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.09420v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Artificial spin ice (ASI) are metamaterials composed of interacting nanomagnets. Although ASI hold promise for low-power computing, the ability to transmit information through these two-dimensional systems has been limited. Inspired by non-reciprocal transport in nature, we develop a framework for non-reciprocal influence between nanomagnets. Using the framework we discover a family of ASI geometries with inherent directionality. Directional ASI have the property that, when driven by an external field protocol, domains grow and reverse in the same direction, illustrating an emergent non-reciprocity of the system. Combining growth and reversal results in unidirectional domain movement through the metamaterial. We focus on one member of the directional ASI family, and demonstrate unidirectional domain growth experimentally. Furthermore, we show that the direction of growth is reconfigurable by tuning the external field strengths. Finally, we demonstrate how the directionality of the system significantly improves memory capabilities in a reservoir computing framework. Our work is the first demonstration of an ASI with inherent directionality, offering a magnetic computing platform that combines memory and computation within a single neuromorphic substrate.

151

d波交错磁候选材料CsV₂Se₂O中的压力诱导类超导转变#

Pressure-Induced Superconducting-like Transition in the it d-wave Altermagnet Candidate CsV₂Se₂O
📚 arXiv👤 Yuanzhe Li, Yilin Han, Liu Yang, Wanli He, Pengda Ye, Wencheng Huang, Jiabin Qiao, Yuemei Li, Xiaodong Sun, Tingli He, Jiayi Han, Yuxiang Chen, Ruifeng Tian, Hao Sun, Yuwei Liu, Feng Wu, Baoshan Song, Zhengtai Liu, Mao Ye, Yaobo Huang, Kenichi Ozawa, Ji Dai, Massimo Tallarida, Shengtao Cui, Jie Chen, Meiling Jin, Wayne Zheng, Chaoyu Chen, Zhiwei Wang, Zhi-Ming Yu, Xiang Li, Yugui Yao📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在d波交错磁候选材料CsV₂Se₂O中实现压力诱导的类超导转变，揭示了密度波序与超导竞争的关键证据，为理解交错磁性驱动的非常规超导机制提供了全新实验平台，拓展了高温超导探索的新材料体系。
对准二维钒氧硫属化合物CsV₂Se₂O（CVSO）进行高压实验与理论研究，发现常压下为弱绝缘态，存在约100 K的类密度波异常；加压后密度波特征被抑制，磁阻由负变正，约3 K以下出现类超导电阻下降，该异常可被磁场抑制。该工作为d波交错磁性与非常规超导关联提供了实验线索。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

对准二维钒氧硫属化合物CsV₂Se₂O（CVSO）进行高压实验与理论研究，发现常压下为弱绝缘态，存在约100 K的类密度波异常；加压后密度波特征被抑制，磁阻由负变正，约3 K以下出现类超导电阻下降，该异常可被磁场抑制。该工作为d波交错磁性与非常规超导关联提供了实验线索。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.09457v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnetism generates exchange-type spin splitting without net magnetization and, in its it d-wave form, resembles the angular symmetry of unconventional it d-wave superconductivity. Whether this correspondence bears directly on superconducting instabilities in real correlated materials remains open. Here we study the quasi-two-dimensional vanadium oxychalcogenide CsV₂Se₂O (CVSO), a square-net it d-wave altermagnet candidate, through combined experimental and theoretical investigation of its lattice structure, electronic structure and transport properties. At ambient pressure, CVSO is a weakly insulating parent state with a density-wave-like anomaly near 100 K, and its bulk properties are most consistent with a G-type compensated antiferromagnetic background. Under compression, the density-wave-like feature is suppressed, the magnetoresistance evolves from predominantly negative to positive, and a superconducting-like resistive downturn emerges below about 3 K. This low-temperature anomaly is reproducible across samples and pressure media, and is suppressed by magnetic field. Room-temperature X-ray diffraction reveals no symmetry lowering, whereas does show a pronounced compressibility anomaly over the same pressure range. CVSO thus reveals a pressure-tuned phase diagram in which a reconstructed weakly insulating parent state gives way to strange-metal-like transport and superconducting-like behavior, echoing broader phenomenology associated with unconventional superconductors, including cuprates and nickelates.

152

几何诱导的d波交替磁体净自旋极化#

Geometry induced net spin polarization of d-wave altermagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Abhiram Soori📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作揭示了几何形状本身即可在交替磁体中诱导净自旋极化这一全新物理机制，突破了传统认知中交替磁体无净磁化的限制。该效应源于尺寸效应与动量空间离散的协同作用，且可通过输运实验直接验证，为无磁场、无稀土元
该工作发现有限尺寸矩形交替磁体样品可纯粹因几何形状而获得净自旋极化。此效应源于交替磁体各向异性自旋分辨费米轮廓、动量空间离散采样与不等样品尺寸的相互作用；当Lₓ=Lₓ或趋于热力学极限时该极化消失。研究进一步表明，该几何诱导自旋极化可通过输运测量直接探测，在隧穿区电荷与自旋电导呈现特征性维度依赖图案，铁磁-交替磁体-铁磁结中则出现对塞曼场反转不对称的磁阻。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作发现有限尺寸矩形交替磁体样品可纯粹因几何形状而获得净自旋极化。此效应源于交替磁体各向异性自旋分辨费米轮廓、动量空间离散采样与不等样品尺寸的相互作用；当Lₓ=Lₓ或趋于热力学极限时该极化消失。研究进一步表明，该几何诱导自旋极化可通过输运测量直接探测，在隧穿区电荷与自旋电导呈现特征性维度依赖图案，铁磁-交替磁体-铁磁结中则出现对塞曼场反转不对称的磁阻。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.24287v3 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Altermagnets exhibit spin-split electronic bandstructures despite having zero net magnetization, making them attractive for field-free spintronic applications. In this work, we show that a finite rectangular altermagnetic sample can acquire a net spin polarization purely due to its geometry. This effect arises from the interplay between the anisotropic, spin-resolved Fermi contours of an altermagnet, the discrete sampling of momentum space and unequal sample dimensions. By explicitly counting occupied states, we demonstrate that rectangular samples with Lₓ ≠ L_y host a finite spin polarization, which vanishes in the symmetric limit Lₓ₌L_y and in the thermodynamic limit. We further show that this geometry-induced spin polarization can be directly probed in transport measurements. In the tunneling regime, the charge and the spin conductances exhibit characteristic patterns as a function of sample dimensions, faithfully reflecting the underlying spin polarization. In addition, transport across ferromagnet--altermagnet--ferromagnet junctions reveals an asymmetric magnetoresistance with respect to reversal of the Zeeman field, providing an independent transport signature of the finite spin polarization. Our results establish geometry as an effective control parameter for spin polarization in altermagnets and suggest a viable route for exploiting finite-size effects in mesoscopic altermagnetic spintronic devices.

153

自旋-轨道耦合系统中电子的磁矩#

Magnetic moment of electrons in systems with spin-orbit coupling
📚 arXiv👤 I. A. Ado, M. Titov, Rembert A. Duine, Arne Brataas📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文突破传统磁矩理论框架，首次严格区分磁矩与能量对磁场偏导，揭示相对论修正下自旋-轨道分解失效的本质，建立反常磁矩的普适定义；其动磁电效应Kubo公式为拓扑材料、自旋电子学器件的磁电耦合机制设计提供关
该工作系统分析了自旋-轨道耦合（SOC）对电子磁矩算符的相对论修正贡献，包括真空、半导体8带Kane模型及任意双能支系统情形。引入对外磁场偏导算符的相对论修正概念，强调磁矩与-∂H/∂B的区别并将此差值命名为"反常磁矩"。证明纳入相对论修正后，总磁矩常规的自旋-轨道分解变得模糊，且标准形式的"轨道磁化现代理论"受到威胁。导出了动磁电效应的线性响应Kubo公式。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作系统分析了自旋-轨道耦合（SOC）对电子磁矩算符的相对论修正贡献，包括真空、半导体8带Kane模型及任意双能支系统情形。引入对外磁场偏导算符的相对论修正概念，强调磁矩与-∂H/∂B的区别并将此差值命名为"反常磁矩"。证明纳入相对论修正后，总磁矩常规的自旋-轨道分解变得模糊，且标准形式的"轨道磁化现代理论"受到威胁。导出了动磁电效应的线性响应Kubo公式。

English Abstract

arXiv:2503.10956v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Magnetic effects originating from spin-orbit coupling (SOC) have been attracting major attention. However, SOC contributions to the electron magnetic moment operator are conventionally disregarded. In this work, we analyze relativistic contributions to the latter operator, including those of the SOC-type: in vacuum, for the semiconductor 8 band Kane model, and for an arbitrary system with two spectral branches. In this endeavor, we introduce a notion of relativistic corrections to the operation partial/partialboldsymbol B, where boldsymbol B is an external magnetic field. We highlight the difference between the magnetic moment and -partial H/partialboldsymbol B, where H is the system Hamiltonian. We suggest to call this difference the abnormal magnetic moment. We demonstrate that the conventional decomposition of the total magnetic moment into the spin and orbital parts becomes ambiguous when relativistic corrections are taken into account. The latter also jeopardize the "modern theory of orbital magnetization" in its standard formulation. We derive a linear response Kubo formula for the kinetic magnetoelectric effect projected to individual branches of a two branch system. This allows us, in particular, to identify a source of this effect that stems from noncommutation of the position and partial/partialboldsymbol B operators' components. This is an analog of the contribution to the Hall conductivity from noncommuting components of the position operator. We comment on the relation between such contributions and the Berry curvature theory. We also report several additional observations related to the electron magnetic moment operator in systems with SOC and other relativistic corrections.

154

非平坦能量 landscape 中的斯格明子晶格畴形成#

Skyrmion Lattice Domain Formation in a Non-Flat Energy Landscape
📚 arXiv👤 Raphael Gruber, Jan Rothörl, Simon M. Fröhlich, Maarten A. Brems, Tobias Sparmann, Fabian Kammerbauer, Maria-Andromachi Syskaki, Elizabeth M. Jefremovas, Sachin Krishnia, Asle Sudbø, Peter Virnau, Mathias Kläui📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地将磁场振荡作为调控手段，主动"平整化"非平坦能量landscape，解决了薄膜中斯格明子晶格准长程序受限的根本难题。通过实验与模拟结合，揭示了畴界形成动力学机制，为二维拓扑磁性体系的相行
该工作通过磁场振荡有效调控能量 landscape，实现了对磁斯格明子晶格有序性的直接控制。利用Kerr显微镜实验与布朗动力学模拟，定量表征晶格有序性与动力学，探索了钉扎效应导致的畴界形成与演化机制。研究为控制和研究涌现斯格明子晶格性质及二维相行为提供了新途径，薄膜中准长程序的主要限制因素——非平坦能量 landscape——可被主动调节。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作通过磁场振荡有效调控能量 landscape，实现了对磁斯格明子晶格有序性的直接控制。利用Kerr显微镜实验与布朗动力学模拟，定量表征晶格有序性与动力学，探索了钉扎效应导致的畴界形成与演化机制。研究为控制和研究涌现斯格明子晶格性质及二维相行为提供了新途径，薄膜中准长程序的主要限制因素——非平坦能量 landscape——可被主动调节。

English Abstract

arXiv:2508.12988v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Magnetic skyrmions are chiral spin structures with non-trivial topology that comprise two-dimensional quasi-particles and are promising information carriers for data storage and processing devices. Skyrmion lattices in magnetic thin films exhibit Kosterlitz-Thouless-Halperin-Nelson-Young (KTHNY) phase transitions and have garnered significant interest for studying emergent 2D phase behavior. In experimental skyrmion lattices, the main factor limiting the quasi-long-range order in thin films has been the non-flat energy landscape - often referred to as pinning effects. We demonstrate direct control of the skyrmion lattice order by effectively tuning the energy landscape employing magnetic field oscillations. By quantifying lattice order and dynamics, we explore how domain boundaries form and evolve due to pinning effects in Kerr microscopy experiments and in Brownian dynamics simulations, offering a pathway to control and study emergent skyrmion lattice properties and 2D phase behavior.

155

极端铁磁极限下三态Potts量子自旋链中的禁闭效应#

Confinement in the three-state Potts quantum spin chain in extreme ferromagnetic limit
📚 arXiv👤 Anna Krasznai, Sergei Rutkevich, Gábor Takács📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将微扰论与解析延拓技术应用于三态Potts模型的禁闭动力学，首次精确刻画了扭结-双扭结束缚态杂化及共振态形成机制，为理解低维量子磁体中的禁闭相变提供了可严格求解的理论范式，对量子模拟实验
该工作利用横向磁场的微扰展开研究三态Potts量子自旋链在极端铁磁极限下的动力学，重点考察了倾斜淬火区域中未禁闭的扭结激发与双扭结束缚态的杂化现象。作者详细分析了两扭结散射振幅的解析结构，追踪稳定激发在稳定性阈值附近转变为共振态的过程，并给出了激发谱和磁化动力学演化的解析结果，与数值模拟高度吻合。

中文摘要

该工作利用横向磁场的微扰展开研究三态Potts量子自旋链在极端铁磁极限下的动力学，重点考察了倾斜淬火区域中未禁闭的扭结激发与双扭结束缚态的杂化现象。作者详细分析了两扭结散射振幅的解析结构，追踪稳定激发在稳定性阈值附近转变为共振态的过程，并给出了激发谱和磁化动力学演化的解析结果，与数值模拟高度吻合。

English Abstract

arXiv:2508.20821v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We investigate the dynamics of the three-state Potts quantum spin chain in the extreme ferromagnetic limit using a perturbative expansion in the transverse magnetic field. We demonstrate that a perturbative approach provides access to important features beyond the reach of previous studies, most notably the description of resonant excitations and the analytic prediction of post-quench time evolution. A central focus is the oblique quench regime - a feature unique to the Potts model with no Ising counterpart - in which unconfined kink excitations hybridise with the two-kink bound states. We provide a detailed examination of the analytic structure of the two-kink scattering amplitude, tracing the transformation of stable excitations into resonances near stability thresholds. Our analytical results for the excitation spectra and magnetisation dynamics show excellent agreement with numerical simulations of non-equilibrium dynamics.

156

量子无序致序的有限尺寸能谱特征：Anderson态塔的视角#

Finite-Size Spectral Signatures of Order by Quantum Disorder: A Perspective from Anderson's Tower of States
📚 arXiv👤 Subhankar Khatua, Griffin C. Howson, Michel J. P. Gingras, Jeffrey G. Rau📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地建立Anderson态塔理论框架，将量子无序致序的抽象概念转化为可观测的有限尺寸能谱特征，通过量子转子模型定量刻画定域化-退局域化竞争机制，为数值识别复杂受挫磁体中的隐秘有序相提供了普适
该工作提出从Anderson态塔角度识别受挫磁体中量子无序致序（ObQD）的方法。通过构建有效量子转子模型，描述了ObQD诱导的转子定域化与其在对称等价基态间隧穿的竞争，确定了从有限尺寸下的退局域化到热力学极限下定域化的 crossover 尺度。该模型将精确对角化能谱中的特征分裂与ObQD选择能标联系起来，在一维、二维和三维受挫自旋模型中验证了其普适适用性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出从Anderson态塔角度识别受挫磁体中量子无序致序（ObQD）的方法。通过构建有效量子转子模型，描述了ObQD诱导的转子定域化与其在对称等价基态间隧穿的竞争，确定了从有限尺寸下的退局域化到热力学极限下定域化的 crossover 尺度。该模型将精确对角化能谱中的特征分裂与ObQD选择能标联系起来，在一维、二维和三维受挫自旋模型中验证了其普适适用性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.10610v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In frustrated magnetic systems with a subextensive number of classical ground states, quantum zero-point fluctuations can select a unique long-range ordered state, a celebrated phenomenon referred to as emphorder by quantum disorder (ObQD). For frustrated spin-frac12 models, unbiased numerical methods able to expose ObQD are necessary. We show that ObQD can be identified from exact diagonalization (ED) calculations through an analysis akin to the Anderson tower of states associated with spontaneous symmetry breaking. By defining an effective quantum rotor model, we describe the competition between ObQD-induced localization of the rotor and its tunneling between symmetry-related ground states, identifying the crossover lengthscale from the finite-size regime where the rotor is delocalized, to the infinite system-size limit where it becomes localized. This rotor model relates the characteristic splittings in the ED energy spectrum to the ObQD selection energy scale, providing an estimate that can be compared to spin wave calculations. We demonstrate the general applicability of this approach in one-, two- and three-dimensional frustrated spin models that exhibit ObQD.

157

通过投影一致Ueff控制DFT+U中的投影空间赝像#

Controlling Projection-Space Artifacts in DFT+U via Projection-Consistent Uₑff
📚 arXiv👤 Manjula Raman, Kenneth Park📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作揭示DFT+U中固定Ueff随投影空间变化产生赝像的核心机制，提出投影自洽确定Ueff的普适方案，解决了相稳定性和磁性预测的投影依赖性难题，为强关联材料的高精度计算建立新范式。
该工作系统研究了全电子APW+lo计算中，约束密度泛函理论确定的等效在位Coulomb相互作用Ueff对局域投影空间尺寸的依赖性。以金红石/锐钛矿TiO₂和β-MnO₂为例，表明跨不同投影选择使用单一固定Ueff会引入投影驱动的赝像，包括虚假磁有序转变和相稳定性非物理敏感性。当Ueff对每个投影空间内部一致确定时，这些赝像被消除，获得了投影一致的DFT+U晶格参数预测。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作系统研究了全电子APW+lo计算中，约束密度泛函理论确定的等效在位Coulomb相互作用Ueff对局域投影空间尺寸的依赖性。以金红石/锐钛矿TiO₂和β-MnO₂为例，表明跨不同投影选择使用单一固定Ueff会引入投影驱动的赝像，包括虚假磁有序转变和相稳定性非物理敏感性。当Ueff对每个投影空间内部一致确定时，这些赝像被消除，获得了投影一致的DFT+U晶格参数预测。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.07340v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Density functional theory augmented with a Hubbard correction (DFT+U) is widely used to treat localized electronic states, but its predictions are often sensitive to the choice of the local projection space defining the correlated subspace. This sensitivity poses a practical challenge for computational reproducibility, particularly when projection parameters vary across codes, basis sets, or materials. In this work, we systematically investigate how the effective on-site Coulomb interaction Uₑff, determined ab initio using constrained density functional theory, depends on the size of the local projection space in all-electron APW+lo calculations. Using rutile and anatase TiO₂ and β-MnO₂ as representative test cases, we show that applying a single fixed Uₑff across different projection choices introduces artificial projection-driven errors in total energies, including spurious magnetic ordering transitions and unphysical sensitivity of phase stability. These artifacts are eliminated when Uₑff is determined in an internally consistent manner for each projection space, yielding projection-consistent DFT+U predictions for lattice parameters, phase energetics, and magnetic ground states. By analyzing total-energy trends alongside the spatial characteristics of the localized d orbitals, we demonstrate that the systematic reduction of Uₑff with increasing projection size originates from orbital relaxation and enhanced electronic screening associated with orbital spatial extension. These results provide a physically motivated framework for controlling projection-space artifacts in DFT+U calculations and for obtaining energetically robust predictions across diverse correlated materials and computational setups.

158

超快光诱导非相对论交错磁性自旋劈裂的途径#

A Route to Nonrelativistic Altermagnetic Spin Splitting via Ultrafast Light
📚 arXiv👤 Huang-Zhao-Xiang Chen, Lin-Ding Yuan, Wen-Hao Liu, Lin-Wang Wang, Jun-Wei Luo, Zhi Wang📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究开创性地提出超快光诱导交错磁性自旋劈裂的全新非平衡机制，突破传统依赖相对论效应或静态对称性破缺的限制。基于第一性原理计算，揭示线偏振光通过光激发电荷重排与动态晶格畸变协同破缺有效时间反演对称性，
该工作识别了通过超快光在反铁磁体中产生交错磁性自旋劈裂的非平衡途径，无需相对论角动量转移、静态对称性破缺或辅助外场。基于实时含时密度泛函理论，在反铁磁钙钛矿KNiF₃中证明线偏振光可通过光激发电荷再分布及伴随晶格畸变破缺有效时间反演对称性，从而诱导动量依赖的交错磁性自旋劈裂。作者给出了该途径的一般对称性选择定则，为超快控制交错磁性建立了机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作识别了通过超快光在反铁磁体中产生交错磁性自旋劈裂的非平衡途径，无需相对论角动量转移、静态对称性破缺或辅助外场。基于实时含时密度泛函理论，在反铁磁钙钛矿KNiF₃中证明线偏振光可通过光激发电荷再分布及伴随晶格畸变破缺有效时间反演对称性，从而诱导动量依赖的交错磁性自旋劈裂。作者给出了该途径的一般对称性选择定则，为超快控制交错磁性建立了机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.02790v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We identify a nonequilibrium route for generating altermagnetic spin splitting in antiferromagnet by ultrafast light. Unlike existing strategies, this route does not require relativistic angular-momentum transfer, static symmetry breaking, or auxiliary external fields. Using real-time time-dependent density functional theory, we demonstrate in the antiferromagnetic perovskite KNiF3 that linearly polarized light can induce momentum-dependent altermagnetic spin splitting by breaking the effective time-reversal symmetry through photoexcited charge redistribution and the resulting lattice distortion. We provide a general symmetry selection rule for this route. These results establish a mechanism for ultrafast control of altermagnetism and extend its material realization into the nonequilibrium regime.

159

实时间与虚时间动力学中的量子Pontus-Mpemba效应#

Quantum Pontus-Mpemba Effects in Real and Imaginary-time Dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Hui Yu, Jiangping Hu, Shi-Xin Zhang📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将Pontus-Mpemba效应拓展至量子领域，并揭示对称性破缺-恢复的两步演化协议可普适加速实时间与虚时间动力学。其核心创新在于利用瞬态非对称演化作为"催化剂"，为量子模拟热化加速和基
该工作证明了量子Pontus-Mpemba效应（QPME）在U(1)对称性的实时间和虚时间动力学中均可出现。该效应采用两步演化协议：系统先在破缺对称性的哈密顿量下演化，再切换至对称哈密顿量，其弛豫速度竟快于直接在对称哈密顿量下演化。利用倾斜铁磁初态，证明瞬态非对称演化显著加速实时间热化或虚时间基态收敛；小倾斜角时效应显著，大倾斜角或反铁磁初态则抑制该效应。不同系统尺寸的数值证据确认了该效应在热力学极限下的鲁棒性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作证明了量子Pontus-Mpemba效应（QPME）在U(1)对称性的实时间和虚时间动力学中均可出现。该效应采用两步演化协议：系统先在破缺对称性的哈密顿量下演化，再切换至对称哈密顿量，其弛豫速度竟快于直接在对称哈密顿量下演化。利用倾斜铁磁初态，证明瞬态非对称演化显著加速实时间热化或虚时间基态收敛；小倾斜角时效应显著，大倾斜角或反铁磁初态则抑制该效应。不同系统尺寸的数值证据确认了该效应在热力学极限下的鲁棒性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.01960v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The quantum Pontus-Mpemba effect (QPME) is a counterintuitive phenomenon wherein a quantum system relaxes more rapidly through a two-step evolution protocol than through direct evolution under a symmetric Hamiltonian alone. In this protocol, the system first evolves under a symmetry-breaking Hamiltonian and then switches to a symmetric one. We demonstrate that QPME occurs under both real-time and imaginary-time dynamics with respect to U(1)-symmetry. Using tilted ferromagnetic initial states, we demonstrate that a transient asymmetric evolution significantly accelerates thermalization or convergence to the ground state for both real-time and imaginary-time evolutions, respectively. The effect is pronounced for small tilt angles, while larger tilts or antiferromagnetic initial states suppress it. Numerical evidence across different system sizes confirms the robustness of QPME, demonstrating its stability in the thermodynamic limit. This work extends the framework of nonequilibrium quantum phenomena to incorporate active state preparation, with direct implications for the implementation of quantum simulation.

160

用于变温插件中光学实验的模块化光探测磁共振装置研制#

Development of a Modular Optically Detected Magnetic Resonance Setup for Optical Experiments in a Variable Temperature Insert
📚 arXiv👤 Anh Tong, Andreas Bauer, Markus Kleinhans, James S. Schilling, Christian H. Back, Karl D. Briegel, Fabian A. Freire-Moschovitis, Dominik B. Bucher, Christian Pfleiderer📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该装置的核心创新在于通过近两米的光路延伸实现外置激发-探测，突破了低温插件空间受限对NV磁测量的限制。其意义在于无需改造现有液氦恒温器即可集成量子传感功能，为凝聚态材料相变、低温磁性的原位高灵敏检测提
该工作开发了一种与商用液氦浴低温恒温器及其变温插件兼容的光探测磁共振（ODMR）装置。光路延伸近两米贯穿低温插件全长，可在恒温器外部激发氮空位（NV）中心并探测荧光信号，同时保持光路对准和光束质量。该装置无需对现有低温系统进行大幅改造即可集成，通过测量共振信号的温度依赖性、小磁场响应以及SrRuO₃样品的磁相变，验证了其在受限低温环境中实现NV磁测量的可行性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作开发了一种与商用液氦浴低温恒温器及其变温插件兼容的光探测磁共振（ODMR）装置。光路延伸近两米贯穿低温插件全长，可在恒温器外部激发氮空位（NV）中心并探测荧光信号，同时保持光路对准和光束质量。该装置无需对现有低温系统进行大幅改造即可集成，通过测量共振信号的温度依赖性、小磁场响应以及SrRuO₃样品的磁相变，验证了其在受限低温环境中实现NV磁测量的可行性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.05181v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We developed an optically detected magnetic resonance (ODMR) setup designed for compatibility with a widely used, commercially available helium bath cryostat equipped with a variable temperature insert. The optical path extends nearly two meters, spanning the full length of the cryostat insert, enabling excitation of the nitrogen-vacancy (NV) centers and detection of the resulting fluorescence from outside the cryostat. The setup preserves optical alignment and beam quality along this extended path allowing integration into existing cryogenic systems without significant modifications. We demonstrate the setup's performance by measuring the temperature dependence of the resonance signal and its behavior under small applied magnetic fields, as well as the magnetic transition of a SrRuO₃ sample, thereby showcasing the feasibility of NV magnetometry on a sample in constrained cryogenic environments.

161

具有对称次近邻相互作用的S=1/2自旋链可积性与不可积性的完全分类#

Complete classification of integrability and non-integrability of S=1/2 spin chains with symmetric next-nearest-neighbor interaction
📚 arXiv👤 Naoto Shiraishi📅 2026-04-13⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次完成了对锯齿自旋链可积性的严格数学分类，核心创新在于证明可积性仅存在于两个孤立点，排除了中间可积模型的可能性。这一结果为量子混沌与可积性的边界提供了精确判据，对理解低维量子系统的普适类及热化
该工作对具有平移不变和反演对称次近邻相互作用（即锯齿自旋链）的S=1/2量子自旋链进行了可积性的完全分类。证明该类系统中仅存在两个可积模型：一个经典模型和一个可通过Bethe ansatz求解的模型，其余所有系统均为不可积。该分类定理确认了此类自旋链中不存在遗漏的可积模型，也意味着不存在具有有限数目局域守恒量的中间模型。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作对具有平移不变和反演对称次近邻相互作用（即锯齿自旋链）的S=1/2量子自旋链进行了可积性的完全分类。证明该类系统中仅存在两个可积模型：一个经典模型和一个可通过Bethe ansatz求解的模型，其余所有系统均为不可积。该分类定理确认了此类自旋链中不存在遗漏的可积模型，也意味着不存在具有有限数目局域守恒量的中间模型。

English Abstract

arXiv:2501.15506v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We study S=1/2 quantum spin chains with shift-invariant and inversion-symmetric next-nearest-neighbor interaction, also known as zigzag spin chains. We completely classify the integrability and non-integrability of the above class of spin systems. We prove that in this class there are only two integrable models, a classical model and a model solvable by the Bethe ansatz, and all the remaining systems are non-integrable. Our classification theorem confirms that within this class of spin chains, there is no missing integrable model. This theorem also implies the absence of intermediate models with a finite number of local conserved quantities.

04

AI / 机器学习专题#

覆盖模型、方法与 AI for Science 应用工作。

01

基于机器学习驱动晶体构型空间路径搜索的TiO₂多形体动力学持续性研究#

An Investigation in the Kinetic Persistence of TiO₂ Polymorphs using Machine Learning Driven Pathfinding in Crystal Configuration Space
📚 arXiv👤 Max C. Gallant, David Mrdjenovich, Kristin A. Persson📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本研究创新性地将晶体标准形图表示与机器学习相结合，构建亚稳态多形体间无扩散相变路径的高效搜索算法，突破了传统方法在复杂构型空间中采样效率低下的瓶颈。以TiO₂为原型体系，建立了路径能量障碍与实验可合成
随着理论预测材料数量持续增长，评估其热力学稳定性及实际合成条件下的动力学可行性日益重要。本研究提出识别亚稳态多形体与其基态对应物之间无扩散相变路径的新方法，基于晶体标准形(Crystal Normal Form)的图表示构建路径搜索算法，探讨路径能量学与各相实验观测的关联。将该方法应用于二氧化钛体系，涵盖锐钛矿、金红石、板钛矿及多种假想亚稳态多形体。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

随着理论预测材料数量持续增长，评估其热力学稳定性及实际合成条件下的动力学可行性日益重要。本研究提出识别亚稳态多形体与其基态对应物之间无扩散相变路径的新方法，基于晶体标准形(Crystal Normal Form)的图表示构建路径搜索算法，探讨路径能量学与各相实验观测的关联。将该方法应用于二氧化钛体系，涵盖锐钛矿、金红石、板钛矿及多种假想亚稳态多形体。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14509v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: As the number of theoretically predicted materials continues to grow, it becomes increasingly important to assess not only their thermodynamic stability but also their kinetic viability under realistic synthesis conditions. In this study, we investigate the hypothesis that the kinetic persistence of a metastable polymorph is related to the topography of the potential energy landscape separating it from lower energy phases. To accomplish this, we develop a new method for identifying diffusionless transformation pathways between metastable polymorphs and their ground-state counterparts and discuss the energetics of those pathways with respect to the experimental observation of each phase. This algorithm is underpinned by the recently developed Crystal Normal Form, which provides a graph representation of crystal configuration space and supplies the substrate for our pathfinding algorithm. We apply this method to the titanium dioxide system which contains the well-known anatase, rutile, and brookite phases in addition to a number of hypothetical metastable polymorphs.

02

基于神经网络量子态的一维谐振囚禁排斥玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体孤子解#

Solitonic Solutions of the One-Dimensional Harmonically Trapped Repulsive Bose-Einstein Condensate via Neural Network Quantum States
📚 arXiv👤 Gaoqing Meng, Mingshu Zhao📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将神经网络量子态方法引入非线性波动力学，首次在排斥相互作用谐振囚禁玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体中发现亮孤子、双亮孤子及暗孤子等周期轨道解，揭示了囚禁诱导有效吸引与排斥作用平衡的新机制，为非线性系
本工作证明了排斥相互作用、谐振囚禁的准一维玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体（由Gross-Pitaevskii方程描述）中存在亮孤子。采用神经网络量子态(NNQS)方法参数化初始波函数并优化，寻找在一个囚禁周期后重现的解，实现排斥作用与囚禁诱导吸引的有效平衡。除亮孤子解外，还报道了双亮孤子和暗孤子态；通过乘性相位和振幅噪声微扰证实这些周期轨道具有轨道稳定性。结果表明NNQS为揭示非线性波系统相干结构提供了有力框架。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本工作证明了排斥相互作用、谐振囚禁的准一维玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体（由Gross-Pitaevskii方程描述）中存在亮孤子。采用神经网络量子态(NNQS)方法参数化初始波函数并优化，寻找在一个囚禁周期后重现的解，实现排斥作用与囚禁诱导吸引的有效平衡。除亮孤子解外，还报道了双亮孤子和暗孤子态；通过乘性相位和振幅噪声微扰证实这些周期轨道具有轨道稳定性。结果表明NNQS为揭示非线性波系统相干结构提供了有力框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14529v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We demonstrate the existence of bright solitons in a repulsively interacting, harmonically trapped quasi-one-dimensional Bose-Einstein condensate described by the Gross-Pitaevskii equation. Using a neural-network quantum state (NNQS) approach, we parametrize the initial wavefunction and optimize it to find solutions that recur after one trap period, effectively balancing repulsion with trap-induced attraction. Aside from the bright solitonic solution, we also report double bright and dark soliton states. Perturbing the initial state with multiplicative phase and amplitude noise confirms that these periodic orbits are orbitally stable. Our results indicate that NNQS provides a powerful framework for uncovering coherent structures in nonlinear wave systems.

03

变分张量网络态的单层框架#

Single-layer framework of variational tensor network states
📚 arXiv👤 Hongyu Chen, Yangfeng Fu, Weiqiang Yu, Rong Yu, Z. Y. Xie📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破传统张量网络逐层缩并的计算瓶颈，以单层变分架构融合嵌套网络与自动微分，实现键维代价的指数级压缩；首次在无对称性辅助下将键维推至9，为强关联量子阻挫体系的高精度模拟提供可扩展新范式，并有力佐证
该工作提出一种用于二维量子晶格模型基态变分求解的单层张量网络框架，通过结合嵌套张量网络方法与自动微分技术，将键维计算成本降低约三个数量级。在无GPU加速和对称性约束的情况下，键维达到9，并准确获得正方格反铁磁海森堡模型和受挫Shastry-Sutherland模型的基态能量与序参量，确认了后者中间空 plaquette 价键固体基态的存在。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出一种用于二维量子晶格模型基态变分求解的单层张量网络框架，通过结合嵌套张量网络方法与自动微分技术，将键维计算成本降低约三个数量级。在无GPU加速和对称性约束的情况下，键维达到9，并准确获得正方格反铁磁海森堡模型和受挫Shastry-Sutherland模型的基态能量与序参量，确认了后者中间空 plaquette 价键固体基态的存在。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.14414v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We propose a single-layer tensor network framework for the variational determination of ground states in two-dimensional quantum lattice models. By combining the nested tensor network method [Phys. Rev. B 96, 045128 (2017)] with the automatic differentiation technique, our approach can reduce the computational cost by three orders of magnitude in bond dimension, and therefore enables highly efficient variational ground-state calculations. We demonstrate the capability of this framework through two quantum spin models: the antiferromagnetic Heisenberg model on a square lattice and the frustrated Shastry-Sutherland model. Even without GPU acceleration or symmetry implementation, we have achieved a bond dimension of nine and obtained accurate ground-state energy and consistent order parameters compared to prior studies. In particular, we confirm the existence of an intermediate empty-plaquette valence bond solid ground state in the Shastry-Sutherland model. We have further discussed the convergence of the algorithm and its potential improvements. Our work provides a promising route for large-scale tensor network calculations of two-dimensional quantum systems.

04

浅层信道电路制备的混合态学习与生成#

Learning and Generating Mixed States Prepared by Shallow Channel Circuits
📚 arXiv👤 Fangjun Hu, Christian Kokail, Milan Kornjača, Pedro L. S. Lopes, Weiyuan Gong, Sheng-Tao Wang, Xun Gao, Stefan Ostermann📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破了纯态假设的限制，首次证明浅层量子电路可高效表征并学习平凡相中的任意混合态，多项式样本复杂度优于传统量子态层析，为噪声环境下的量子生成模型与量子机器学习奠定了理论基础。
该工作研究从测量数据中学习生成有限维格点上混合态的问题，聚焦于平凡相中的任意混合态。作者证明：任何此类混合态均可仅通过测量访问被高效学习，算法输出能近似生成该态的浅层局域信道电路，样本复杂度和运行时间在量子比特数上呈多项式或拟多项式。该结果为基于浅层量子生成模型提供了结构性基础。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究从测量数据中学习生成有限维格点上混合态的问题，聚焦于平凡相中的任意混合态。作者证明：任何此类混合态均可仅通过测量访问被高效学习，算法输出能近似生成该态的浅层局域信道电路，样本复杂度和运行时间在量子比特数上呈多项式或拟多项式。该结果为基于浅层量子生成模型提供了结构性基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.01197v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Learning quantum states from measurement data is a central problem in quantum information and computational complexity. In this work, we study the problem of learning to generate mixed states on a finite-dimensional lattice. Motivated by recent developments in mixed state phases of matter, we focus on arbitrary states in the trivial phase. A state belongs to the trivial phase if there exists a shallow preparation channel circuit under which local reversibility is preserved throughout the preparation. We prove that any mixed state in this class can be efficiently learned from measurement access alone. Specifically, given copies of an unknown trivial phase mixed state, our algorithm outputs a shallow local channel circuit that approximately generates this state in trace distance. The sample complexity and runtime are polynomial (or quasi-polynomial) in the number of qubits, assuming constant (or polylogarithmic) circuit depth and gate locality. Importantly, the learner is not given the original preparation circuit and relies only on its existence. Our results provide a structural foundation for quantum generative models based on shallow channel circuits. In the classical limit, our framework also inspires an efficient algorithm for classical diffusion models using only a polynomial overhead of training and generation.

05

用于稳态电热输运的LSTM-PINN：保持强耦合热流与流体多场一致性#

LSTM-PINN for Steady-State Electrothermal Transport: Preserving Multi-Field Consis tency in Strongly Coupled Heat and Fluid Flow
📚 arXiv👤 Yuqing Zhou, Ze Tao, Hanxuan Wang, Fujun Liu📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将LSTM长程记忆机制融入物理信息神经网络，突破传统PINN在处理稳态电热多物理场耦合时难以保持跨场一致性的瓶颈。核心创新在于以深度递归结构捕捉空间长程依赖，并嵌入五场统一公式的物理约束，有效消
针对稳态电热系统中热传递、流体流动与电势输运的强耦合问题，作者提出LSTM-PINN框架，利用深度递归记忆机制保持长程空间特征依赖性和严格的跨场一致性。在涵盖四种复杂对流与阻力机制的统一五场公式下，该架构有效抑制非物理伪影和结构畸变，在全局误差和热力学保真度上均优于现有基线方法。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

针对稳态电热系统中热传递、流体流动与电势输运的强耦合问题，作者提出LSTM-PINN框架，利用深度递归记忆机制保持长程空间特征依赖性和严格的跨场一致性。在涵盖四种复杂对流与阻力机制的统一五场公式下，该架构有效抑制非物理伪影和结构畸变，在全局误差和热力学保真度上均优于现有基线方法。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14201v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Steady-state electrothermal systems involve strongly coupled heat transfer, fluid flow, and electric-potential transport, creating severe numerical challenges for standard physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) due to stark disparities in gradient scales and residual stiffnesses across the physical fields. To resolve these multiphysics bottlenecks, we introduce a Long Short-Term Memory PINN (LSTM-PINN) framework that utilizes a depth-recursive memory mechanism to preserve long-range spatial feature dependencies and maintain strict cross-field consistency. The proposed architecture is rigorously evaluated against conventional and attention-based networks across a unified five-field formulation encompassing four complex convective and drag regimes: Boussinesq electrothermal flow, drift-potential gauge-constrained transport, strong buoyancy-coupled convection, and Brinkman--Forchheimer drift. Quantitative and visual analyses demonstrate that LSTM-PINN successfully suppresses non-physical artifacts and structural distortions, yielding the highest thermodynamic fidelity and consistently outperforming state-of-the-art baselines in global error metrics. Ultimately, this memory-enhanced approach provides a highly robust and accurate computational baseline for capturing localized boundary layers and complex energy-momentum feedback in advanced electrothermal energy systems.

06

嵌入方程学习器的场反演符号回归用于可解释湍流模型修正#

Field Inversion Symbolic Regression with Embedded Equation Learner for Interpretable Turbulence Model Correction
📚 arXiv👤 Li Jiazhe, Wu Chenyu, He Zizhou, Zhang Yufei📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将符号方程学习与伴随法场反演耦合，突破传统湍流模型修正"黑箱"困境，以显式代数形式实现与神经网络相当的预测精度，为工程湍流建模提供了兼具高精度与物理可解释性的新范式。
该工作提出FISR-EQL框架，将方程学习直接嵌入基于伴随方法的PDE约束场反演过程，实现端到端参数优化。应用于SST模型并在典型分离流上训练后，所得显式表达式显著减小分离泡过预测并改善再附预测，性能媲美神经网络端到端方法同时保持完全可解释性。泛化性在未见的周期性山丘、表面安装立方体及NLR7301高升力翼型上得到验证。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出FISR-EQL框架，将方程学习直接嵌入基于伴随方法的PDE约束场反演过程，实现端到端参数优化。应用于SST模型并在典型分离流上训练后，所得显式表达式显著减小分离泡过预测并改善再附预测，性能媲美神经网络端到端方法同时保持完全可解释性。泛化性在未见的周期性山丘、表面安装立方体及NLR7301高升力翼型上得到验证。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14569v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: An interpretable, physics-consistent turbulence model correction framework, termed FISR-Equation Learner (EQL), is proposed by embedding equation learning directly into a Partial Differential Equations (PDE)-constrained field inversion process based on the adjoint method. Unlike conventional two-stage approaches, the correction model is optimized end-to-end in parameter space using an EQL architecture, enabling the direct identification of compact analytical expressions while maintaining consistency with the governing equations. The method is applied to the shear-stress-transport (SST) model and trained on two canonical separated flows, the curved backward-facing step and the NASA hump. The resulting explicit expression significantly reduces separation bubble overprediction and improves reattachment prediction, achieving performance comparable to neural-network-based end-to-end methods while retaining full interpretability. Generalization is demonstrated on unseen configurations, including periodic hills, a surface-mounted cube, and the high-lift NLR7301 airfoil. The model improves separated-flow predictions and stall characteristics without degrading attached boundary-layer performance. Overall, FISR-EQL provides a practical pathway toward optimal yet transparent data-driven turbulence model correction.

07

水纳米液滴界面电场对曲率和pH的弱依赖性#

Interfacial Electric Fields in Water Nanodroplets are Weakly Dependent on Curvature and pH
📚 arXiv👤 Gabriele Amante, Fortunata Panzera, Gabriele Centi, Jing Xie, Ali Hassanali, A. Marco Saitta, Giuseppe Cassone📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究首次实现气-水界面电场的量子力学空间分辨表征，揭示界面电场与氢键数的线性关联。核心创新在于以高精度计算证伪了"曲率/ pH显著调制界面电场"的传统假设，从根本上否定了界面电场作为微米液滴反应性差
该工作结合深度学习分子动力学与从头算重采样，对气-水界面电场进行量子力学空间分辨表征。发现界面电场沿本征表面法向朝外，幅度约1.0-1.2 V/Å，与界面分子平均氢键数呈线性关系。关键发现是：曲率和pH对界面电场影响微弱，在实验相关液滴尺寸和pH下可忽略；3至40 μm液滴间电场变化仅约10⁻⁵倍，说明微米液滴反应性差异不能归因于界面电场变化。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作结合深度学习分子动力学与从头算重采样，对气-水界面电场进行量子力学空间分辨表征。发现界面电场沿本征表面法向朝外，幅度约1.0-1.2 V/Å，与界面分子平均氢键数呈线性关系。关键发现是：曲率和pH对界面电场影响微弱，在实验相关液滴尺寸和pH下可忽略；3至40 μm液滴间电场变化仅约10⁻⁵倍，说明微米液滴反应性差异不能归因于界面电场变化。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14784v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The origin of enhanced reactivity in aqueous microdroplets remains debated, with interfacial electric fields (IEFs) often invoked as catalytic drivers. Here, we provide a quantum-mechanical, spatially resolved characterization of the electric field at air-water interfaces by combining deep-learning molecular dynamics with emphab initio re-sampling. Across planar interfaces and nanodroplets of varying curvature and charge state, we find an outward-oriented field of sim 1.0--1.2 V/Å along the intrinsic surface normal. Crucially, its magnitude scales linearly with the average number of hydrogen bonds per interfacial molecule, directly tying the field to the local hydrogen-bond network. Despite its large magnitude and contrary to common expectations, we find that curvature and pH exert only a minor influence on the IEF, becoming negligible at experimentally relevant droplet sizes and pH. Consequently, the reactivity differences observed in μm-sized droplets cannot be ascribed to variations in the IEF, which changes by a factor of only sim10⁻⁵ between 3 and 40μm-sized droplets. Moreover, the IEF is localized inside the interfacial region and rapidly vanishes within a few Å. This strong spatial confinement renders the IEF strongly tied to the local electronic structure, identifying it as a local property of the air-water boundary rather than an independent physical driver of ``on-water'' catalysis.

08

面向加速设计的物理信息时空代理模型非侵入式学习#

Non-intrusive Learning of Physics-Informed Spatio-temporal Surrogate for Accelerating Design
📚 arXiv👤 Sudeepta Mondal, Soumalya Sarkar📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将Koopman理论嵌入时空代理模型，以线性算符刻画非线性动力学的不变子空间，实现物理约束与数据驱动的融合；其核心突破在于突破纯数据驱动方法的分布外泛化瓶颈，为复杂多物理场仿真提供数量级加速，兼
该工作提出了一种物理信息时空代理建模（PISTM）框架，用于加速涉及非线性时空动力学系统的工程设计。框架利用Koopman自编码器的最新进展，通过学习系统的不变子空间和线性演化算符来构建受底层物理约束的代理模型。与纯数据驱动方法相比，该框架增强了对训练分布外输入的泛化能力，可替代计算昂贵的高保真多物理场模拟，数量级加速端到端工程设计流程中的数据生成环节。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出了一种物理信息时空代理建模（PISTM）框架，用于加速涉及非线性时空动力学系统的工程设计。框架利用Koopman自编码器的最新进展，通过学习系统的不变子空间和线性演化算符来构建受底层物理约束的代理模型。与纯数据驱动方法相比，该框架增强了对训练分布外输入的泛化能力，可替代计算昂贵的高保真多物理场模拟，数量级加速端到端工程设计流程中的数据生成环节。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14424v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Most practical engineering design problems involve nonlinear spatio-temporal dynamical systems. Multi-physics simulations are often performed to capture the fine spatio-temporal scales which govern the evolution of these systems. However, these simulations are often high-fidelity in nature, and can be computationally very expensive. Hence, generating data from these expensive simulations becomes a bottleneck in an end-to-end engineering design process. Spatio-temporal surrogate modeling of these dynamical systems has been a popular data-driven solution to tackle this computational bottleneck. This is because accurate machine learning models emulating the dynamical systems can be orders of magnitude faster than the actual simulations. However, one key limitation of purely data-driven approaches is their lack of generalizability to inputs outside the training distribution. In this paper, we propose a physics-informed spatio-temporal surrogate modeling (PISTM) framework constrained by the physics of the underlying dynamical system. The framework leverages state-of-the-art advancements in the field of Koopman autoencoders to learn the underlying spatio-temporal dynamics in a non-intrusive manner, coupled with a spatio-temporal surrogate model which predicts the behavior of the Koopman operator in a specified time window for unknown operating conditions. We evaluate our framework on a prototypical fluid flow problem of interest: two-dimensional incompressible flow around a cylinder.

09

PINNs的辅助有限差分残差梯度正则化#

Auxiliary Finite-Difference Residual-Gradient Regularization for PINNs
📚 arXiv👤 Stavros Kassinos📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将有限差分以弱辅助项形式引入PINNs，在不替代自动微分的前提下对残差梯度进行正则化。核心优势在于兼顾计算效率与物理约束精度，三维热传导案例证实其能显著改善壁面热通量等工程关键物理量的预
该工作研究了一种混合设计的物理信息神经网络（PINNs），其中控制方程残差仍基于自动微分（AD），而有限差分（FD）仅出现在弱辅助项中，用于惩罚采样残差场的梯度。该FD项在不替换PDE残差的前提下对残差场进行正则化。在一维泊松基准测试中，FD正则化再现了残差梯度控制的主要效果，但存在场精度与残差洁净度之间的权衡；在三维环形热传导基准测试中，基于贴体壳层的正则化改善了面向应用的壁面热通量等物理量。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究了一种混合设计的物理信息神经网络（PINNs），其中控制方程残差仍基于自动微分（AD），而有限差分（FD）仅出现在弱辅助项中，用于惩罚采样残差场的梯度。该FD项在不替换PDE残差的前提下对残差场进行正则化。在一维泊松基准测试中，FD正则化再现了残差梯度控制的主要效果，但存在场精度与残差洁净度之间的权衡；在三维环形热传导基准测试中，基于贴体壳层的正则化改善了面向应用的壁面热通量等物理量。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14472v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are often selected by a single scalar loss even when the quantity of interest is more specific. We study a hybrid design in which the governing PDE residual remains automatic-differentiation (AD) based, while finite differences (FD) appear only in a weak auxiliary term that penalizes gradients of the sampled residual field. The FD term regularizes the residual field without replacing the PDE residual itself. We examine this idea in two stages. Stage 1 is a controlled Poisson benchmark comparing a baseline PINN, the FD residual-gradient regularizer, and a matched AD residual-gradient baseline. Stage 2 transfers the same logic to a three-dimensional annular heat-conduction benchmark (PINN3D), where baseline errors concentrate near a wavy outer wall and the auxiliary grid is implemented as a body-fitted shell adjacent to the wall. In Stage 1, the FD regularizer reproduces the main effect of residual-gradient control while exposing a trade-off between field accuracy and residual cleanliness. In Stage 2, the shell regularizer improves the application-facing quantities, namely outer-wall flux and boundary-condition behavior. Across seeds 0-5 and 100k epochs, the most reliable tested configuration is a fixed shell weight of 5e-4 under the Kourkoutas-beta optimizer regime: relative to a matched run without the shell term, it reduces the mean outer-wall BC RMSE from 1.22e-2 to 9.29e-4 and the mean wall-flux RMSE from 9.21e-3 to 9.63e-4. Adam with beta2=0.999 becomes usable when the initial learning rate is reduced to 1e-3, although its shell benefit is less robust than under Kourkoutas-beta. Overall, the results support a targeted view of hybrid PINNs: an auxiliary-only FD regularizer is most valuable when it is aligned with the physical quantity of interest, here the outer-wall flux.

10

基于参数化PINN框架的金属增材制造材料无关零样本热推断#

Material-Agnostic Zero-Shot Thermal Inference for Metal Additive Manufacturing via a Parametric PINN Framework
📚 arXiv👤 Hyeonsu Lee, Jihoon Jeong📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究通过解耦材料参数与时空坐标的参数化PINN架构，结合Rosenthal解析解引导的物理缩放，突破了传统数据驱动热模型对特定材料标注数据的依赖，为金属增材制造实现真正的材料无关实时热场预测提供了可
该工作提出了一种参数化物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架，实现金属增材制造中跨任意材料的零样本热场推断，无需标注数据、重训练或预训练。框架采用解耦的参数化PINN架构，分别编码材料性质和时空坐标，通过条件调制融合以更好匹配控制方程和边界条件中材料参数的多plicative作用。进一步结合基于Rosenthal解析解的物理引导输出缩放和混合优化策略，增强物理一致性、训练稳定性和收敛性，解决了不同材料依赖热行为的泛化难题。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出了一种参数化物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架，实现金属增材制造中跨任意材料的零样本热场推断，无需标注数据、重训练或预训练。框架采用解耦的参数化PINN架构，分别编码材料性质和时空坐标，通过条件调制融合以更好匹配控制方程和边界条件中材料参数的多plicative作用。进一步结合基于Rosenthal解析解的物理引导输出缩放和混合优化策略，增强物理一致性、训练稳定性和收敛性，解决了不同材料依赖热行为的泛化难题。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14562v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Accurate thermal modeling in metal additive manufacturing (AM) is essential for understanding the process-structure-performance relationship. While prior studies have explored generalization across unseen process conditions, they often require extensive datasets, costly retraining, or pre-training. Generalization across different materials also remains relatively unexplored due to the challenges posed by distinct material-dependent thermal behaviors. This paper introduces a parametric physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework for zero-shot generalization across arbitrary materials without labeled data, retraining, or pre-training. The framework adopts a decoupled parametric PINN architecture that separately encodes material properties and spatiotemporal coordinates, fusing them through conditional modulation to better align with the multiplicative role of material parameters in the governing equation and boundary conditions. Physics-guided output scaling derived from Rosenthal's analytical solution and a hybrid optimization strategy are further incorporated to enhance physical consistency, training stability, and convergence. Experiments on bare plate laser powder bed fusion (LPBF) across diverse metal alloys, including both in-distribution and out-of-distribution cases, demonstrate effective zero-shot generalizability along with superior training efficiency. Specifically, the proposed framework achieved up to a 64.2% reduction in relative L2 error compared to the non-parametric baseline while surpassing its performance within only 4.4% of the baseline training epochs. Ablation studies confirm that the proposed framework's components are broadly applicable to other PINN-based approaches. Overall, the proposed framework provides an efficient and scalable material-agnostic solution for zero-shot thermal modeling, contributing to more flexible and practical deployment in metal AM.

11

基于模体的持续同调过滤：图同构与性质预测的框架#

Motif-based filtrations for persistent homology: A framework for graph isomorphism and property prediction
📚 arXiv👤 Meritxell Vila-Miñana, Robert Jankowski, Aina Ferrà Marcús, Rubén Ballester, M. Ángeles Serrano, Carles Casacuberta📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将代数拓扑中的持续同调与图模体理论相结合，创新性地提出基于循环密度（三角形、无弦四/五边形）的边加权过滤方案，突破了传统Vietoris-Rips过滤在图同构判定中的表达局限。其核心贡献在于：以
该工作利用基于模体过滤的持续同调方法解决图同构问题，通过跟踪结构特征沿过滤的持续性来概括数据形状。采用基于三角形、无弦四边形和无弦五边形密度的边加权方案构建循环密度过滤，在四类具有对称性的挑战性图族中完美或近乎完美地区分非同构图。该方法在计算成本低于基于自我网络距离方法的同时，匹配或超越其精度，并优于基于曲率、度和Vietoris-Rips的过滤方法。其表达能力超越同构测试，可捕获丰富的结构信息用于图性质预测。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用基于模体过滤的持续同调方法解决图同构问题，通过跟踪结构特征沿过滤的持续性来概括数据形状。采用基于三角形、无弦四边形和无弦五边形密度的边加权方案构建循环密度过滤，在四类具有对称性的挑战性图族中完美或近乎完美地区分非同构图。该方法在计算成本低于基于自我网络距离方法的同时，匹配或超越其精度，并优于基于曲率、度和Vietoris-Rips的过滤方法。其表达能力超越同构测试，可捕获丰富的结构信息用于图性质预测。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15265v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Determining whether two graphs are isomorphic is a fundamental problem with practical applications in areas such as molecular chemistry or social network analysis, yet it remains a challenging task, with exact solutions often being computationally expensive. We address this task using persistent homology built on motif-based filtrations of graphs, a method from topological data analysis that summarizes the shape of data by tracking the persistence of structural features along filtrations. Specifically, we use edge-weighting schemes based on the densities of triangles, chordless squares, and chordless pentagons, which have been shown to be effective for detecting network dimensionality. Our cycle-density filtrations distinguish non-isomorphic graphs perfectly or nearly perfectly across four demanding graph families, many of which exhibit symmetries. We outperform curvature-based, degree-based, and Vietoris--Rips filtrations, and match or exceed the accuracy of egonet-distance methods while incurring a lower computational cost. The expressive power of our filtrations goes beyond isomorphism testing: because they capture rich structural information from graphs, they consistently achieve top performance on property prediction tasks using real-world data, and exhibit high sensitivity to edge rewiring and removal. Together, these findings establish cycle-density filtrations as an effective and computationally tractable framework for graph comparison and characterization, bridging topological data analysis and network science.

12

利用Neural Physics进行陆面模型参数估计#

Parameter estimation for land-surface models using Neural Physics
📚 arXiv👤 Ruiyue Huang, Claire E. Heaney, Maarten van Reeuwijk📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将Neural Physics嵌入可微物理框架，以梯度优化替代伴随方程推导，实现陆面模型时变参数的直接反演；前向模型保持纯物理、无训练，为地球系统模型参数估计提供了兼具物理一致性与计算可扩展性的
该工作提出了一种新的反演建模方法，通过将数据同化到可微的物理前向模型中估计简单陆面模型（LSM）的参数。控制方程在机器学习框架中使用Neural Physics方法表达，无需推导和维护伴随公式即可直接基于梯度优化时变参数。前向模型保持完全基于物理，参数估计过程不涉及训练。通过合成数据集测试表明，该工作围绕土壤温度时间序列的参数反演展开，但可靠估计参数的可行性需进一步考察，详情需查阅原文。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出了一种新的反演建模方法，通过将数据同化到可微的物理前向模型中估计简单陆面模型（LSM）的参数。控制方程在机器学习框架中使用Neural Physics方法表达，无需推导和维护伴随公式即可直接基于梯度优化时变参数。前向模型保持完全基于物理，参数估计过程不涉及训练。通过合成数据集测试表明，该工作围绕土壤温度时间序列的参数反演展开，但可靠估计参数的可行性需进一步考察，详情需查阅原文。

English Abstract

arXiv:2505.02979v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We propose a novel inverse-modelling approach which estimates the parameters of a simple land-surface model (LSM) by assimilating data into a differentiable physics-based forward model. The governing equations are expressed within a machine-learning framework using the Neural Physics approach, allowing direct gradient-based optimisation of time-dependent parameters without the need to derive and maintain adjoint formulations. The model parameters are updated by minimising the mismatch between model predictions and synthetic or observational data. Although differentiability is achieved through functionality in machine-learning libraries, the forward model itself remains entirely physics-based and no part of either the forward model or the parameter estimation involves training. In order to test the approach, a synthetic dataset is generated by running the forward model with known parameter values to create a time series of soil temperature that serves as observations for an inverse problem in which the parameters are assumed unknown and subsequently estimated. We show that it is not possible to obtain a reliable estimate of the parameters using a time series of soil temperature observed at a single depth. Using measurements at two depths, reliable parameter estimates can be obtained although it is not possible to differentiate between latent and sensible heat fluxes. We also apply the approach to urban flux tower data from Phoenix, United States, and show that the thermal conductivity, volumetric heat capacity and the combined sensible-latent heat transfer coefficient can be reliably estimated whilst using an observed value for the effective surface albedo.

13

钾长石非均相冰核形成的分子机制#

Molecular mechanism of heterogeneous ice nucleation on potassium feldspar
📚 arXiv👤 Wanqi Zhou, Pablo M. Piaggi📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本研究以机器学习势函数结合增强采样分子动力学，首次在原子尺度揭示了钾长石(110)缺陷表面通过模板效应诱导立方冰异相成核的分子机制，澄清了实验观测的取向成因，为改进气候模式中冰核参数化方案提供了微观物
矿物粉尘气溶胶作为冰核颗粒对地球气候有重要影响，其中钾长石被认为是主导的冰核颗粒。本研究利用机器学习分子动力学模拟，系统研究了冰在多种钾长石表面的成核过程，发现(110)面（在缺陷如台阶处暴露）是最活跃的冰形成晶面。该表面能将界面水排列成类似立方冰(110)面的结构，为成核提供了最优模板。研究通过先进采样方法直接观察到立方冰结构团簇的形成，其取向与实验一致，为大气中冰形成的分子机制提供了新解释。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

矿物粉尘气溶胶作为冰核颗粒对地球气候有重要影响，其中钾长石被认为是主导的冰核颗粒。本研究利用机器学习分子动力学模拟，系统研究了冰在多种钾长石表面的成核过程，发现(110)面（在缺陷如台阶处暴露）是最活跃的冰形成晶面。该表面能将界面水排列成类似立方冰(110)面的结构，为成核提供了最优模板。研究通过先进采样方法直接观察到立方冰结构团簇的形成，其取向与实验一致，为大气中冰形成的分子机制提供了新解释。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.13402v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Mineral dust aerosols strongly influence Earth's climate by acting as ice-nucleating particles (INPs). Feldspar minerals, particularly K-feldspar, are recognized as dominant INPs, and a previous study attributed this behavior to (100) surfaces exposed at defects. Using machine-learning molecular dynamics simulations, we systematically investigate ice nucleation on multiple K-feldspar surfaces. We identify the (110) surface, exposed at defects such as steps, as the most active plane for ice formation. This surface uniquely structures interfacial water into an arrangement resembling that on the (110) surface of cubic ice, providing an optimal template for nucleation. Using advanced sampling, we directly observe the formation of clusters with cubic-ice structure and their orientation agrees with experiment. These results provide a molecular-level explanation of how ice forms in our planet's atmosphere.

14

基于高斯过程的贝叶斯优化加速驻点搜索#

Bayesian Optimization with Gaussian Processes to Accelerate Stationary Point Searches
📚 arXiv👤 Rohit Goswami (Institute IMX and Lab-COSMO, École polytechnique fédérale de Lausanne)📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将势能面驻点搜索中的三类核心问题（极小值、鞍点、反应路径）统一于单一贝叶斯优化框架，通过高斯过程代理模型与主动学习策略显著降低第一性原理计算成本。其生产级扩展与开源实现为计算化学中的自动化势能面
构建局部代理模型以加速势能面上的驻点搜索是计算化学中的长期课题。本研究提出了一个统一的贝叶斯优化框架，将最小化、单点鞍点搜索和双端路径搜索统一为同一个六步代理循环，三者仅在内部优化目标和获取准则上有所不同。框架采用带导数观测的高斯过程回归、逆距离核和主动学习，并开发了多种生产级扩展，包括基于地球移动距离的最远点采样、MAP正则化、自适应信任半径和随机傅里叶特征缩放。附带的教学性Rust代码展示了三种应用共享同一贝叶斯优化循环。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

构建局部代理模型以加速势能面上的驻点搜索是计算化学中的长期课题。本研究提出了一个统一的贝叶斯优化框架，将最小化、单点鞍点搜索和双端路径搜索统一为同一个六步代理循环，三者仅在内部优化目标和获取准则上有所不同。框架采用带导数观测的高斯过程回归、逆距离核和主动学习，并开发了多种生产级扩展，包括基于地球移动距离的最远点采样、MAP正则化、自适应信任半径和随机傅里叶特征缩放。附带的教学性Rust代码展示了三种应用共享同一贝叶斯优化循环。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.10992v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Building local surrogates to accelerate stationary point searches on potential energy surfaces spans decades of effort. Done correctly, surrogates can reduce the number of expensive electronic structure evaluations by roughly an order of magnitude while preserving the accuracy of the underlying theory, with the gain depending on oracle cost, search distance, and the availability of analytical forces. We present a unified Bayesian optimization view of minimization, single-point saddle searches, and double-ended path searches: all three share one six-step surrogate loop and differ only in the inner optimization target and the acquisition criterion. The framework uses Gaussian process regression with derivative observations, inverse-distance kernels, and active learning, and we develop optional extensions for production use, including farthest-point sampling with the Earth Mover's Distance, MAP regularization, an adaptive trust radius, and random Fourier features for scaling. Accompanying pedagogical Rust code demonstrates that all three applications use the same Bayesian optimization loop, bridging the gap between theoretical formulation and practical execution.

15

机器学习模型中的量子启发的张量网络#

Quantum-inspired tensor networks in machine learning models
📚 arXiv👤 Guillermo Valverde, Igor García-Olaizola, Giannicola Scarpa, Alejandro Pozas-Kerstjens📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文将量子多体物理中的张量网络引入机器学习，突破传统神经网络的黑箱局限，利用纠缠结构实现高效压缩与可解释表示，为发展轻量、透明且具备隐私保护潜力的新型学习架构提供了跨学科路径。
张量网络最初在多体物理中发展为多粒子量子态的压缩表示，通过捕获最相关的关联来缓解指数复杂度。由于量子纠缠与统计关联之间的形式相似性，张量网络近年被引入机器学习领域，既作为替代学习架构，也作为神经网络组件的分解形式。本文综述了张量网络在机器学习中的应用，批判性地评估了当前研究现状、潜在优势以及需要克服的挑战，探讨了来自量子多体物理的理论理解如何转化为在计算效率、可解释性或隐私方面具有优势的新方法。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

张量网络最初在多体物理中发展为多粒子量子态的压缩表示，通过捕获最相关的关联来缓解指数复杂度。由于量子纠缠与统计关联之间的形式相似性，张量网络近年被引入机器学习领域，既作为替代学习架构，也作为神经网络组件的分解形式。本文综述了张量网络在机器学习中的应用，批判性地评估了当前研究现状、潜在优势以及需要克服的挑战，探讨了来自量子多体物理的理论理解如何转化为在计算效率、可解释性或隐私方面具有优势的新方法。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14287v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Tensor networks were developed in the context of many-body physics as compressed representations of multiparticle quantum states. These representations mitigate the exponential complexity of many-body systems by capturing only the most relevant dependencies. Due to the formal similarity between quantum entanglement and statistical correlations, tensor networks have recently been integrated in machine learning, operating both as alternative learning architectures and as decompositions of components of neural networks. The expectation is that the theoretical understanding of tensor networks developed within quantum many-body physics leads to novel methods that offer advantages in terms of computational efficiency, explainability, or privacy. Here we review the use of tensor networks in the context of machine learning, providing a critical assessment of the state of the art, the potential advantages, and the challenges that must be overcome.

16

最小数字条件化的热力学扩散推断#

Thermodynamic Diffusion Inference with Minimal Digital Conditioning
📚 arXiv👤 Aditi De📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将扩散推断完全映射至热力学平衡过程，核心创新在于以层次双线性耦合重构U-Net跳跃连接的非局域性，并设计极简数字接口（2560参数）实现高效条件化，为构建无需数字运算的超低能耗物理推断硬
扩散模型推断与过阻尼Langevin动力学在形式上是等价的，这意味着编码得分函数的物理基质可以仅通过热力学达到正确平衡输出，无需数字运算。该工作解决了实现这一等价性的两大障碍：非局部跳跃连接和输入条件化信号不足。研究提出了层次双线性耦合，将U-Net跳跃连接编码为基于编码器和解码器Gram矩阵奇异结构的秩-k模块间相互作用；同时设计了一个极简数字接口（4维瓶颈编码器加16单元传递网络，共2560个参数）克服条件化障碍，为低能耗物理推断…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

扩散模型推断与过阻尼Langevin动力学在形式上是等价的，这意味着编码得分函数的物理基质可以仅通过热力学达到正确平衡输出，无需数字运算。该工作解决了实现这一等价性的两大障碍：非局部跳跃连接和输入条件化信号不足。研究提出了层次双线性耦合，将U-Net跳跃连接编码为基于编码器和解码器Gram矩阵奇异结构的秩-k模块间相互作用；同时设计了一个极简数字接口（4维瓶颈编码器加16单元传递网络，共2560个参数）克服条件化障碍，为低能耗物理推断提供了可行路径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14332v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Diffusion-model inference and overdamped Langevin dynamics are formally identical. A physical substrate that encodes the score function therefore equilibrates to the correct output by thermodynamics alone, requiring no digital arithmetic during inference and potentially achieving a 10,000× reduction in energy relative to a GPU. Two fundamental barriers have until now prevented this equivalence from being realized at production scale: non-local skip connections, which locally coupled analog substrates cannot represent, and input conditioning, in which the coupling constants carry roughly 2,600× too little signal to anchor the system to a specific input. We resolve both obstacles. emphHierarchical bilinear coupling encodes U-Net skip connections as rank-k inter-module interactions derived directly from the singular structure of the encoder and decoder Gram matrices, requiring only O(Dk) physical connections instead of O(D²⁾. A emphminimal digital interface -- a 4-dimensional bottleneck encoder together with a 16-unit transfer network, totalling 2,560 parameters -- overcomes the conditioning barrier. When evaluated on activations drawn from a trained denoising U-Net, the complete system attains a decoder cosine similarity of 0.9906 against an oracle upper bound of 1.0000, while preserving theoretical net energy savings of approximately 10⁷× over GPU inference. These results constitute the first demonstration of trained-weight, production-scale thermodynamic diffusion inference.

17

基于物理信息机器学习的软包电池温度估计#

Physics-Informed Machine Learning for Pouch Cell Temperature Estimation
📚 arXiv👤 Zheng Liu📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出将传热方程嵌入神经网络损失函数的物理信息机器学习框架，实现软包电池稳态温度场高效精确预测。相比纯数据驱动方法收敛更快、精度更高（均方误差降低49.1%），尤其在远离冷却通道区域优势显著，为电池
准确估计间接液冷软包电池的温度对于优化交通电气化中的电池热管理系统至关重要。本研究提出了一种物理信息机器学习（PIML）框架，用于高效可靠地估计稳态温度分布。该方法将主导传热方程直接嵌入神经网络的损失函数中，相比纯数据驱动方法实现了更快的收敛和更高的精度。在不同冷却通道几何数据集上的评估表明，PIML模型均方误差较数据驱动模型降低了49.1%，在远离冷却通道区域表现尤为出色，验证了其在替代建模中的潜力。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

准确估计间接液冷软包电池的温度对于优化交通电气化中的电池热管理系统至关重要。本研究提出了一种物理信息机器学习（PIML）框架，用于高效可靠地估计稳态温度分布。该方法将主导传热方程直接嵌入神经网络的损失函数中，相比纯数据驱动方法实现了更快的收敛和更高的精度。在不同冷却通道几何数据集上的评估表明，PIML模型均方误差较数据驱动模型降低了49.1%，在远离冷却通道区域表现尤为出色，验证了其在替代建模中的潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14566v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurate temperature estimation of pouch cells with indirect liquid cooling is essential for optimizing battery thermal management systems for transportation electrification. However, it is challenging due to the computational expense of finite element simulations and the limitations of data-driven models. This paper presents a physics-informed machine learning (PIML) framework for the efficient and reliable estimation of steady-state temperature profiles. The PIML approach integrates the governing heat transfer equations directly into the neural network's loss function, enabling high-fidelity predictions with significantly faster convergence than purely data-driven methods. The framework is evaluated on a dataset of varying cooling channel geometries. Results demonstrate that the PIML model converges more rapidly and achieves markedly higher accuracy, with a 49.1% reduction in mean squared error over the data-driven model. Validation against independent test cases further confirms its superior performance, particularly in regions away from the cooling channels. These findings underscore the potential of PIML for surrogate modeling and design optimization in battery systems.

18

Transformer的表达能力：热带几何视角#

Expressivity of Transformers: A Tropical Geometry Perspective
📚 arXiv👤 Ye Su, Yong Liu📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文首次以热带几何严格刻画Transformer的几何表达能力，将自注意力等价于Power Voronoi图，并导出多头机制的多面体复杂度扩展规律及深层线性区域数的紧渐近界，为理解神经网络的组合表达能
为量化Transformer的几何表达能力，本研究引入了热带几何框架来刻画其精确的空间划分能力。通过将自注意力建模为向量值热带有理映射，研究证明了在零温极限下它精确等价于Power Voronoi图。基于此，研究为多头自注意力（MHSA）建立了组合学依据：通过Newton多面体的Minkowski和，多头聚合将多面体复杂度从单头的O(N)扩展到O(N^H)。对于深层架构，研究首次导出了Transformer中线性区域数的紧渐近界Θ(N…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

为量化Transformer的几何表达能力，本研究引入了热带几何框架来刻画其精确的空间划分能力。通过将自注意力建模为向量值热带有理映射，研究证明了在零温极限下它精确等价于Power Voronoi图。基于此，研究为多头自注意力（MHSA）建立了组合学依据：通过Newton多面体的Minkowski和，多头聚合将多面体复杂度从单头的O(N)扩展到O(N^H)。对于深层架构，研究首次导出了Transformer中线性区域数的紧渐近界Θ(Ndₘₒdel L)，并证明了有限温度软注意力通过指数紧的微分近似保持这些拓扑划分。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14727v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: To quantify the geometric expressivity of transformers, we introduce a tropical geometry framework to characterize their exact spatial partitioning capabilities. By modeling self-attention as a vector-valued tropical rational map, we prove it evaluates exactly to a Power Voronoi Diagram in the zero-temperature limit. Building on this equivalence, we establish a combinatorial rationale for Multi-Head Self-Attention (MHSA): via the Minkowski sum of Newton polytopes, multi-head aggregation expands the polyhedral complexity to O(N^H), overcoming the O(N) bottleneck of single heads. Extending this to deep architectures, we derive the first tight asymptotic bounds on the number of linear regions in transformers (Θ(NdₘₒdₑₗL)), demonstrating a combinatorial explosion driven intrinsically by sequence length N, ambient embedding dimension dₘₒdₑₗ, and network depth L. Importantly, we guarantee that this idealized polyhedral skeleton is geometrically stable: finite-temperature soft attention preserves these topological partitions via exponentially tight differential approximation bounds.

19

曲率对齐探测用于局部损失景观稳定化#

Curvature-Aligned Probing for Local Loss-Landscape Stabilization
📚 arXiv👤 Nikita Kiselev, Andrey Grabovoy📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文将局部损失景观稳定化重新定义为观测问题，提出曲率对齐准则Δ₂⁽ᴰ⁾，通过在Hessian顶部特征子空间探测损失增量，实现O(k⁻²)速率且规避环境维度灾难，为深度学习优化器设计与泛化分析提供了可扩
局部损失景观的稳定化通常通过点态测量或全参数空间的各向同性平均来评估，但这些方法探测的方向对强各向异性神经景观的主导局部变形贡献甚微。本研究将稳定化重新表述为观测问题，提出了由聚合阶和探测分布参数化的统一准则族，其中曲率对齐准则Δ₂⁽ᴰ⁾在训练解附近经验Hessian的顶部D特征空间中探测损失增量场。从局部二次模型出发，研究证明了Δ₂⁽ᴰ⁾保持O(k⁻²)的均方速率，同时将环境维度依赖替换为子空间维度D依赖，并基于Hessian-向量…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

局部损失景观的稳定化通常通过点态测量或全参数空间的各向同性平均来评估，但这些方法探测的方向对强各向异性神经景观的主导局部变形贡献甚微。本研究将稳定化重新表述为观测问题，提出了由聚合阶和探测分布参数化的统一准则族，其中曲率对齐准则Δ₂⁽ᴰ⁾在训练解附近经验Hessian的顶部D特征空间中探测损失增量场。从局部二次模型出发，研究证明了Δ₂⁽ᴰ⁾保持O(k⁻²)的均方速率，同时将环境维度依赖替换为子空间维度D依赖，并基于Hessian-向量积、子空间蒙特卡洛等方法推导了可扩展估计器。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.14870v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Local loss-landscape stabilization under sample growth is typically measured either pointwise or through isotropic averaging in the full parameter space. Despite practical value, both choices probe directions that contribute little to the dominant local deformation of strongly anisotropic neural landscapes. We recast stabilization as an observational problem and introduce a unified family of criteria parameterized by an aggregation order and a probing distribution; within this family we propose a curvature-aligned criterion Δ₂⁽D⁾ that probes the loss increment field in the top-D eigenspace of the empirical Hessian near a trained solution. Solely from a local quadratic model, we prove that Δ₂⁽D⁾ preserves the O(k⁻²) mean-squared rate of the full-space criterion while replacing ambient-dimension curvature dependence with dependence on the subspace dimension D; a corollary gives a closed-form spectral expression and a proposition identifies the top-D eigenspace as extremal within the eigenspace-aligned family. We also derive scalable estimators based on Hessian-vector products, subspace Monte Carlo, and a closed-form Gaussian-moment proxy. On a decoder-only transformer, a curvature-aligned probe occupying a tiny fraction of parameter space already reproduces the full-space mean-squared signal to within numerical noise throughout the validated local regime, and the closed-form estimator is orders of magnitude faster than direct Monte Carlo after subspace construction.

20

掩码自编码器基础模型在钻井地面数据预测井下指标中的潜力评估#

Assessing the Potential of Masked Autoencoder Foundation Models in Predicting Downhole Metrics from Surface Drilling Data
📚 arXiv👤 Aleksander Berezowski, Hassan Hassanzadeh, Gouri Ginde📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：首次系统评估掩码自编码器基础模型（MAEFMs）在钻井井下指标预测中的潜力，指出其自监督预训练可突破井下标签稀缺瓶颈，实现多任务预测与跨井泛化，为智能钻井提供未被开发的技术路径。
油气钻井作业产生了大量地面传感器时序数据，但由于井下测量标签稀缺，实时准确预测关键井下指标仍具挑战。本系统映射研究回顾了2015至2025年间发表的13篇论文，评估了掩码自编码器基础模型（MAEFMs）利用地面钻井数据预测井下指标的潜力。综述识别出8种常见地面采集指标和7种目标井下指标。当前研究主要采用人工神经网络和LSTM等架构，但尚未有研究探索MAEFMs。MAEFMs通过自监督预训练利用大量无标签数据，在多任务预测和跨井泛化方面…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

油气钻井作业产生了大量地面传感器时序数据，但由于井下测量标签稀缺，实时准确预测关键井下指标仍具挑战。本系统映射研究回顾了2015至2025年间发表的13篇论文，评估了掩码自编码器基础模型（MAEFMs）利用地面钻井数据预测井下指标的潜力。综述识别出8种常见地面采集指标和7种目标井下指标。当前研究主要采用人工神经网络和LSTM等架构，但尚未有研究探索MAEFMs。MAEFMs通过自监督预训练利用大量无标签数据，在多任务预测和跨井泛化方面具有独特优势，是钻井分析中技术上可行但尚未开发的机会。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15169v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Oil and gas drilling operations generate extensive time-series data from surface sensors, yet accurate real-time prediction of critical downhole metrics remains challenging due to the scarcity of labelled downhole measurements. This systematic mapping study reviews thirteen papers published between 2015 and 2025 to assess the potential of Masked Autoencoder Foundation Models (MAEFMs) for predicting downhole metrics from surface drilling data. The review identifies eight commonly collected surface metrics and seven target downhole metrics. Current approaches predominantly employ neural network architectures such as artificial neural networks (ANNs) and long short-term memory (LSTM) networks, yet no studies have explored MAEFMs despite their demonstrated effectiveness in time-series modeling. MAEFMs offer distinct advantages through self-supervised pre-training on abundant unlabeled data, enabling multi-task prediction and improved generalization across wells. This research establishes that MAEFMs represent a technically feasible but unexplored opportunity for drilling analytics, recommending future empirical validation of their performance against existing models and exploration of their broader applicability in oil and gas operations.

21

嵌入如何塑造图神经网络：经典与量子导向节点表示的比较#

How Embeddings Shape Graph Neural Networks: Classical vs Quantum-Oriented Node Representations
📚 arXiv👤 Nouhaila Innan, Antonello Rosato, Alberto Marchisio, Muhammad Shafique📅 2026-04-17🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究首次在严格控制的统一框架下系统比较经典与量子导向节点嵌入对图神经网络性能的影响，发现量子嵌入在结构驱动任务上具有稳定优势，为量子机器学习在图数据上的应用提供了可复现的基准和选型依据。
节点嵌入是图神经网络的信息接口，但其经验影响常在不匹配的主干网络、数据划分和训练预算下被报道。本研究在统一流程下对图分类的嵌入选择进行了控制基准测试，比较了经典基线与量子导向节点表示。研究评估了两种经典基线和多种量子导向替代方案（包括电路定义的变分嵌入、基于图算子和线性代数构造的量子启发嵌入），所有变体在相同主干网络、分层划分、优化设置和评估指标下训练测试。在五个TU数据集和经目标分箱转化为分类任务的QM9上的实验表明，量子导向嵌入在…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要
